EUROPEAN DYNAMICS is a leading Information Technologies service provider and software developer in the field of eGovernment, operating internationally as a group of companies headquartered in Luxembourg. With a staff of c. 1,200 across 7 main international operating subsidiaries, the Company works with c. 100 clients globally including Federal Governments, European Institutions & International Organisations in more than 30 countries and 4 continents.
 
The group generates annual revenues in excess of €100 million, with double digit annual growth and an industry leading EBITDA margin. Customers include government institutions, multinational corporations, public administrations and multinational companies, research and academic institutes.

The group designs, develops, supports and operates complex IT systems and has also developed and commercialises a suite of market leading software products specifically tailored to core e-Government activities (notably in the fields of customs, taxation, procurement, financial markets and IP management), using state-of-the-art technologies.

title: Support Engineer
description_text:
Job Purpose
The Support Engineer will play a key role within the Business Operations Organization at Mondia, contributing to the stability and performance of Mondia Group's global customer services. The role emphasizes hands-on technical skills in incident response, closely aligning with your core priorities of prior end-to-end incident handling experience (intake/detection → escalation/communication with troubleshooting teams → stakeholder updates → closure).
The Support Engineer will work closely with the support team to ensure efficient resolution of issues, maintain high service delivery standards, and enhance system reliability for our global customers.
Roles and Responsibilities
Hands-on incident response → Keeps the end-to-end ownership you value (intake → classification → dispatch/escalation → updates → closure), but frames it as frontline execution rather than deep root-cause fixes. 
Monitoring KPIs → Simplified to "help monitor" and track basics (not owning/analysing complex dashboards or driving improvements, which is more L2). 
Supporting automation/classification/dispatching → Changed from "supporting the automation" (which could imply building it) to assisting with/using existing automation and processes — common in L1 roles in NOC/monitoring-heavy environments, where L1 applies rules, triages alerts, and feeds into automated dispatching.
Technical Competencies/Skills 
The ideal candidate has exceptionally high ownership, excellent critical thinking skills, and the ability to work with agility in a fast-paced environment. They would also be insanely focused on demonstrating excellence in service delivery and problem-solving, breaking down complex information into understandable and actionable items.
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.
2+ years of experience in VAS/IT/Payments industry within integration, operation, support, or service environments.
Ticketing & ITSM Tool Proficiency — Use ticketing systems (Jira, ServiceNow, Zendesk, etc.) to create, update, escalate, and close tickets accurately and promptly. 
Incident Management & Troubleshooting Basics — Quickly intake, detect, log, prioritize, classify, and perform initial troubleshooting of incidents/alarms, then escalate with clear details and track to closure. 
Monitoring & Alerting Tools — Monitor dashboards and alerting tools to detect, acknowledge, and respond to real-time alarms/incidents. 
KPI & Reporting Awareness — Track and log support metrics (response time, SLA compliance, ticket volume, escalation rate) in tools to support KPI monitoring and process discipline.
Very Good Command of English — Demonstrate fluent written and spoken English (professional/C1 level or higher) for clear incident documentation, stakeholder updates, team escalations, and international communication.
High Availability for On-Duty Responsibilities — Commit to very high availability, including shift work, on-call rotations, and rapid response outside standard hours to ensure 24/7 incident coverage and minimal downtime.
Familiarity with ITIL incident/problem management basics. 
Education 
BA degree in technology, computer sciences, or any related field.
Hybrid Office - 13 WFH days per quarter
Company bonus
Private Health Insurance
Ticket Restaurant
Flat hierarchies and short decision-making paths
Cooperation in a highly motivated, young, international team spread across 3 continents
An attractive location in a creative and modern office
ai_core_responsibilities: The Support Engineer will manage end-to-end incident handling, ensuring efficient resolution of issues and maintaining high service delivery standards. They will monitor KPIs and assist with existing automation processes to enhance system reliability.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a bachelor's degree in a related field and at least 2 years of experience in the VAS/IT/Payments industry. Proficiency in ticketing systems and a strong command of English are also required.

title: Graphic Designer (App & Digital-First)
description_text:
We’re looking for a highly skilled graphic designer with strong experience in the app and digital product space to help us build and scale ETERA’s visual identity.
This role is focused on creating a cohesive, premium visual system across all touchpoints — especially social media and digital assets.
What you’ll work on
Social media templates (organic & paid)
App-related visuals and marketing assets
Brand-aligned layouts for campaigns and launches
Visual systems that scale across platforms
Ongoing refinement of our brand identity
What we’re looking for
Proven experience designing for apps, SaaS, or tech products, specifically consumer apps
Strong understanding of digital-first branding
Ability to translate brand strategy into visual systems
Experience creating high-performing social templates
Attention to detail and consistency across assets
Strong sense of typography, layout, and motion-ready design
Must-have
Portfolio required (applications without a portfolio will not be considered)
Portfolio should clearly show:
App or tech-related projects
Brand identity work
Social or digital design systems
Nice to have
Experience with motion design
Familiarity with performance marketing creatives
Understanding of UI/UX principles
We’re looking for someone who can own the visual language of ETERA and help shape how our brand is experienced across digital platforms.
ai_core_responsibilities: The graphic designer will create a cohesive visual system for ETERA across various digital platforms, focusing on social media and app-related visuals. They will also refine the brand identity and develop marketing assets for campaigns and launches.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have proven experience in designing for apps or tech products, particularly consumer apps, and a strong understanding of digital-first branding. A portfolio showcasing relevant work is required, including app-related projects and social or digital design systems.
linkedin_org_slogan: etera transforms travel with AI,offering real-time,habit-based trip planning,voice bookings,and seamless personalization

title: Refrigeration Mechanic - HVAC Projects
description_text:
Refrigeration Mechanic – HVAC Projects
Rival Air Projects Pty Ltd
📍 Melbourne, VIC
Rival Air Projects Pty Ltd is a growing HVAC contractor delivering high-quality mechanical services across commercial and industrial projects throughout Melbourne. We are currently seeking a qualified Refrigeration Mechanic to join our team and work across a diverse range of HVAC installations, from construction through to commissioning.
About the Role
You will be involved in the installation, testing, and commissioning of a wide variety of HVAC systems on new and existing projects. This role offers exposure to different project types and the opportunity to work through full project lifecycles.
Key responsibilities include:
Installation of commercial HVAC and refrigeration systems
Assisting with system commissioning and performance testing
Diagnosing and rectifying faults during installation and commissioning stages
Reading and interpreting mechanical drawings and specifications
Working collaboratively with project managers, subcontractors, and clients
Ensuring all work is completed safely and in accordance with relevant standards
About You
Trade qualified Refrigeration & Air Conditioning Mechanic
Current ARCtick licence
Valid Australian driver’s licence
Experience in commercial HVAC installations (commissioning experience highly regarded)
Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail
Ability to work independently and as part of a team
Strong commitment to safety and quality workmanship
What We Offer
Competitive remuneration based on experience
Ongoing work across varied and interesting projects
Supportive team environment with opportunities for growth
Exposure to end-to-end HVAC project delivery
If you’re a motivated refrigeration mechanic looking to work on diverse HVAC projects across Melbourne, we’d love to hear from you.
ai_core_responsibilities: The role involves the installation, testing, and commissioning of various HVAC systems across new and existing commercial and industrial projects. Key duties include diagnosing and rectifying faults, interpreting mechanical drawings, and ensuring all work adheres to safety standards.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must be trade qualified Refrigeration & Air Conditioning Mechanics holding a current ARCtick licence and a valid Australian driver’s licence. Experience in commercial HVAC installations is required, with commissioning experience being highly regarded.

title: Senior Java Engineer
description_text:
Building a brand is a marathon, not a sprint. Legacy People and our partners are seeking a Java Engineer who brings a wealth of experience and a steady hand to our founding team. 
We are currently rolling out a new venture focused on sustainable profitability and technical precision. We are not just looking for a developer; we are seeking a Java Engineer who views software development as a craft and architectural integrity as a priority.
This is an invitation to join a mission-driven team where your experience isn't just a line on a resume, it is the blueprint for our success. You will have the rare opportunity to shape a brand-new project from its infancy, ensuring it is built to scale, built to last, and built to lead the market.
Responsibilities
Greenfield Implementation: Take the lead on developing a new project from the ground up using Spring Boot and a robust microservices architecture.
Technical Stewardship: Design and maintain sophisticated applications using Java 21, ensuring our systems are modern, efficient, and resilient.
Commitment to Quality: Champion engineering best practices. You will ensure strict compliance with coding standards and write comprehensive testing suites (JUnit, Mockito) to guarantee a "zero-debt" codebase.
Strategic Collaboration: Work as a high-level peer with cross-functional teams to solve complex logic challenges and translate business goals into technical reality.
Knowledge Continuity: Maintain meticulous technical documentation, ensuring that the logic and architecture of our new brand are transparent and scalable.
The Seasoned Specialist: You bring deep-rooted experience in Java development and a "quality-first" mindset.
Architectural Wisdom: You understand the nuances of microservices and the importance of choosing the right patterns for long-term stability.
Communication Mastery: You possess professional-level proficiency in English and Russian, allowing you to bridge communication gaps in a sophisticated, international environment.
Detail-Oriented: You take pride in clean code, thorough testing, and the invisible details that separate good software from great software.
Why This Role?
We offer the unique excitement of a new brand rollout paired with a professional environment that values work-life balance, technical excellence, and fiscal responsibility. Here, you aren't "stirring things up", you are building a legacy.
Work remotely whilst building a legacy ;)
ai_core_responsibilities: The engineer will lead the greenfield implementation of a new project from scratch, utilizing Spring Boot and a microservices architecture. They must also champion engineering best practices, ensure strict coding standards, and write comprehensive testing suites.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess deep-rooted experience in Java development with a quality-first mindset, demonstrating architectural wisdom regarding microservices patterns. Professional-level proficiency in both English and Russian is required for sophisticated international collaboration.

title: Warehouse Supervisor
description_text:
Job Description Summary:
The Warehouse Supervisor manages all warehouse operations, leading teams across receiving, picking, replenishment, and shipping to ensure efficient, safe, and accurate fulfillment of orders. 
Responsibilities and Duties
· Supervise and coordinate warehouse staff and lead personnel 
· Plan and schedule daily warehouse activities and staffing 
· Monitor productivity, accuracy, and efficiency metrics across all functions 
· Train, develop, and evaluate warehouse team members 
· Implement and enforce safety protocols and OSHA compliance 
· Manage inventory accuracy and cycle count programs 
· Coordinate with transportation for inbound and outbound shipments 
· Optimize warehouse layouts and workflows 
· Conduct performance reviews and oversee disciplinary actions 
· Prepare operational reports and communicate with management 
· Manage equipment maintenance and facility 
· Additional duties as assigned
Required Skills & Qualifications: 
· 3+ years of warehouse/distribution experience, 2+ years in supervisory capacity 
· Bilingual (English/Spanish) REQUIRED 
· Strong leadership and team management skills 
· Proficiency with WMS systems and Microsoft Office 
· Knowledge of warehouse operations and best practices 
· Excellent problem-solving and decision-making abilities 
· Forklift certification required 
· Understanding of OSHA safety regulations 
· Ability to work flexible hours including overtime as needed 
Preferred Skills and Qualifications:
· Bachelor’s degree in logistics, supply chain or related field
· Lean/Six Sigma certification
· Experience with continuous improvement methodologies
· Knowledge of labor management systems
Physical Requirements:
· Ability to stand for extended periods 
· Ability to lift up to 50 lbs regularly
· Good hand-eye coordination
Benefits:
Gear Up Sports provides the following employee benefits:
Paid Time Off (PTO)
Paid Holidays – New Year’s Day, Memorial Day, 4th of July, Labor Day, Thanksgiving, Day after Thanksgiving, and Christmas
Healthcare Benefits – Effective the first of the month following the date of hire:
Health/Vision insurance through Regence BlueCross BlueShield
Dental insurance through LifeMap Dental
Life, Disability & Accident Insurance through MetLife – effective 1st of the month following date of hire:
Group Term Life insurance – company paid
Long Term Disability insurance – company paid
· Short Term Disability insurance –company paid – provided for employees working in states without state-specific paid family/medical leave programs.
Voluntary additional life insurance for self & dependents
Voluntary Accident Insurance
Flexible Spending Account Plan – allowing pre-tax savings for Health and Dependent Care Expenses
Employee Assistance Plan (EAP) – plan provided through Canopy
401(k) Plan – participation after three months of employment with employer-matching contribution
ai_core_responsibilities: The Warehouse Supervisor is responsible for managing all warehouse operations, leading teams across receiving, picking, replenishment, and shipping functions to ensure efficient and accurate order fulfillment. Key duties include planning daily activities, monitoring performance metrics, training staff, and enforcing safety compliance.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess at least 3 years of warehouse/distribution experience, with 2 years in a supervisory role, and be bilingual in English and Spanish. Required qualifications include strong leadership, proficiency with WMS systems, forklift certification, and knowledge of OSHA safety regulations.

title: Warehouse Lead
description_text:
Rate: 
$22.00-$25.00 per hour
Job Description Summary:
The Warehouse Lead coordinates and oversees warehouse operations including picking, receiving, and replenishment teams. This role ensures order accuracy, productivity targets, and quality standards are met while supporting team members and maintaining efficient warehouse workflows. 
Responsibilities and Duties
· Coordinate daily picking, receiving, and replenishment assignments and workflows 
· Lead and schedule team activities across multiple warehouse functions 
· Train new staff on procedures, systems, and safety protocols 
· Monitor picking accuracy, receiving accuracy, and productivity metrics 
· Perform quality audits on picked orders and received shipments 
· Verify accuracy of incoming shipments and documentation 
· Troubleshoot system issues and resolve discrepancies 
· Resolve receiving issues with vendors and carriers 
· Communicate with warehouse supervisor on daily operations 
· Coordinate with purchasing and inventory control teams 
· Assist with inventory cycle counts 
· Lead by example and provide hands-on support 
· Ensure proper equipment usage and maintenance 
· Maintain organized work areas and dock operations 
· Process urgent or priority shipments 
· Report productivity and quality metrics to management 
· Ensure compliance with safety and quality standards 
Required Skills & Qualifications: 
· Strong knowledge of warehouse operations and best practices 
· Proficiency with RF scanners and WMS systems 
· Knowledge of receiving processes and documentation 
· Excellent organizational and time management skills 
· Strong problem-solving and communication skills 
· Ability to train and motivate team members 
· Ability to manage multiple priorities 
· Strong attention to detail and accuracy 
· Forklift certification preferred 
· Additional duties as assigned
Preferred Skills and Qualifications:
· Bilingual (English/Spanish) Preferred
· Experience in high-volume e-commerce or distribution environment
· Experience with vendor management
· Knowledge of shipping and receiving regulations
· Proficiency with Microsoft Office
Physical Requirements:
· Ability to stand for extended periods 
· Ability to lift up to 50 lbs regularly
· Good hand-eye coordination
Benefits:
Gear Up Sports provides the following employee benefits:
Paid Time Off (PTO) 
Paid Holidays – New Year’s Day, Memorial Day, 4th of July, Labor Day, Thanksgiving, Day after Thanksgiving, and Christmas
Healthcare Benefits – Effective the first of the month following the date of hire:
Health/Vision insurance through Regence BlueCross BlueShield
Dental insurance through LifeMap Dental
Life, Disability & Accident Insurance through MetLife – effective 1st of the month following date of hire:
Group Term Life insurance – company paid
Long Term Disability insurance – company paid
· Short Term Disability insurance –company paid – provided for employees working in states without state-specific paid family/medical leave programs.
Voluntary additional life insurance for self & dependents
Voluntary Accident Insurance
Flexible Spending Account Plan – allowing pre-tax savings for Health and Dependent Care Expenses
Employee Assistance Plan (EAP) – plan provided through Canopy
401(k) Plan – participation after three months of employment with employer-matching contribution
ai_core_responsibilities: The Warehouse Lead coordinates and oversees daily warehouse operations, managing teams responsible for picking, receiving, and replenishment to ensure order accuracy and productivity targets are met. This role involves leading team activities, training new staff, monitoring key metrics, and resolving operational discrepancies with systems, vendors, and carriers.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess strong knowledge of warehouse operations and best practices, along with proficiency in using RF scanners and Warehouse Management Systems (WMS). Essential soft skills include excellent organizational abilities, strong problem-solving, and effective communication, with forklift certification being preferred.

title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
description_text:
Senior Full Stack Engineer
Remote (U.S.) | Full-time | $130,000–$150,000
About Clever Benefits
Clever Benefits is building the tech that makes healthcare feel less like a headache. We package telemedicine services into custom-branded mobile apps and build the CRMs that power day-to-day operations for our clients. Our tools support meaningful experiences for the people who rely on them, and we're scaling quickly to meet demand.
We operate in a fast-paced, high-context environment with a lean engineering team that moves quickly and takes full ownership of its work. We care deeply about clarity, real-world impact, and building systems that scale. You won't find layers of red tape here, just a team of smart, mission-driven people solving hard problems together.
The Role
We're hiring a Senior Full Stack Engineer to help build and scale the high-impact products our clients rely on. This is a true full stack role offering opportunities to work across web, mobile, internal tooling, and infrastructure. You'll take ownership of projects end-to-end, contribute to technical decisions, and collaborate across the team to deliver robust, scalable solutions.
In a lean team environment, you'll need to be comfortable identifying the right stakeholders, asking clarifying questions, and simplifying complex problems before diving into solutions. You'll work directly with leadership and clients to understand requirements, push back when needed, and make pragmatic technical decisions that balance speed with quality.
As we phase out legacy systems, consolidate codebases, and move toward a service-based architecture, you'll help shape the future of our platform.
Key Responsibilities
Take full ownership of features from scoping through delivery, including identifying stakeholders and gathering requirements
Design, build, and deliver scalable, maintainable features across web, mobile, internal tooling, and infrastructure
Ask the right questions early to reduce complexity and avoid over-engineering
Contribute to system design discussions and help uphold engineering standards for code quality, testing, and reliability
Participate in code reviews and collaborate with teammates to solve technical challenges
Communicate effectively with team members, leadership, and clients to deliver business outcomes
Take initiative to identify areas for improvement in codebases, processes, or tooling and help implement solutions
Who You Are
4+ years as a full stack engineer building and scaling production systems in cloud environments (AWS preferred)
Solid experience with our core stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React (with Vite and/or Next.js), tRPC, and Tailwind CSS
Experience with both MongoDB and PostgreSQL, including ORMs like Prisma
Strong experience with AWS infrastructure, particularly CDK, Fargate, RDS, Lambda, API Gateway, S3, and CloudFormation
Comfortable working without heavy product management support. You know how to scope work, identify edge cases, and challenge requirements when something doesn't make sense
Passionate about system design, code quality, type-safety, and building for long-term maintainability
Clear communicator who values collaboration and contributes to a positive, inclusive team culture
Proactive, solution-oriented, and comfortable navigating ambiguity
Able to balance moving quickly with building things the right way
Bonus points for:
Experience building or supporting mobile applications with React Native
Experience working in regulated domains such as healthcare
Based in or open to relocating to the Phoenix area (future hybrid office option, timeline TBD)
Health insurance through Redirect Health 100% Employer-sponsored
New Apple laptop provided
3 weeks PTO plus 9 Federal holidays
ai_core_responsibilities: The engineer will take full ownership of features from scoping through delivery, including identifying stakeholders and gathering requirements. They will design, build, and deliver scalable, maintainable features across web, mobile, internal tooling, and infrastructure.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have 4+ years of experience as a full stack engineer building and scaling production systems, preferably in AWS environments. Solid experience with the core stack including TypeScript, Node.js, React, tRPC, and familiarity with both MongoDB and PostgreSQL is required.
linkedin_org_slogan: Empowering Companies with Tech-Driven Benefits - Healthier Employees, Smarter Savings.
linkedin_org_description:
Welcome to Clever Benefits, where we revolutionize employee well-being and company savings through innovative technology and benefit administration solutions. Our mission is to empower organizations of all sizes by streamlining their benefit processes, fostering a healthier workforce, and ultimately reducing healthcare costs.

At Clever Benefits, we specialize in:

Cutting-edge Technology Solutions: Our team of experts continuously develop and implement advanced digital tools that simplify the management of employee benefits while enhancing user experience.

Benefit Administration: Our comprehensive services, from enrollment to claims processing, ensure seamless and efficient administration of your employee benefits program.

Wellness Programs & Initiatives: We design tailored wellness programs that inspire healthier lifestyles and boost employee engagement, leading to improved productivity and reduced absenteeism.

Cost-saving Strategies: Through data-driven analytics and industry insights, we identify opportunities to optimize benefit plans, delivering savings for both employers and employees.

Compliance & Regulations: Our dedicated team stays up-to-date with the latest regulatory changes, ensuring your company remains compliant and avoids potential penalties.

With Clever Benefits, you can trust our proven track record of creating meaningful change for companies and their employees. Partner with us to transform your benefits program and experience the Clever Benefits difference.

title: Account Manager
description_text:
Job Purposes:
The Account Manager is responsible for managing client relationships, leading day-to-day operations, and ensuring the successful delivery of campaigns. Acting as the main point of contact for clients, the Account Manager balances strategic thinking with flawless project execution. This role might mentor junior team members and collaborate closely with internal departments to maintain high-quality standards, client satisfaction, and account profitability.
Dimensions:
Financial: Responsible for input and monitoring of financial estimates, budgets, and profitability tracking for assigned accounts
Non-Financial: Responsible for client servicing quality, internal coordination, and team development within assigned projects.
Responsibilities and Tasks:
Manage day-to-day operations and serve as the primary client contact on accounts/projects.
Lead on the execution of projects/campaigns from brief to final delivery.
Development of briefs, budgets, and timelines.
Lead meetings both internally and externally with clients.
Identify growth opportunities within existing accounts.
Provide strategic input during planning and creative development, ensuring the work aligns with client objectives and brand strategy.
Report all financial matters related to their respective accounts as per the agency processes.
Support supplier contract negotiations and execution, ensuring compliance, cost effectiveness, and alignment with project requirements.
Do and ensure the accurate and timely posting of social content across designated platforms, adhering to the approved content calendar and brand guidelines.
Handle conflict resolution and problem-solving within accounts to ensure smooth collaboration and client satisfaction.
Report on account financials as per agency processes.
Work Contacts:
Internal: Account Management, Strategy, Creative, Studio, Media, and Finance Teams.
External: Clients, Production Houses, Suppliers, and External Partners.
Job Specifications and Skills:
Education: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Advertising, Business, or a related field.
Experience: 4–6 years of experience in account management or client servicing, including managing medium-to-large accounts within an advertising or marketing agency.
Quality and Delivery
Ability to review and QA all deliverables for accuracy and brand alignment.
Ability to maintain attention to detail under pressure and tight timelines.
Ability to enforce process discipline across briefing, revisions, and approvals.
Client and Strategic Relationships
Ability to act as the main focal point for clients and manage expectations.
Ability to build trust through reliability, responsiveness, and value creation.
Ability to spot upsell and cross-sell opportunities with senior guidance.
Strategic and Analytical
Ability to translate business and marketing objectives into clear briefs.
Ability to connect audience, market, and competitive insights to recommendations.

title: Android Developer
description_text:
Discover Lokal
In 2018, we began with a WhatsApp group with a simple hypothesis: people in tier-2/3 towns weren’t really using the internet meaningfully yet. We believed that if we started with local content in their own language, they’d come back every day; once there was a habit and trust, that same space could naturally grow into classifieds and, eventually, something they used for almost everything online. This spark became Lokal. Our first instinct was to put everything in one place & one app - local updates, classifieds, jobs, matrimony and more. It worked, till it stopped working. Users gave us the insight - when one use case outweighs the others, everything else seems like noise. We listened. Like how Craigslist quietly seeded a generation of focused companies & marketplaces, we began unbundling and verticalizing.

Today, Lokal is a house of focused apps, many products, one mission:
To connect Tier-2/3+ India to the Knowledge, opportunities, tools and experts they’ve always deserved. We now operate dozens of live apps across categories like:
Edutainment & Skill Learning – practical skills and learning in regional languages (GyanTV)
Matrimonial Matchmaking – hyperlocal, compatibility-first partner search (Lokal Matrimony)
Agri Consulting – farmer-first advisory in local languages (AgriLokal)
Local Jobs – blue- and grey-collar opportunities close to home (Lokal Jobs, Sahi Jobs)
Social & Community – Place to find & post social updates (Lokal app)
Emotional Well-being & Peer Support – safe spaces to talk and feel heard (Dostt & Eaze)
Astrology & Guidance – instant access to trusted Astrologers via chat and voice (AstroLokal)
Advisory Services – early bets in legal help, financial guidance, career counselling, and more
Under the hood, Lokal is a discovery and access platform: local-language internet + deep Bharat insight+ AI. When someone opens a product we’ve built, they don’t wade through clutter; they get a straight line to what they came for.This is the story new teammates walk into:
A company that started as a WhatsApp group, became a family of focused apps, and kept one belief at the center — access changes lives. We ship fast. We learn fast. We build for Bharat. We are backed by leading global and domestic investors including Y Combinator, Sony, Global Brain, India Quotient, and 3one4 Capital
Why Join Us?
We’re scaling fast with strong fundamentals, on a mission to empower millions through AI and access. At Lokal, you’ll take ownership from day one, build for real impact, and help redefine the roadmap of how Bharat connects to opportunities, knowledge, and experts.
1-4 years of experience in Android application development
Ability to independently implement features with guidance
Willingness to learn, adapt, and grow in a fast-paced environment
Design, develop, and maintain Android applications using Kotlin / Java
Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code following best practices
Collaborate with Product, Design, and Backend teams to define and ship new features
Optimize application performance, memory usage, and responsiveness
Integrate RESTful APIs and work with backend services
Ensure app quality through unit testing, debugging, and code reviews
Participate in architectural discussions and contribute to technical decisions
Continuously discover, evaluate, and implement new technologies to improve development efficiency
ai_core_responsibilities: The role involves designing, developing, and maintaining Android applications using Kotlin or Java, ensuring clean and efficient code following best practices. Responsibilities also include collaborating with cross-functional teams to ship new features and optimizing application performance.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates need 1-4 years of experience in Android application development and the ability to independently implement features with guidance. A willingness to learn and adapt quickly in a fast-paced environment is essential for success.

title: Clinical Specialist
description_text:
About HEALWELL AI
HEALWELL AI is a physician-led healthcare technology company applying AI and data science to preventive care. Our mission is to improve outcomes and save lives through the early identification and detection of disease. Through our Life Sciences division, we partner with healthcare and life sciences organizations to improve care for patients with rare and complex chronic diseases using AI-enabled patient identification, real-world evidence, and clinical decision support.
Role Overview
The Clinical Specialist – Life Sciences is a physician-facing clinical education and support role within HEALWELL AI’s Life Sciences division. The role supports physicians caring for patients with rare and complex chronic diseases identified through HEALWELL AI’s Clinical Decision Support Platform.
Acting as a trusted clinical resource, the Clinical Specialist supports interpretation of clinical insights, diagnostic considerations, and guideline-aligned care. This role provides education and decision-support only and does not diagnose, prescribe, or assume responsibility for patient care.
This role reports to the Clinical Specialist Team Manager and works closely with Clinical Science, Life Sciences, operations, and commercial teams.
About You
You are motivated by science, innovation, and the growing impact of real-world data and evidence in healthcare. You bring clinical training and early professional experience and are looking for greater ownership, impact, and the opportunity to help advance patient care through AI-enabled insights.
You are detail-oriented, organized, and collaborative, and you take pride in seeing how your work contributes to larger programs that bring meaningful innovation to patients.
Key Responsibilities
Physician Education & Clinical Support
Support physicians managing patients identified through the HEALWELL AI Clinical Decision Support Platform.
Provide education on disease states, diagnostic pathways, guideline-aligned evaluation, and care optimization.
Facilitate case-based discussions to support interpretation of clinical signals, care gaps, and next-step considerations.
Manage an assigned portfolio of physician users with a structured cadence of outreach, education, and follow-up.
Clinical Expertise & Cross-Functional Collaboration
Develop and maintain disease-specific educational materials and physician-facing resources.
Partner with Clinical Science and Life Sciences leadership to align physician education with algorithm logic and program intent.
Capture physician feedback and coordinate with product, technical, and operations teams to support program improvement.
Contribute to standardized training materials, playbooks, FAQs, and clinical education protocols.
Program Execution & Reporting
Produce program summaries highlighting physician engagement, clinical feedback, and improvement opportunities.
Communicate physician insights internally to inform program evolution and customer value.
Ensure accurate documentation of clinical interactions and compliance with privacy regulations (e.g., PHIPA, HIPAA).
Qualifications
Required
MD or equivalent medical degree (including internationally trained physicians).
2–5+ years of experience in clinical practice, medical education, medical affairs, or physician-facing clinical roles.
Experience supporting or managing rare and/or complex chronic disease pathways.
Strong communication and presentation skills with clinical stakeholders.
Preferred
Experience in physician education, clinical liaison, or field medical roles.
Familiarity with clinical decision support tools, healthcare analytics, or EMR-derived insights.
Fluency in English required; French bilingualism is a strong asset.
Work Environment
Based in the Greater Toronto Area (GTA).
Primarily remote, field-based role.
Occasional travel for physician meetings, customer engagements, and internal collaboration.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Clinical Specialist will support physicians managing patients identified through the AI platform by providing education on disease states, diagnostic pathways, and guideline-aligned care optimization. This includes facilitating case-based discussions and managing an assigned portfolio of physician users through structured outreach.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess an MD or equivalent medical degree along with 2 to 5+ years of experience in clinical practice, medical education, or physician-facing roles, specifically supporting rare or complex chronic disease pathways. Strong communication skills are essential for engaging with clinical stakeholders.

As a physician-led organization with a proven management team of experienced executives, HEALWELL AI is executing a strategy centered around developing and acquiring technology and clinical sciences capabilities that complement the company’s roadmap.

title: Senior Account Executive
description_text:
El reto
En Finnosummit, estamos en la búsqueda de un gerente de alianzas excepcional que tenga un enfoque sólido en la venta consultiva B2B y una habilidad destacada para resolver problemas. Queremos contar con un profesional entusiasta de la tecnología financiera, que pueda construir y mantener relaciones valiosas con los actores más influyentes del ecosistema en Latinoamérica, transformando necesidades complejas en colaboraciones duraderas.
¿Qué harás en tu día a día?
Gestión de Pipeline: Serás el encargado de llevar a cabo el ciclo completo de ventas para cuentas corporativas (Bancos, Big Techs y Fintechs), creando propuestas personalizadas para patrocinios y programas de innovación que se adapten a sus necesidades.
Consultoría de Negocio: Te convertirás en un asesor de confianza, ayudando a identificar áreas de mejora en eficiencia y rentabilidad para facilitar negociaciones complejas que culminen en acuerdos exitosos con soluciones de gran impacto.
Venta Científica: Te asegurarás de que HubSpot esté siempre en su mejor estado, utilizando métricas de velocidad y "Criterios de Salida" para ofrecer un pronóstico de ventas preciso.
Estrategia Comercial: Implementarás tácticas de calentamiento y prospección avanzada para maximizar la conversión de leads y alcanzar cuotas anuales competitivas.
¿Eres la persona que estamos buscando?
Formación Académica: Licenciatura en Negocios, Administración, Economía o áreas afines.
Experiencia Senior: Más de 5 años en ventas B2B de alto valor (SaaS, Consultoría o Tecnología) con una red sólida en la industria Fintech.
Cierre de Acuerdos: Historial comprobable de cerrar tratos superiores a $50k USD.
Comunicación Global: Dominio fluido del inglés y español (esencial) para negociar con grandes empresas tecnológicas y ejecutivos de alto nivel.
Mentalidad Analítica: Conocimiento profundo de herramientas de inteligencia artificial, HubSpot, LinkedIn Sales Navigator y análisis de datos (Excel/Sheets) para segmentación de mercado y optimización de embudos de ventas.
Habilidades Blandas: Persona altamente organizada, proactiva y enfocada en la resolución de problemas con una perspectiva de creación de valor.
Plus / Deseable: Interés y entendimiento de los modelos de negocio Fintech y entusiasmo por la transformación de los servicios financieros.
¿Qué te ofrecemos?

Networking de Élite: Tendrás la oportunidad de interactuar directamente con líderes de la industria, como Nu, BBVA, AWS, Metlife, y más.

Flexibilidad: Ofrecemos un modelo de trabajo híbrido que se centra en los resultados.

title: Project Coordinator - Events
description_text:
Key Responsibilities – Events Coordinator (Admin Focus)
Event Planning & Scheduling
Assist in defining event objectives, scope, and deliverables.
Develop detailed event schedules and timelines.
Coordinate tasks among internal teams, vendors, and external partners.
Track key event milestones and deadlines to ensure smooth execution.
Communication & Collaboration
Act as a primary point of contact for event-related updates and inquiries.
Maintain clear communication between internal teams, stakeholders, and external vendors.
Organize and document meetings, including recording minutes and following up on action items.
Ensure all stakeholders are regularly informed on event progress, changes, and potential risks.
Documentation & Reporting
Maintain accurate event documentation, including plans, reports, and vendor contracts.
Monitor event progress and logistical performance.
Prepare reports and summaries for management and stakeholders.
Support budget tracking, vendor payments, and resource allocation.
Administrative & Compliance Tasks
Draft and send official letters and communications on behalf of the events team.
Acquire necessary permits, approvals, and clearances for events.
Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
Timely completion of event planning milestones.
Accuracy and completeness of event documentation and logistics.
Effective communication and coordination among all stakeholders.
Quality and adherence to event deliverables and standards.
Efficient handling of administrative and compliance responsibilities.
Education & Experience
Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Event Management, Hospitality, or a related field.
Minimum 2–4 years of experience in event coordination, administrative support, or project coordination.
Previous experience working with vendors, government entities, or compliance-related documentation is an advantage.
Skills & Competencies
Strong organizational and time-management skills with the ability to manage multiple events and deadlines simultaneously.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills, including drafting official correspondence and reports.
Proven ability to coordinate across multiple stakeholders (internal teams, vendors, authorities, and partners).
High attention to detail to ensure accuracy in documentation, contracts, schedules, and reports.
Strong problem-solving skills and ability to handle last-minute changes calmly and effectively.
Administrative & Technical Skills
Proficient in Microsoft Office tools (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook); experience with event management or project tracking tools is a plus.
Experience in document control, record-keeping, and reporting.
Familiarity with budget tracking, invoice processing, and vendor payment follow-ups.
Ability to organize meetings, prepare agendas, record minutes, and track action items.
Compliance & Professional Requirements
Experience coordinating permits, approvals, and regulatory requirements for events.
Understanding of basic contract management and compliance procedures.
Ability to handle sensitive information with professionalism and confidentiality.
Willingness to work extended hours or weekends when required by event schedules
ai_core_responsibilities: The Project Coordinator will primarily focus on event planning and scheduling, including defining objectives, developing timelines, and tracking key milestones to ensure smooth execution. Key administrative duties involve acting as a point of contact, organizing meetings, maintaining accurate documentation, and supporting budget tracking and compliance tasks.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess a Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field and 2–4 years of experience in event coordination or administrative support, with experience handling vendors or compliance documentation being advantageous. Essential competencies include strong organizational skills, excellent written and verbal communication, high attention to detail, and proficiency in Microsoft Office tools.
linkedin_org_description:
Need to get going on some really big goals? Maybe your team is challenged with the growth of a new product line, but you have no idea where to start? Perhaps your company needs to innovate and scale up, but you’re stuck in “We’ve tried everything – nothing works.” Or you have these perpetual thoughts of achieving something new – a new adventure, an entrepreneurial endeavor, a long-lost goal – but you haven’t been able to take action?

In our unique Visioneering Process, we use the Merlin, or backcasting, process to help individuals, teams and organizations get from where they find themselves today, in their current reality, to where they want to be. Backcasting starts with defining a desirable future and then working backwards to identify landmarks, benchmarks, milestones, accomplishments, events, tasks, and programs that will connect the future to the present. The fundamental question of backcasting asks: “If we want to attain a certain future, which accomplishments must be achieved to get there?”

Our expert team of Future Creators specializes in vision creation, implementation and facilitating transformation through strategic planning, committed action and positive change. We use on-purpose play, group genius, collaboration, emotional and somatic intelligence and over 25 years of experience in innovation and transformational coaching to help our clients create extraordinary futures! We create and hold the space that EVERYTHING is possible!

title: Specialist ENT - Leading Healthcare Sector (Dubai, Sharjah and Ajman)
description_text:
SearchPlus HR is excited to announce a unique opportunity for a Specialist in Ear, Nose, and Throat (ENT) to join a leading healthcare organization in the UAE, particularly in Dubai, Sharjah, and Ajman. This role is ideal for highly motivated professionals looking to advance their careers in a vibrant and dynamic healthcare environment.
As a Specialist ENT, you will be responsible for diagnosing and treating a range of disorders impacting the ear, nose, throat, and related structures. You will engage with patients to provide comprehensive assessments, develop effective treatment plans, and perform necessary surgical procedures. This position not only allows you to utilize your medical expertise but also to make a significant difference in the lives of your patients.
Primary Responsibilities:
Evaluate and diagnose patients presenting ENT-related concerns
Develop and implement appropriate treatment plans based on individual needs
Perform diagnostic and therapeutic procedures, including surgeries
Manage follow-up care and address any post-operative concerns
Educate patients on their conditions, treatment options, and preventive measures
Collaborate effectively with a multidisciplinary team of healthcare professionals
Maintain detailed and accurate patient records and documentation
Stay updated on the latest advancements in the field of otolaryngology
Medical degree and valid medical license in the UAE
Completion of residency training in Otolaryngology
Board certification or relevant qualifications in ENT
Proven experience in clinical ENT practice with a focus on patient care and surgical skills
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
A collaborative team player capable of working within a diverse healthcare environment
Ability to handle multiple cases and operate under pressure
Detail-oriented with strong organizational skills
Commitment to continuous education and professional development
Empathetic approach to patient interactions and a strong sense of ethical practice
ai_core_responsibilities: As a Specialist ENT, you will evaluate and diagnose patients with ENT-related concerns, develop treatment plans, and perform necessary surgical procedures. You will also manage follow-up care and educate patients on their conditions and treatment options.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess a medical degree and valid medical license in the UAE, along with completion of residency training in Otolaryngology. Proven experience in clinical ENT practice and excellent communication skills are also required.
linkedin_org_locations: Office 113, Al Khaimah Building, Port Saeed Deira, Dubai UAE Tel:  00971 4 2555465, Deira, Dubai 25570, AE

title: Full-stack Software Engineer
description_text:
Inventi is a financial application development company specializing in the financial sector. We offer innovative products like Payment Gateway, Regulatory Compliance and Verification of Payee (VoP), alongside tailored services, using cutting-edge technology to keep customers ahead.
We are looking for a Full-stack Software Engineer (Java/Kotlin/JavaScript/React) who is eager to build reliable, scalable, and secure fintech products. You’ll join a cross-functional squad, where engineers, product managers, and analytics work closely together to deliver real value to our customers. You’ll be writing production-ready code in the JVM ecosystem, shaping technical decisions, and contributing to the long-term evolution of Inventi’s platforms.
What you’ll do:
Develop and maintain core components of our payments and compliance products.
Write clean, tested, and well-structured code that directly impacts how businesses operate.
Collaborate with your product team to design, implement, and release new features.
Contribute to architectural decisions on microservices, event-driven systems, and scalability.
Continuously improve existing systems, ensuring performance, resilience, and security.
Leverage AI-assisted tooling to accelerate development and quality.
About you:
2+ years of experience in JVM languages (Java, Kotlin, or similar).
Solid knowledge of front-end technologies (JavaScript/TypeScript) and at least one modern SPA framework (React, Angular, or Vue.js).
Hands-on experience with Spring/Spring Boot, REST APIs, Maven, Git.
A passion for clean code, testing, and modern development practices (SOLID principles, design patterns, etc.).
Bonus points for experience with Kafka, Docker, Kubernetes or Google Cloud.
Curiosity and a proactive mindset: you don’t just write code, you want to understand the product and customer impact behind it.
What we offer:
Real impact in a fast growing fintech.
Continuous Learning & Growth. Access to courses, conferences, and books - we support your professional development.
Team Culture. Events, sports challenges, and team-building activities.
Flexible & Remote Work. Enjoy flexible hours and remote work options.
Private Health Insurance. Comprehensive coverage for your health and well-being.
3rd Pillar Pension Contributions. Optional contributions to boost your retirement savings.
Modern Equipment. Apple gear to help you do your best work.
Little Perks That Make a Difference. Pet-friendly office, snacks in the kitchen, and a lot of ways to take a break - from board to digital.
Competitive gross salary starting from 3000 Eur per month (depending on your experience).
🔓 Unlock your value. Lead decisions, challenge ideas, and power the infrastructure of modern finance.
Ready to make your move? Apply now or reach out directly - we’re excited to meet you!
ai_core_responsibilities: The engineer will be responsible for developing and maintaining core components of payment and compliance products, writing clean, tested code that directly impacts business operations. They will also collaborate on feature design and implementation, and contribute to architectural decisions regarding microservices and scalability.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have over 2 years of experience with JVM languages like Java or Kotlin, coupled with solid knowledge of front-end technologies such as JavaScript/TypeScript and a modern SPA framework like React. Practical experience with Spring/Spring Boot, REST APIs, Maven, and Git is also required.

title: Account Manager - Partner Success & Sales
description_text:
Bayut & dubizzle have the unique distinction of being iconic, homegrown brands with a strong presence across the seven emirates in the UAE. Connecting millions of users across the country, we are committed to delivering the best online search experience.
As part of Dubizzle Group, we are alongside some of the strongest classified brands in the market. With a collective strength of 5 brands, we have more than 123 million monthly users that trust in our dedication to providing them with the best platform for their needs
We are looking to hire an Account Manager who will work directly with used car dealers to understand their business needs, upsell relevant services, and grow mutual revenue. Your success will be measured by partner retention, service adoption, and overall business growth.
In this role, you will:
Handle Partner Relationship Management: Act as the main point of contact for a portfolio of partners, ensuring strong relationships and consistent engagement.
Identify opportunities and pitch our financing, insurance, and car evaluation services to existing partners.
Drive adoption of services that increase penetration and generate commission revenue for partners
Understand partner workflows and recommend customized service bundles that enhance their operations.
Monitor partner performance, identify trends, and take proactive steps to optimize outcomes.
Onboard new partners and train them on how to effectively use our platform and services.
Work with sales, operations, product, and customer support to deliver a smooth partner experience.
A minimum of secondary education. 
2–5 years of experience in sales, account management, or business development, ideally in automotive, fintech, SaaS, or insurance.
Familiarity with the automotive industry.
Past experience using CRM software.
Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with a proven ability to build and maintain B2B relationships.
Strong customer service attitude, work ethic, and a drive for success.
Excellent verbal communication skills in English and Arabic.
Must possess excellent data entry skills.
Results-driven mindset with comfort in a target-oriented role.
Ability to manage a sales pipeline, prioritize tasks, and close deals.
Knowledge of the automotive ecosystem is a strong plus.
Self-motivated, organized, and comfortable working independently.
A fast paced, high performing team.
Multicultural environment with over 60 different nationalities
Competitive Tax-free Salary
Comprehensive Health Insurance
Annual Air Ticket Allowance
Employee discounts at multiple vendors across the emirates
Rewards & Recognitions
Learning & Development opportunities
Bayut & dubizzle is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.
#UAEdubizzle
ai_core_responsibilities: The Account Manager will manage partner relationships, ensuring strong engagement and identifying opportunities for upselling services. They will also onboard new partners and work with various teams to enhance the partner experience.

title: Senior Azure DevOps Engineer UKIME (Dentons Business Services EMEA)
description_text:
Introduction
Dentons Business Services EMEA serves as the operational backbone of Dentons, supporting the world’s largest law firm in delivering exceptional service to clients across Europe, the Middle East, and Africa.
As a crucial component of Dentons' global network, our EMEA business services team plays a key role in driving efficiency, innovation, and collaboration. 
At Dentons Business Services EMEA, we are committed to excellence in supporting legal professionals with cutting-edge solutions. Our dynamic and diverse team collaborates seamlessly to provide a wide range of services, including finance, IT, human resources, marketing, and more. We pride ourselves on fostering a culture of continuous improvement and adaptability.
Department Overview
The IT Operations & Infrastructure team designs, delivers, and maintains scalable, secure, and modern cloud platforms that underpin the firm’s digital services. Operating across the UK and Warsaw, the team drives cloud transformation, automation, and DevOps adoption across Dentons UK and Middle East LLP.
Role purpose
The Senior Azure DevOps Engineer will support the design, implementation, and optimisation of cloud infrastructure and deployment pipelines on Microsoft Azure, playing a key role in the firm’s cloud migration and technology modernisation strategy.
This is a senior, hands-on engineering role for someone who can combine deep technical expertise with leadership - guiding teams through transformation, embedding DevOps practices, and helping the organisation fully leverage the benefits of cloud-native technology.
Accountabilities and Responsibilities
Cloud Architecture, Migration & Modernisation
Working with the wider team, plan and deliver the migration of applications and services from on-premises or legacy environments into Azure, ensuring secure, scalable, and efficient architectures.
Design and implement Azure-based infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code (IaC) primarily with Terraform.
Partner with architecture and development teams to evolve existing platforms toward cloud-native patterns and DevOps maturity.
Optimise infrastructure for performance, scalability, cost efficiency, and operational resilience.
CI/CD and Automation
Build and maintain automated CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, or similar tools.
Automate cloud provisioning, configuration, and deployment processes across multiple environments.
Embed testing, security validation, and compliance checks within delivery pipelines.
Continuously improving release processes, reducing deployment time and increasing reliability.
Security, Networking & Monitoring
Design and manage secure, high-performance cloud networking — including VNets, NSGs, VPNs, firewalls, ExpressRoute, and Azure AD.
Implement monitoring, observability, and logging using Azure Monitor, Log Analytics, and Application Insights.
Enforce governance and security standards across environments in line with industry best practice.
Leadership & Team Enablement
Act as a technical leader within the Cloud and Infrastructure team, setting direction for cloud engineering standards, tooling, and processes.
Mentor and guide engineers and developers, helping them adopt modern DevOps practices and understand cloud principles.
Lead by example — demonstrating how to architect and implement solutions that are both technically robust and aligned with business goals.
Foster collaboration between infrastructure, security, and development teams to build a shared DevOps culture.
Contribute to strategic planning for cloud migration roadmaps and modernisation projects, providing technical insight and leadership throughout execution.
Technical Skills
Proven experience designing, building, and supporting Microsoft Azure infrastructure (compute, storage, networking, and security).
Strong expertise in Terraform and Infrastructure as Code (IaC) practices.
Hands-on experience with application and data migrations to Azure.
Proficiency in scripting/programming languages such as PowerShell, Python, Bash, or C#.
Solid understanding of networking fundamentals (TCP/IP, DNS, VPN, routing, load balancing, firewalls).
Demonstrated ability to design and manage CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps or equivalent tools.
Experience with containerisation and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes, AKS).
Familiarity with monitoring and alerting frameworks in cloud environments.
Understanding of cloud governance, cost management, and compliance frameworks.
Leadership & Personal Attributes
Experience leading or mentoring technical teams through cloud migration or DevOps transformation.
Strong communicator who can influence, guide, and bring others on the journey of change.
Skilled at bridging technical and business priorities; able to articulate value and trade-offs clearly.
Collaborative mindset — thrives on cross-functional teamwork and knowledge sharing.
Analytical and pragmatic problem solver, comfortable navigating ambiguity in complex environments.
Proactive, adaptable, and outcome-focused, with a passion for modern engineering practices.
Preferred Qualifications and Experience
Microsoft Certified: AZ-400 (DevOps Engineer Expert) and/or AZ-305 (Solutions Architect Expert).
Proven experience leading enterprise-scale cloud migration projects.
Familiarity with hybrid and multi-cloud environments.
Experience with serverless and event-driven architectures.
Knowledge of cloud cost optimisation and performance tuning techniques.
Language Capabilities
We are a truly global law firm and as such, always welcome hearing from those with foreign language capabilities.
Equal Opportunities
Dentons is committed to providing equal opportunities for all. We welcome applications from candidates with disabilities and support those in the workplace who have a disability.
Inclusion, Diversity & Equity
Essential to our success as a global law firm is our ability to attract and retain the best talent from a diverse range of backgrounds. We want a work environment where everyone can reach their potential and we have an inclusive culture which respects individual differences.
We undertake and support a number of internal and external initiatives aimed at increasing diversity within the profession and we encourage all our partners and staff to get involved. We welcome you to learn more about inclusion, diversity and equity at Dentons.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Senior Azure DevOps Engineer will support the design, implementation, and optimization of cloud infrastructure and deployment pipelines on Microsoft Azure, driving the firm’s cloud migration and modernization strategy. Key duties include planning and delivering application migrations, designing Azure infrastructure using Terraform, and building automated CI/CD pipelines using tools like Azure DevOps.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess proven experience designing and supporting Microsoft Azure infrastructure, with strong expertise in Terraform and Infrastructure as Code practices, alongside hands-on experience with CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps. The role also requires technical leadership skills to guide teams through transformation and foster a shared DevOps culture.
linkedin_org_locations: St. Vincent and The Grenadines, VC
linkedin_org_description: Across over 80 countries, Dentons helps you grow, protect, operate and finance your organization by providing uniquely global and deeply local legal solutions. Polycentric, purpose-driven and committed to inclusion, diversity, equity and sustainability, we focus on what matters most to you.

title: Υπάλληλος Υποδοχής A' Ι Receptionist - Χαλκιδική
locations_derived: Kassandra Municipal Unit, Macedonia and Thrace, Greece
description_text:
Πρωτοπορώντας τα τελευταία 45 χρόνια, ο Όμιλος Mitsis είναι η μεγαλύτερη ιδιόκτητη ξενοδοχειακή αλυσίδα στην Ελλάδα, καθοδηγούμενος από την πελατοκεντρική του φιλοσοφία, την οικογενειακή φροντίδα και την αυθεντική ελληνική του ταυτότητα.
Με 24 ξενοδοχεία,8,000 δωμάτια και πάνω από 5,000 εργαζόμενουςσε 9 προορισμούς σε όλη την Ελλάδα και συγκεκριμένα στην Αθήνα, τον Πειραιά, την Κέρκυρα, την Κρήτη, τα Καμένα Βούρλα, την Κω, τη Ρόδο, την Σαντορίνη και τη Χαλκιδική, ο Όμιλος προσφέρει ένα πλούσιο μείγμα φιλοξενίας με εξαιρετικές υπηρεσίες, μοναδικές τοποθεσίες, άψογες εγκαταστάσεις, εκλεπτυσμένη γαστρονομία και ένα ευρύ φάσμα επιλογών και εμπειριών στους πελάτες του.
Μέσα από ένα οικογενειακό και ευχάριστο περιβάλλον εργασίας μεταμορφώνουμε κάθε επισκέπτη μας σε επίτιμο φιλοξενούμενο, προσφέροντας αξέχαστες αναμνήσεις ζωής!
Ο Όμιλος Mitsis προσφέρει νέες θέσεις εργασίας στο ξενοδοχείο του Alexander the Great στη Χαλκιδική:
Υπάλληλος Υποδοχής - ΧΑΛΚΙΔΙΚΗ
Περιοχή: Χαλκιδική
Τύπος Απασχόλησης: Εποχιακή/Πλήρης 
Ref: HO / RECAΗ
Σκοπός 
Ως Υπάλληλος Υποδοχής θα παρέχετε υπηρεσίες στο χώρο της ρεσεψιόν σύμφωνα με τα πρότυπα του Ομίλου, θα διατηρείτε καθαρό και τακτοποιημένο το χώρο εργασίας και θα αναθέτετε εργασίες στους συναδέλφους σας στη βάρδια σας, σύμφωνα με τις οδηγίες του άμεσου προϊσταμένου σας. 
Αρμοδιότητες 
Διαχειρίζεται τις αφίξεις και αναχωρήσεις των φιλοξενούμενων. 
Εξυπηρετεί τους φιλοξενούμενους και διαχειρίζεται τα όποια προβλήματα ή επιθυμίες. 
Διαχειρίζεται το τηλεφωνικό κέντρο.
Διαχειρίζεται την ηλεκτρονική αλληλογραφία. 
Διαχειρίζεται το ταμείο της υποδοχής.
Ενημερώνει και ενημερώνεται μέσω της Προϊσταμένης Ορόφων και του Προϊσταμένου Συντήρησης για τα όποια προβλήματα στα δωμάτια φιλοξενουμένων.
Δεξιότητες 
Επαγγελματισμός, Αξιοπιστία & Υπευθυνότητα. 
Ενσυναίσθηση. 
Προσαρμοστικότητα. 
Συνεργασία & Ομαδικότητα.
Απαιτήσεις
Τουριστική εκπαίδευση/δίπλωμα/ Πτυχίο/ Σπουδές θα θεωρηθεί επιπλέον προσόν.
Εμπειρία σε 2+ έτη σε αντίστοιχο πόστο, ιδανικά σε 5* ξενοδοχειακό περιβάλλον. 
Γνώση της αγγλικής. 
Γνώση δεύτερης γλώσσας θεωρούνται επιπλέον προσόν. 
Άριστη γνώση ξενοδοχειακού προγράμματος Protel. 
Άριστη γνώση Η/Υ (Word, Excel). 
Παροχές
Τι προσφέρουμε 
Ανταγωνιστικό πακέτο αποδοχών. 
Εργασία σε έναν οικογενειακό όμιλο με ανθρωποκεντρική προσέγγιση και σεβασμό προς το περιβάλλον και την κοινωνία. 
Διαρκή & εξατομικευμένη εκπαίδευση. 
Προοπτικές επαγγελματικής εξέλιξης σε έναν συνεχώς αναπτυσσόμενο όμιλο. 
Διαμονή με συγκατοίκηση. 
Πλήρης Διατροφή. 
Δημιούργησε την δική σου επαγγελματική ιστορία #createyourcareerstory και γίνε μέλος μιας ομάδας 5.000 μελών στα Mitsis Hotels!
Για όλες τις αιτήσεις και τα στοιχεία που θα υποβληθούν, θα τηρηθεί απόλυτη εμπιστευτικότητα.
Μπορείτε να προωθήσετε το βιογραφικό σας, ακολουθώντας το link
Μπορείς να μάθεις περισσότερες πληροφορίες για τον όμιλο Mitsis ακολουθώντας τα παρακάτω link :
https://www.mitsis.com/en
https://www.mitsis.com/en/career/form?utm_source=website&utm_medium=career_page&utm_campaign=career-form

With 24 hotels in our portfolio in Athens, Chalkidiki, Corfu, Crete, Kamena Vourla, Kos, Rhodes, Piraeus and Santorini, we aspire to stand out as the preferred portfolio of hotels & resorts in Greece offering excellent service, great locations, impeccable facilities, sophisticated dining and a broad spectrum of options for our clientele.

title: Specialist Endocrinology - Government Healthcare Sector
locations_alt_raw: Al Ain, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates
locations_derived: Al Ain, Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
description_text:
SearchPlus HR is a leading recruitment consultancy specializing in healthcare staffing solutions. We are currently seeking a highly qualified Specialist in Endocrinology to join a prominent government healthcare sector. In this pivotal role, you will be responsible for diagnosing, managing, and treating patients with various endocrine disorders. Your expertise will contribute to the improvement of public health and ensure that the community receives high-quality medical care.
Key Responsibilities:
Provide expert consultations in the diagnosis and treatment of endocrine disorders.
Conduct comprehensive medical assessments and physical examinations.
Order and interpret laboratory tests and imaging studies relevant to endocrine health.
Develop and implement individualized treatment plans for patients.
Educate patients and families on managing endocrine conditions and promoting healthy lifestyles.
Collaborate with interdisciplinary teams to ensure comprehensive patient care.
Stay updated on best practices and advancements in endocrinology.
Medical degree with a valid license to practice as a Specialist in Endocrinology.
Board certification in endocrinology is preferred.
A minimum of 3-5 years of clinical experience in endocrinology, ideally within the government healthcare sector.
Strong knowledge of endocrine disorders, treatment protocols, and patient management.
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills to effectively interact with patients and healthcare teams.
Demonstrated ability to work independently as well as part of a collaborative team.
Commitment to continuous professional development and adherence to medical ethics.
Benefits are Good Monthly Salary + Incentives + Standard family benefits like accommodation, Air ticket, Medical insurance, and Education allowance.

title: Interim Head of Finance
locations_alt_raw: Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa
locations_derived: Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa
description_text:
Houst is hiring an Interim Head of Finance to take ownership of group wide financial management during a period of change and scale. You will lead reporting, compliance, forecasting, and financial discipline across multiple jurisdictions, while staying hands on in the detail.
This is a player/manager role, and suited to candidates with prior people management experience in a hands-on operational environment. 
This role provides financial backbone and credibility while the wider finance leadership structure is rebuilt. You will have visibility, influence, and real ownership, without carrying the entire strategic burden alone. 
Candidates must have a degree in Finance, Accounting, or a related field, and hold a recognised professional qualification such as CIMA, ACA, ACCA, CCMA, or an MBA. We are looking for individuals with client-side experience in a management capacity, ideally in a global, tech-enabled startup or scaleup environment. Practice-only experience will not be considered; this role requires hands-on operational and strategic exposure to running finance in a growing business.
What you will be doing
Own monthly management accounts, reporting packs, and variance analysis for the group
Manage multi entity consolidation and intercompany accounting
Oversee statutory reporting, audits, and tax compliance across jurisdictions
Maintain strong financial controls, policies, and documentation
Lead budgeting and forecasting cycles in collaboration with leadership
Provide clear financial insight to support decision making, pricing, and cost control
Manage and mentor junior finance team members where applicable
Act as the main finance point of contact for senior stakeholders
Partner closely with Operations and Commercial teams to improve margins and performance
Step into operational finance work when needed, no ivory tower behaviour here
Degree in Accounting or Finance
Professional qualification such as SAICA, SAIPA, ACCA, CIMA, or similar
Exposure to FP&A, unit economics, and commercial finance
5 plus years experience in financial management or group reporting roles
Strong knowledge of IFRS and compliance requirements
Experience with multi entity and multi currency businesses
Advanced Excel or Google Sheets capability
Xero experience required
Comfortable operating in fast growth, high change environments
Clear communicator who can explain numbers to non finance humans

Essential experience includes client-side management in a growing business, preferably in a global, tech-enabled startup or scaleup, with strong knowledge of IFRS and multi-currency operations.

description_text:
Deskripsi Pekerjaan
Online Admin bertanggung jawab untuk mengelola aktivitas operasional online sehari-hari, termasuk administrasi pesanan, komunikasi dengan customer, pengelolaan pengiriman, serta memastikan setiap customer mendapatkan pelayanan yang ramah, sopan, dan profesional.
Tanggung Jawab

* Membuat dan mengirimkan resi / bukti pengiriman kepada customer
* Memonitor status pengiriman dan menindaklanjuti jika terjadi kendala
* Menangani keluhan, komplain, atau masalah customer terkait pesanan dan pengiriman dengan baik dan solutif
* Mengelola data penjualan dan administrasi pesanan
* Koordinasi dengan tim internal (gudang, kurir, atau tim terkait) untuk penyelesaian masalah
* Menjaga kerapihan dan akurasi data administrasi digital
* Pendidikan minimal SMA/SMK
* Pengalaman sebagai admin online / customer handling menjadi nilai tambah
* Terbiasa menggunakan WhatsApp Business dan/atau marketplace
* Mampu mengoperasikan komputer (Google Sheets / Microsoft Excel dasar)
* Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik, ramah, dan sopan
* Sabar, teliti, dan bertanggung jawab
* Mampu menangani komplain dengan tenang dan profesional
* Mampu bekerja dengan target dan deadline
Keahlian yang Dibutuhkan
* Administrasi & data entry
* Komunikasi dengan customer
* Problem solving dasar
* Monitoring pesanan & pengiriman
* Manajemen waktu
* Multitasking
ai_core_responsibilities: The Online Admin is responsible for managing daily online operational activities, including order administration, customer communication, and shipment coordination, ensuring friendly, polite, and professional customer service. Key duties involve responding to customer chats, providing clear information, processing incoming orders, tracking shipments, and resolving customer complaints effectively.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have a minimum of a high school education and experience as an online admin or in customer handling is a plus. Essential requirements include proficiency with WhatsApp Business and/or marketplaces, basic computer skills (Google Sheets/Excel), strong communication, patience, meticulousness, responsibility, and the ability to handle complaints calmly while meeting targets and deadlines.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description_text:
Thank you for considering the Machine Learning Engineer position at Reveal Health Tech. We are an early-stage IT startup based in the US and India, focused on leveraging technology to deliver transformative healthcare solutions. 
Location: Bengaluru, India 
About the Applied AI Lab 
The Applied AI Lab is an internal R&D team at Reveal dedicated to identifying high-impact problems in healthcare, life sciences, and adjacent verticals—and transforming those insights into repeatable, IP-driven AI solutions. 
We operate as a nimble product studio within the company: researching emerging technologies, rapidly prototyping AI and ML-powered tools, and building foundational infrastructure to support long-term product plays. Our output ranges from sandbox-ready MVPs to reusable components and SaaS-aligned platforms. Our team is multi-disciplinary—engineering, design, research, and business—and we work closely with client-facing and go-to-market teams to validate our ideas in the real world. 
About the Role 
We’re looking for a Machine Learning Engineer to join the Applied AI Lab and play a hands-on role in building intelligent, scalable, and production-minded ML systems. You’ll work at the intersection of rapid prototyping and product-minded ML—contributing to both short-cycle innovation and long-term platform stability. 
This is an ideal opportunity for someone who enjoys wearing multiple hats, thrives in fast-moving environments, and is excited about shaping how AI can drive meaningful change in healthcare and life sciences. 
Key Responsibilities 
Contribute to solving business problems with cutting-edge AI solutions and innovate on ways to improve cost-efficiency and reliability of those solutions 
Collaborate with Lab lead, product designers, researchers, and architects to scope MVPs and define core capabilities. 
Build modular, reusable components for GenAI solutions or traditional ML model training, evaluation, and deployment 
Design and develop AI tools that can be called via API or through batch transformations for large datasets. 
Implement end-to-end solutions for batch and real-time algorithms along with tooling around monitoring, logging, automated testing, and performance testing. 
Develop production-grade solutions following software engineering best practices 
Support experimentation, A/B testing, and fine-tuning cycles with the team 
Research and stay up-to-date on the latest advancements in generative AI technologies and methodologies. 
Document architectures, processes, and technical decisions. 
Please note that while you do not need to be an expert in every area, being familiar with most of the following is important. We are looking for someone who can effectively integrate everything, with team support to fill any gaps. 
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Data Science, or a related field. 
5+ years of experience in a similar AI/ML engineer role. 
Strong knowledge of Python, SQL, and additional data processing languages. 
Proficiency in basic machine learning concepts and methods, especially those related to GenAI and NLP. 
Experience using open-source LLMs. 
Proficiency in software engineering fundamentals (unit testing, modular code development, CI/CD, etc.) 
Proficiency in core ML/AI frameworks (e.g. scikit-learn, PyTorch, TensorFlow, HuggingFace) 
Familiarity with cloud-based tools (AWS and Azure), containerization (Docker), and version control (Git) 
Experience with ETL tools (e.g., Apache Spark, Airflow), Pyspark, data modeling/warehousing and CI/CD tools is a plus. 
Experience with vector embeddings, multimodal data, or agentic workflows 
Knowledge of LLM fine-tuning, RAG pipelines, and/or hybrid retrieval techniques 
Exposure to healthcare or life science datasets (EHR, claims, clinical trials, etc.) 
Experience working in startup or lab-like R&D environments 
Strong communication skills and comfort working in cross-functional teams 
How you will enrich us? 
Energetic and enthusiastic 
Autonomous and self-motivated 
Growth mindset 
Embraces challenges 
Building new things gets your blood pumping! 
Curiosity and deep interest in the world 
Challenges the status quo constructively 
What do you get in return? 
Be part of a high-impact team shaping the future of our IP and product innovation strategy 
Work with cutting-edge technologies in a focused but flexible lab environment 
Help define how applied AI can solve real-world problems in complex, high-stakes domains 
Grow with a small, mission-aligned team with executive support and long-term vision 
Industry best compensation and benefits 
Next Steps 
Send us your updated CV - if you can mention how you have enriched your previous organisation in a cover letter, that would be great! 
If we find your profile suitable, we will have our Talent personnel reach out to you to understand your profile/interests and how best we can align mutually. 
Finally, you would have a chat with our founder to understand more about us and see if this is the right next career move!
