Key tasks include building modular components for GenAI or traditional ML, designing API-callable AI tools, and implementing end-to-end solutions with monitoring and testing.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates need a Bachelor's or Master's degree in a relevant field and over 5 years of experience in an AI/ML engineering role, requiring strong proficiency in Python, SQL, and core ML concepts, especially those related to GenAI and NLP. Familiarity with software engineering fundamentals, ML frameworks, and cloud tools is essential.

title: Junior Accountant
description_text:
Platinumlist.net, a pioneering leader in the online event guide and ticketing solution industry, has been revolutionizing the event landscape in the Gulf region since 2009. As the largest ticketing provider in the GCC, we proudly serve an extensive array of events across the United Arab Emirates, Saudi Arabia, Oman, Bahrain, Qatar, and Kuwait from our Dubai-based headquarters.
Your Role: As our operations continue to expand, we are looking for a detail-oriented and motivated Junior Accountant to join our growing Finance team in Dubai. You will play a key role in supporting daily financial operations and maintaining accurate records to ensure seamless and timely reporting. This is an excellent opportunity for recent graduates or junior professionals to gain hands-on experience and grow within a dynamic finance team.
Location: Dubai, On-site
Key Responsibilities:
Support daily bookkeeping activities and ensure transactions are recorded accurately.
Assist in reconciling bank statements and accounts payable/receivable.
Maintain and organize financial documentation and ensure records are kept up to date.
Participate in month-end closing processes and assist with financial reports.
Work closely with the Finance Manager and Senior Accountants to support internal audits and financial reviews.
Manage data entry tasks and ensure accuracy and consistency of financial information.
Key Requirements:
At least 1–3 years of accounting experience.
Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, or Mathematics is mandatory.
Strong attention to detail and organisational skills.
Ability to handle multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment.
Basic knowledge of accounting principles and tools (Excel, ERP systems, etc.).
Fluent in English - written and spoken.
Willingness to learn, take initiative, and grow within the role.
Preferred Attributes:
Strong time management and prioritization skills.
Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
Excellent interpersonal skills and a proactive attitude.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Junior Accountant will support daily bookkeeping activities, ensuring accurate transaction recording and assisting with bank statement and accounts payable/receivable reconciliation. They will also participate in month-end closing processes and help prepare financial reports.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess 1–3 years of accounting experience and a mandatory Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, or Mathematics. Essential attributes include strong attention to detail, organizational skills, basic knowledge of accounting tools like Excel, and fluency in English.

We empower organisers with advanced ticketing technology, marketing tools, and data insights to maximize reach and revenue. From live entertainment to travel experiences, Platinumlist connects customers with top events while ensuring a smooth and secure booking process. 

Our platform simplifies ticket sales, access control, and audience engagement.

linkedin_org_description:
We are a 100% renewable energy Group with the purpose of creating sustainable value from the sun, wind, and forests, for the benefit of society, shareholders, and employees.

Our operations span across 20 geographies in Europe, North America, and Asia, in three core business areas:

- Sustainable Biomass – producing energy from forest residues and urban waste wood through 7 power plants in Portugal and the UK.

- Utility-Scale – developing large-scale wind, solar PV, and storage projects in several European markets, the USA, and Japan, with a total pipeline of 9.3 GW.

- Distributed Generation – focusing on B2B solutions for the installation, maintenance, and financing of solar PV for individual and collective self-consumption, as well as electric mobility, LED, rooftops, carports, and batteries, in several geographies across Europe and Indonesia.

Greenvolt Group is increasingly recognized in the global market as a major player in the promotion and development of renewable energy solutions, with more than 900 employees from over 40 different nationalities worldwide.

title: Specialist Colon & Rectal Surgeon (Private Healthcare)
description_text:
SearchPlus HR is thrilled to present an excellent opportunity for a Specialist Colon & Rectal Surgeon to join our distinguished private healthcare team. In this pivotal role, you will provide specialized surgical care for patients with disorders of the colon, rectum, and anus, ensuring high standards of patient care and safety.
As a Specialist Colon & Rectal Surgeon, you will utilize your expertise to assess, diagnose, and treat a variety of colorectal conditions. Your responsibilities will involve performing advanced surgical procedures, collaborating with a dedicated healthcare team, and guiding patients through their treatment journeys in a private healthcare setting.
Key Responsibilities:
Perform detailed patient evaluations, including thorough medical histories and clinical assessments.
Order and interpret diagnostic tests, such as colonoscopy and imaging studies, to aid in diagnosis.
Develop individualized treatment plans based on clinical findings and patient preferences.
Execute a range of surgical procedures, utilizing both traditional and minimally invasive techniques.
Deliver comprehensive pre-operative and post-operative care to ensure optimal patient recovery.
Educate patients and their families about surgical options, risks, and post-operative care.
Collaborate with other healthcare professionals to coordinate high-quality patient care.
Maintain meticulous medical records and documentation as per compliance standards.
Engage in ongoing professional development to remain at the forefront of colorectal surgery advancements.
Uphold the highest ethical standards and respect patient confidentiality at all times.
Medical degree (MD or equivalent) with a current medical license to practice.
Completion of residency in General Surgery and fellowship training in Colon and Rectal Surgery.
Proven experience in diagnosing and treating a wide range of colorectal diseases.
High level of proficiency in performing complex surgical procedures related to colon and rectal health.
Strong communication, interpersonal, and patient management skills.
Ability to work effectively within a collaborative and multidisciplinary healthcare team.
Detail-oriented with excellent organizational skills for managing patient records.
Commitment to patient-centered care and a passion for ongoing education.
Adherence to all health and safety regulations and ethical practices in clinical settings.
Working Time is Full Time.
Salary is AED 45K TO AED 90K 
Benefits are Good Monthly Salary + Incentives + Standard family benefits like accommodation, Air ticket, Medical insurance, and Education allowance.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Specialist Colon & Rectal Surgeon will perform detailed patient evaluations and execute a range of surgical procedures. They will also collaborate with healthcare professionals to ensure high-quality patient care.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have a medical degree, a current medical license, and completion of residency and fellowship training in Colon and Rectal Surgery. Proven experience in diagnosing and treating colorectal diseases is essential.

title: Materials Controller
description_text:
Rentokil Initial:
Rentokil Initial is an international business services company employing over 58,600 colleagues across 91 countries.
We strive to protect people and enhance lives, for example by controlling pests, improving hygiene and improving interior spaces with plants and scenting.
We are experts in the fields we operate in, investing in training, science, innovation and technology.
Listening and acting on feedback is part of our culture to support colleagues and our customers. Rentokil Initial regards equality and fairness as a fundamental right of all of its colleagues.
We live our values of Service, Relationships and Teamwork which were identified by our colleagues across the world.
Find out more on https://careers.rentokil-initial.com/
Your day-to-day responsibilities will include:
Plan and co-ordinate the incoming goods, storage and dispatch of items in a timely and efficient manner
Ensures effective, safe, accurate and timely stock management to include space allocation, stock transfer and dealing with non-confirming product
Works closely with the Purchasing department to ensure adequate stock levels
Organises and ensures accurate and periodic cycle counts and stock takes
Responsible for ensuring quality of product and service within the Warehouse is maintained at the highest possible standards for the customer
Ensures quality procedures and targets are strictly followed
Implements company Health and Safety Policy, ensures safe working conditions and practices within the Warehouse
Represents the department on the Health & Safety Committee as required
Ensures cleanliness and order of stocks and warehouse facility
Performs any other reasonable duties which may be required by management from time to time
Do you have what it takes? If you want to be considered for this role you will need:
Candidate must possess at least a Bachelor's/College Degree , Any Course
At least 1 year(s) of working experience in Logistics, Warehousing Management and Operations.
Skills required: Inventory Management, Logistic Planning, Analysis and Forecasting of Goods from ordering to shipment & Delivery 
Applicants must be willing to work in Brgy. Kalawaan, Pasig City
Full-Time position(s) available.
Are you interested? Here's what you can expect when you join us...
Benefits From Start Date:
HMO (Health Insurance)
Paternity / Maternity Leave (if applicable)
Benefits after 6 months of continuous work and pass the performance evaluation:
Annual pay increase
Group Personal Accident Insurance
Group Term Life Insurance
Vacation Leave
Sick Leave (with cash conversion)
Birthday Leave
Matrimonial Leave
Bereavement Leave
Paid Non working holidays
13th Month Pay & other Statutory benefits
Rice benefit
Rentokil Initial believes in supporting all employees to provide equal opportunities and avoid discrimination. We also place emphasis on workplace diversity which means that we are serious about creating an inclusive environment that accepts each individual's differences, embraces their strengths and provides opportunities for all colleagues to achieve their full potential.
Do you love to provide a valued professional service throughout your community? Do you feel like you could do the job well? Apply for the role today!
ai_core_responsibilities: The role involves planning and coordinating the efficient flow of incoming goods, storage, and dispatch, while ensuring accurate and safe stock management, including space allocation and stock transfers. Responsibilities also include working with Purchasing to maintain adequate stock levels and ensuring high standards of product quality and warehouse safety procedures are followed.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must hold at least a Bachelor's/College Degree in any course and possess a minimum of one year of relevant working experience in Logistics, Warehousing Management, and Operations. Applicants must also be willing to work full-time at the specified location in Pasig City.

title: Technical Lead - EU RDI Proposals
description_text:
Our Research, Development & Innovation (RDI) department is growing and we are looking for a Technical Lead – EU RDI Proposals, to join our RDI’s Innovation Funding & Ecosystem Development (IFED) team. 
The RDI Department has recently established the iQnovus Innovation Center, which coordinates Research and Innovation activities not only for Uni Systems but also for other Quest Group companies (ACS, Info Quest Technologies, Quest Energy, and BriQ). The Center has a strong portfolio of EU funding proposals and awarded projects in various domains, incl. smart cities, energy, mobility, industry 4.0, e-gov, cultural heritage, health, etc., working very collaboratively with academic/research institutes, other companies, start-ups and non-profits across Europe in submitting joint proposals to various EU funding programmes (e.g., Horizon Europe, Digital Europe, Creative Europe, etc.). 
What will you be bringing to the team?
Our UniQue people come from a variety of different backgrounds and industries, with different skillsets and approaches, but they have one thing in common: a passion for technology and innovation! 
In this role, you will lead and represent the company’s technical contribution in the development of European R&D proposals (e.g. Horizon Europe, Digital Europe), with selective involvement in technical oversight during project implementation.
More specifically, for the Technical Lead – EU RDI Proposals position, we expect you to:
EU Proposal Development Phase 
Collaborate with the rest of the IFED team to identify appropriate technical roles that may fit to specific call topics and EU funding proposal concepts that the company is invited to participate in. 
Represent the company as a technical expert in EU R&D proposals, with primary focus on platform development, integration, data management, or interoperability activities.
Secure and negotiate ownership of technical roles for our company in EU R&D proposals.
Define, present, and refine the scope of the company’s technical roles throughout the proposal writing phase (orally and in writing). 
Drafting and reviewing proposal text relating to the company’s technical work packages, tasks, architectures, methodologies, etc., to ensure clarity, accuracy, and competitiveness.
Ensure compliance of role description in the proposal with call requirements, evaluation criteria, and alignment with the rest of the technical partners in the consortia the company participates.
Liaise and collaborate effectively with our innovation ecosystem partners and external partners across international consortia, to understand their profiles, capabilities, and roles. 
Project Implementation Phase 
Collaborate with internal teams (project management) to support alignment between commitments made in proposal phase and project implementation.
Contribute to the technical delivery and implementation of selected funded projects, as required. 
Author and/or review technical deliverables associated with Tasks or Work Packages that the company leads, ensuring they abide by EU evaluation criteria and the company’s high standards.
Your experience, skillset and qualifications are going to help you succeed in this position, moving forward. We would like you to have:
Academic Excellence: MSc or PhD in Computer Science, Electrical/Computer Engineering, Data Science, or a related STEM field.
EU Funding Track Record: Demonstrated experience in drafting technical sections for proposals in Horizon Europe, Digital Europe or similar EU funding programs.
Technical Implementation: Proven experience in at least two completed EU projects, specifically in System Architecture, Platform Development, Integration, Data Management or any other related technical task. 
Communication Mastery: Professional-level English (written and verbal) with the ability to "translate" complex technical stacks into compelling proposal text.
Negotiation & Influence: Ability to defend the company's technical interests in multidisciplinary meetings.
Analytical Thinking: Strong analytical, problem-solving and organizational skills, with attention to detail.
Agility: Flexibility and a strong eagerness to learn, adapt, and take on new challenges
People-first approach and open environment to express your ideas
A hybrid work model designed for true work-life balance.
High-end corporate laptop and full remote-office setup.
Our UniQue IT people are the most valuable part of Uni Systems; their knowledge and experience have made us the leading and reliable systems integrator of today and have contributed to our steady financial growth. We have created and are maintaining a stable working environment for our employees, with countless opportunities to innovate and thrive. Our work culture recognizes our UniQue IT people and supports the free sharing of ideas and the flow of information via open communication while appreciating and effectively utilizing the talents, skills, and perspectives of each employee.
At Uni Systems, we are providing equal employment opportunities and banning any form of discrimination on grounds of gender, religion, race, color, nationality, disability, social class, political beliefs, age, marital status, sexual orientation or any other characteristics. Take a look at our Diversity, Equality & Inclusion Policy for more information.
Interviews are expected to start in March 2026.
ai_core_responsibilities: The role involves leading and representing the company's technical contribution in developing European R&D proposals, such as Horizon Europe and Digital Europe, with selective technical oversight during project implementation. Specific duties include defining technical scope, drafting proposal text, and ensuring compliance with call requirements and partner alignment.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess an MSc or PhD in a related STEM field and have demonstrated experience drafting technical sections for EU funding proposals like Horizon Europe. Essential qualifications include proven experience in at least two completed EU projects focusing on areas like System Architecture or Platform Development, alongside professional-level English communication skills.

linkedin_org_description:
We see IT differently 
Uni Systems, a distinguished member of the Quest Group, has served as a trusted ICT provider to enterprises and organisations across the European market for over six decades. Established in Greece in 1964 as the nation’s first IT company, we have been supporting our clients with commitment and expertise. Our growth has been underpinned by long-term client relationships, a comprehensive solutions portfolio, strategic partnerships, and the experience of our dedicated professionals.
With a workforce exceeding 1,800 specialised ICT experts in key subsidiaries, branches in Athens, Barcelona, Brussels, Bucharest, Luxembourg, Milan, and Limassol, and operations in more than 20 countries, we effectively address the complex requirements of European and international organisations. 
Our primary focus is enabling our clients’ digital transformation journeys, and we are unwavering in our dedication to this objective.

title: Consultant Oral Medicine- University Healthcare Group
description_text:
SearchPlus HR is proud to partner with the University Healthcare Group in the search for a dedicated Consultant in Oral Medicine. This vital role will involve providing specialized care and expertise in the diagnosis and treatment of a wide range of oral health conditions.
As a Consultant in Oral Medicine, you will be responsible for conducting comprehensive evaluations of patients, interpreting diagnostic tests, and developing effective treatment plans tailored to individual needs. You will collaborate with a dynamic team of healthcare professionals, ensuring that patients receive the highest level of care and education regarding their oral health.
Key Responsibilities
Conduct thorough assessments and examinations of patients with oral health issues
Order and interpret diagnostic tests to inform treatment strategies
Develop individualized treatment plans based on patient-specific conditions
Provide patient education on oral health maintenance and preventive care
Collaborate with interdisciplinary teams to ensure comprehensive patient healthcare
Maintain accurate and up-to-date patient records in accordance with healthcare regulations
Engage in continuing education to stay current with developments in oral medicine
Qualifications
Doctor of Dental Medicine (DMD) or Doctor of Dental Surgery (DDS) with specialization in Oral Medicine
Active and valid dental license for practice
Proven clinical experience in oral medicine or a closely related field
Strong knowledge of oral pathology, treatment protocols, and current practices
Exceptional communication skills to effectively interact with patients and health professionals
Ability to prioritize patient care and manage various cases simultaneously
Proficient in working both independently and as part of a collaborative team
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills in clinical scenarios
DMD or DDS with specialization in Oral Medicine
Active and valid dental license
Clinical experience in oral medicine or related field
Knowledge of oral pathology and treatment protocols
Exceptional communication skills
Ability to prioritize and manage multiple cases
Collaborative team player
Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities
Private Health Insurance
Training & Development
Performance Bonus
ai_core_responsibilities: The Consultant in Oral Medicine will conduct comprehensive evaluations of patients, interpret diagnostic tests, and develop individualized treatment plans. Collaboration with a dynamic team of healthcare professionals is essential to ensure high-quality patient care.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must hold a Doctor of Dental Medicine (DMD) or Doctor of Dental Surgery (DDS) with specialization in Oral Medicine and possess an active dental license. Proven clinical experience in oral medicine or a related field is required, along with strong communication and analytical skills.

title: Cardiac Electrophysiology - Private Healthcare Sector
description_text:
SearchPlus HR is excited to offer a unique opportunity for a skilled Cardiac Electrophysiologist to join our dynamic team within the private healthcare sector. In this role, you will focus on diagnosing and treating heart rhythm disorders, making significant contributions to patient care and clinical outcomes.
As a Cardiac Electrophysiologist, your responsibilities will include conducting comprehensive electrophysiological studies, performing catheter ablations, and managing the implantation of cutting-edge cardiac devices such as pacemakers and defibrillators. You will work closely with a team of healthcare professionals to develop and implement individualized treatment plans aimed at improving our patients' quality of life.
Key Responsibilities:
Evaluate patient histories and conduct thorough cardiac assessments to diagnose arrhythmias.
Perform electrophysiological studies and utilize advanced technology for accurate diagnosis.
Execute catheter ablation procedures and oversee the implantation of cardiac devices.
Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams for patient management and treatment strategy development.
Educate patients and families on arrhythmias and various treatment options available.
Engage in continuous learning and research to stay current with advancements in cardiac electrophysiology.
Requirements:
M.D. or D.O. degree with a valid medical license to practice in the relevant jurisdiction.
Board certification or eligibility in Cardiology with specialized training in Electrophysiology.
Demonstrated experience in diagnosing and managing cardiac arrhythmias.
Expertise in performing electrophysiological studies and catheter ablation.
Experience with the implantation and management of cardiac devices such as pacemakers and defibrillators.
Strong interpersonal and communication skills to interact effectively with patients and teams.
Ability to work effectively in a collaborative environment.
Detail-oriented with strong analytical skills.
Commitment to high-quality patient care and excellence in clinical practice.
Private Health Insurance
Training & Development
Performance Bonus
ai_core_responsibilities: The Cardiac Electrophysiologist will evaluate patient histories and conduct cardiac assessments to diagnose arrhythmias. They will perform electrophysiological studies, execute catheter ablation procedures, and collaborate with multidisciplinary teams for patient management.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess an M.D. or D.O. degree and a valid medical license, along with board certification or eligibility in Cardiology and specialized training in Electrophysiology. Experience in diagnosing and managing cardiac arrhythmias and expertise in performing electrophysiological studies and catheter ablation is required.

description_text:
SearchPlus HR is proud to partner with a leading healthcare facility in the search for a Specialist in Acute Medicine. This esteemed position offers the opportunity to join a dynamic team dedicated to delivering the highest quality of care to patients with acute medical needs. As a Specialist in Acute Medicine, you will play a pivotal role in diagnosing, treating, and managing complex medical conditions in a fast-paced and supportive environment.
In this role, you will collaborate with a multidisciplinary team of healthcare professionals, utilizing your expertise to drive improved patient outcomes and contribute to innovative clinical practices.
Key Responsibilities:
Conduct thorough assessments and diagnostics of patients presenting with acute medical conditions.
Develop and implement comprehensive treatment plans tailored to individual patient needs.
Perform essential medical procedures and interventions as necessary.
Collaborate with healthcare teams to ensure continuity of care and optimize patient results.
Educate and support patients and their families about health conditions and treatment options.
Participate in clinical audits, research initiatives, and quality improvement projects.
Engage in continuous professional development to stay abreast of advancements in acute medicine.
Requirements:
Medical degree from an accredited institution.
Completed specialty training in Acute Medicine.
A valid and active medical license.
Demonstrated experience as a Specialist in Acute Medicine.
Proven expertise in managing acute medical cases.
Strong clinical assessment and decision-making skills.
Exceptional communication and teamwork abilities.
Capacity to thrive in a high-pressure healthcare environment.
Commitment to ongoing education and professional growth in the medical field.
Private Health Insurance
Training & Development
Annual air tickets

They will collaborate with healthcare teams to ensure continuity of care and engage in clinical audits and quality improvement projects.

title: Legal & Compliance Counsel - Remote
description_text:
About the Role 
We’re looking for a seasoned Senior Legal & Compliance Counsel to take a leading role in our global legal and compliance function. This is a high-impact position at the center of a complex multinational structure spanning 12+ entities across the US, EU, UAE, South Africa, and Southeast Asia. You’ll serve as a strategic advisor to senior leadership while owning global contract strategy, regulatory compliance, and PSP-related legal oversight. 
This role is ideal for someone with deep financial regulatory experience — especially around payment service providers (PSPs), fintech licensing, cross-border compliance, and commercial contracting — who thrives in fast-paced, international environments. 
What You’ll Be Doing: 
Global Legal Strategy & Contract Leadership 
Lead, negotiate, and finalize complex cross-border commercial agreements. 
Track, analyze, and centralize key contract terms across all global entities. 
Oversee legal soundness of financial/PSP-related agreements, banking relationships, and vendor contracts. 
Regulatory & Compliance Leadership (FX/Crypto/Fintech) 
Serve as senior internal advisor on AML, KYC, sanctions, financial crime prevention, and FX/crypto regulatory frameworks. 
Oversee PSP due diligence, licensing applications, and regulatory submissions. 
Ensure compliance standards are implemented consistently across all jurisdictions. 
Cross-Entity Governance 
Provide strategic guidance across 12+ entities, ensuring alignment with local laws and long-term business goals. 
Lead policy creation and implementation for compliance, onboarding, and corporate governance. 
Executive Stakeholder Collaboration 
Advise executive leadership on legal, compliance, and risk impacts of major initiatives. 
Translate complex legal issues into clear, actionable guidance for non-legal teams. 
Risk Mitigation & Operational Oversight 
Design and manage enterprise-wide legal and compliance risk strategies. 
Evaluate, streamline, and document global compliance workflows. 
Manage outside counsel and regulatory partners where appropriate 
What We Are Looking For 
5–7+ years of legal practice in fintech, financial services, payments, or high-growth international environments. 
Proven expertise in PSP regulations, financial law, licensing, and due diligence. 
Strong exposure to cross-border commercial contracting and regulatory frameworks. 
Law degree and active license to practice in any jurisdiction. 
Additional certifications (e.g., ACAMS) are advantageous. 
Deep understanding of AML, KYC, sanctions, FX/crypto regulation, and financial compliance. 
Knowledge of US, EU, UAE, South African, and Southeast Asian legal frameworks. 
Strong contract drafting, negotiation, and interpretation skills. 
Excellent written and verbal communication across cultures. 
Ability to operate independently and strategically in a complex global environment. 
Exceptional diplomacy, judgment, and stakeholder management. 
Strong organizational ability, especially regarding contract tracking and data centralization. 
Bonus Points 
PSP licensing or due-diligence experience in multiple jurisdictions. 
Experience building compliance frameworks at early-stage or scaling fintechs. 
Fluency in Mandarin, Chinese, or Vietnamese. 
What Company Offers in Return 
Opportunity to lead legal/compliance strategy for a rapidly scaling global fintech group. 
A collaborative, high-performance environment with exposure to international leadership. 
Complex, meaningful work at the intersection of crypto, FX, and cutting-edge trading technology. 
Long-term growth with a clear pathway toward a future General Counsel role. 
This is a cornerstone position in Company’s legal and compliance structure. You will define standards, guide executives, and shape how the company navigates its next phase of global growth. Your work will directly influence our ability to operate securely, efficiently, and compliantly across dozens of jurisdictions.
ai_core_responsibilities: This role involves leading global legal strategy, negotiating complex cross-border commercial agreements, and overseeing the legal soundness of financial and vendor contracts across 12+ international entities. The counsel will also serve as a senior internal advisor on critical regulatory frameworks like AML, KYC, sanctions, and FX/crypto regulations.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess 5–7+ years of legal practice experience in fintech, financial services, or high-growth international settings, with proven expertise in PSP regulations, financial law, and cross-border commercial contracting. A law degree and active license are required, alongside a deep understanding of global compliance standards and strong executive collaboration skills.

At CXM, we integrate cutting-edge technology with outstanding service to help our clients achieve their full potential. Serving B2B, institutional, and retail clients, we provide tailored solutions to suit every trading journey.

title: Endodontist - Private Healthcare Sector
description_text:
SearchPlus HR is seeking a skilled and dedicated Endodontist to join our team in the private healthcare sector. In this role, you will focus on diagnosing and treating complex dental issues related to the interior of the tooth. Your primary responsibilities will include performing root canal procedures, pulp therapies, and other endodontic treatments while ensuring a high level of patient comfort and care.
As an Endodontist in the private healthcare sector, you will have the opportunity to work with state-of-the-art technology and collaborate with a team of dental professionals. Your expertise will play a crucial role in providing exceptional dental care and improving patient outcomes. If you are passionate about endodontics and are committed to delivering high-quality care, we encourage you to apply.
To qualify for the Endodontist position in the private healthcare sector, candidates must possess: 
A valid dental license and specialization in Endodontics
Extensive experience in performing endodontic procedures
Strong diagnostic and treatment planning skills
Proficiency in using advanced dental technologies
Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills
A collaborative mindset, working effectively with a dental team
Commitment to continuous education and staying current with industry advancements

Teaching opportunities available with the potential to do research
Competitive salary and benefits offered including productivity bonuses, paid time off, medical, dental, vision, and malpractice coverage.

Salary range: Rs 3000000 - Rs 4000000 (ie INR 30-40 LPA)

Location: Gurugram
JobType: full-time
We are looking for an experienced Product Manager to lead the development of consumer-facing digital products, with a strong focus on loyalty, rewards, and incentive-driven experiences. This role requires a deep understanding of user behavior, engagement mechanics, and scalable product ecosystems.
Key Requirements
5+ years of experience as a Product Manager or Product Leader. 
Proven track record of building and scaling consumer internet or e-commerce products. 
Prior experience working on loyalty programs, rewards platforms, or incentive-based systems. 
Exposure to multi-brand catalogs, partner ecosystems, or marketplace-style products.

title: Profesor de Matemáticas
description_text:
Acerca de Laterite
Laterite es una empresa de datos, investigación y análisis especializada en desafíos de desarrollo complejos. Trabajamos con universidades, think tanks globales, ONG internacionales, organizaciones donantes multilaterales y ministerios y agencias gubernamentales. Nuestros clientes incluyen, por ejemplo, el Banco Mundial, USAID, CARE, TechnoServe, Promundo, la Fundación Mastercard y varias agencias de la ONU. 
Actualmente tenemos oficinas en los Países Bajos, Ruanda, Etiopía, Kenia, Uganda, Tanzania, Sierra Leona y Perú. El equipo reúne a más de 80 empleados locales e internacionales a tiempo completo, así como a 1.000+ encuestadores en todos los países. Estamos orgullosos de ser una organización culturalmente diversa y promovemos la inclusión de grupos actualmente subrepresentados en nuestro equipo. Más información en: www.laterite.com
En Laterite trabajamos en proyectos para el desarrollo socioeconómico. Creemos que el impacto es un esfuerzo a largo plazo que requiere estar integrado en el contexto local. La generación de investigación e implementación de intervenciones de alta calidad requiere la creación de equipos locales y sistemas de recopilación de datos, conocimiento profundo del país y el establecimiento de relaciones de trabajo estrechas. 
Uno de los objetivos estratégicos de Laterite es crear un ambiente de trabajo colaborativo y gratificante para nuestro personal, donde cada miembro del equipo se sienta comprometido, representado y escuchado. Laterite se compromete a crear oportunidades de aprendizaje y desarrollo profesional dentro del equipo y en nuestras oficinas. 
Laterite se compromete a crear un entorno diverso y se enorgullece de ser un empleador que ofrece igualdad de oportunidades. Todos los solicitantes calificados recibirán consideración para el empleo sin distinción de raza, religión, género, identidad o expresión de género, orientación sexual, origen nacional, genética, discapacidad, edad o veterano.
ai_core_responsibilities: The role involves working on projects focused on socioeconomic development, requiring deep integration within the local context. This includes generating high-quality research and implementing interventions through local teams and data collection systems.

description_text:
SearchPlus HR is a prominent human resources consulting firm focused on connecting skilled professionals with prestigious healthcare organizations. We are currently seeking a highly qualified Senior Specialist Anesthesia to join a leading Private Healthcare Group.
As a Senior Specialist in Anesthesia, you will be integral to providing exemplary anesthesia care during a variety of surgical procedures. Your extensive knowledge and experience will ensure that patients receive outstanding care, with an emphasis on safety and comfort.
Responsibilities
Perform thorough pre-anesthetic assessments, including reviewing patient medical histories to formulate individualized anesthesia plans.
Administer anesthesia for a wide range of surgical procedures, employing techniques such as general, regional, and local anesthesia.
Continuously monitor patients’ vital signs and responses throughout surgical interventions, adapting anesthesia strategies as necessary.
Implement emergency protocols and manage any complications related to anesthesia with proficiency and efficiency.
Collaborate effectively with surgeons and the broader healthcare team to enhance patient safety and outcomes.
Mentor and supervise junior anesthesia staff, fostering a culture of learning and improvement.
Participate in ongoing professional development and stay abreast of the latest advancements and best practices in anesthesiology.
Medical degree with specialized training and certification in Anesthesia and a valid medical license.
Significant experience in administering anesthesia in diverse surgical settings within private healthcare.
Thorough understanding of anesthesia protocols, techniques, and safety procedures.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills to assess and respond to patient needs effectively.
Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills for better collaboration with healthcare teams.
Demonstrated ability to lead and mentor others in a clinical setting.
Detail-oriented with a strong commitment to patient care and safety.
Engaged in continuous learning and professional development in the field of anesthesia.
• Diverse professional opportunities covering a wide variety of cases including General Surgery, Trauma, Endo, Ortho, OB, GYN, Neuro, Spine, Cardiac, Vascular, Robotics, etc.
Good salary packages plus other standard benefits like accommodation, annual air tickets, family benefits, medical insurance, etc.

title: (Senior) Performance Marketing Manager - Programmatic (f/m/d)
description_text:
At Front Row, we partner with leading brands to accelerate their ecommerce growth. We leverage our capabilities and proprietary technology to design, market, distribute and accelerate brands on a global scale. We’re continually cultivating functional areas of expertise and retaining the highest caliber of talent — while sharing knowledge and data, creating efficiencies, and looking at every aspect of our client’s business from a 360° perspective. We work effectively to give every client the hands-on support, niche knowledge, and first-access they need to win in the world’s most competitive commerce markets and make each of our six capabilities the first to act on the next big things. 
We live for the exchange of energy between brands and audiences, you should too, and we’ve made it our mission to expand every brand’s market share and heart share. Because we believe every transaction has the potential to be transformational. 
About our Ecommerce Management Team
We help our clients expand their business and geographic scope with guidance and implementation across digital advertising and retail, optimizing conversion on all major platforms. 
Our Advertising team is currently looking for a motivated (Senior) Performance Marketing Manager – Programmatic (f/m/d) to support our clients to grow their online business. The position is full-time and located in Hamburg.
How would you spend your time if you join us? 
You are responsible for all Amazon DSP marketing activities of existing and future customers
You take over planning, steering, monitoring, and optimizing of DSP campaigns according to defined performance goals
You develop campaign strategies for existing and new customers based on their respective business goals
You manage client communication successfully and discuss advertising strategies as well as the results
You support other campaign managers through professional sparring and optimize the quality of campaign management by constantly improving and further developing processes, tools, reports, etc.
You constantly develop our consulting and service portfolio by considering new market and technology developments to ensure that we create a real value-added for our customers
You will have the opportunity for career advancement, potentially stepping into leadership roles and guiding strategic initiatives within the team
Who Are You?
You are a self-motivated person, eager to learn and to expand your own know-how daily
You have gained at least 2-4 years of experience in the field of performance marketing
You possess in-depth know-how and experience in the field of social or display/programmatic advertising. Having worked with the Amazon DSP before would be beneficial
You are highly analytical and possess a good technical understanding as well as quality and solution orientation
You have a good sense of communicating with customers and ability to present complex contexts in a comprehensible way
You show self-initiative and are able to prioritize tasks independently
You possess very good written and verbal communication skills in English, a second language such as German or French is beneficial 
What's in it for you? 
Imagine...
✨gaining insights into a variety of businesses, from traditional German brands to fast-moving online pure players, working on exciting projects that shape the future of e-commerce. 
🚀 taking ownership of your own projects, growing professionally, and continuously developing your strengths with the Gallup StrengthsFinder – backed by an unlimited learning budget.
🌍 being part of a company where diversity and inclusion aren’t just values on paper but the foundation of our success. With over 30 nationalities, we thrive in a truly international environment.
🤝 collaborating with clients as trusted partners, working at eye level, and embracing a no-bullshit attitude – because we know what we’re doing and take pride in being thought leaders in our field.
⏳ having the flexibility to design your work-life balance with remote work options, flexible working hours, and the freedom to choose between 20 to 40 days of vacation per year.
☀️ working from abroad once a year at our Sunshine Office, combining productivity with inspiration from new surroundings.
🎉 enjoying regular afterworks, unforgettable team getaways, and a company culture where we genuinely enjoy working together – and it shows!
🏢 benefiting from a modern office in the heart of Hamburg, bike leasing, an attractive pension plan, and the HVV-Deutschland Ticket to get you where you need to be.
💆 having access to mental wellbeing support through OpenUp, a lunch allowance, and much more - because we care about your health and happiness.
💪 staying fit and active with EGYM Wellpass - our subsidized sports and wellness membership, giving you access to thousands of gyms, studios, and wellness offers across Germany.
💡 Want to be part of this journey? Join us and shape the future with us!

title: Insights Manager
description_text:
CARMA is a globally-trusted media intelligence leader with decades of experience helping PR and communications professionals monitor what matters, measure what’s meaningful, and demonstrate the value of their work. We combine cutting-edge technology, including AI-enabled media monitoring across print, online, broadcast, and social channels in 100+ languages, with deep human expertise to deliver actionable insights that inform strategy and drive business-critical decisions. With a diverse global team supporting thousands of organisations worldwide, CARMA empowers partners to turn complex media data into clarity and context, elevate the impact of earned media, and deepen understanding of stakeholder influence across markets.
Overview
An Insights Manager at CARMA will lead the end-to-end setup, management, and delivery of insight products for one of our most pivotal clients. This role is responsible for ensuring the quality, clarity, and strategic value of all deliverables, acting as the critical bridge between the client and CARMA’s internal teams.
The role carries a dual reporting line to the Key Account Director and the Insights Consultant, MENA, and is delivered as an on-site secondment at the client’s location in Dammam, KSA. This embedded model supports close collaboration, rapid knowledge exchange, and the development of strong, trusted client relationships.
This position is ideal for someone genuinely passionate about insights—particularly media insights—who thrives on translating complex data into meaning, identifying patterns, and enabling confident, informed decision-making. The successful candidate will bring broad experience delivering media insights across sectors and will be comfortable independently producing comprehensive, executive-level analysis that drives action.
Active engagement with the wider insights and communications industry is highly valued, including familiarity with recognised measurement frameworks such as AMEC. While formal qualifications are welcomed, curiosity, critical thinking, and a commitment to continuous learning are essential.
Insights Managers are expected to confidently manage senior stakeholders both internally and externally, build strong client partnerships, coach and manage secondees based on-site, and contribute to innovation—particularly through the effective use of AI tools to enhance insight generation, quality, and efficiency.
What you’ll do
Lead and manage ad-hoc and ongoing insight reporting for a Tier 01 client, providing on-site support aligned to evolving business needs
Independently develop end-to-end analysis and insight reports from the ground up, delivering clear, actionable recommendations for senior and executive stakeholders
Provide strategic insight and counsel during key moments, including high-profile events, issues, and crises
Manage and oversee the on-site secondee team to ensure seamless client support, consistency of output, and alignment with project objectives
Design and deliver a comprehensive, scalable measurement programme aligned to the client’s strategic goals
Build and maintain strong, trusted, long-term relationships with client stakeholders
Leverage AI-enabled tools and platforms to enhance insight generation, improve efficiency, and evolve reporting methodologies
Support proposal development, client onboarding, and account growth initiatives as required
Demonstrated experience delivering media insights across industries, with the ability to turn complex datasets into clear strategic narratives
A strong passion for storytelling through data, evidence-based analysis, and insight-led decision-making
The ability to independently produce executive-level reports, with excellent writing, synthesis, and presentation skills
Experience gained either agency-side or client-side, including backgrounds such as media analysis, journalism, reporting, or editorial roles where clarity, accuracy, and senior-level communication are critical
Strong understanding of audience analysis and online media, including digital performance, engagement, and narrative dynamics
Familiarity with AMEC frameworks (formal certification welcomed but not required)
Excellent client communication, project management, and stakeholder management skills
A collaborative, curious mindset with a strong drive for learning, innovation, and continuous improvement
ai_core_responsibilities: The Insights Manager will lead the end-to-end setup, management, and delivery of insight products for a pivotal client, acting as the critical bridge between the client and internal CARMA teams. Responsibilities include leading ongoing insight reporting, independently developing comprehensive analysis, providing strategic counsel during key moments, and managing the on-site secondee team.
ai_requirements_summary: The ideal candidate thrives on translating complex data into meaning, identifying patterns, and enabling informed decision-making, requiring broad experience delivering media insights across sectors. Essential qualities include curiosity, critical thinking, confidence in managing senior stakeholders, and the ability to independently produce executive-level analysis.

With 700+ staff across five continents, CARMA’s unparalleled experience, expertise and client service make it the first-choice media intelligence provider for any organisation looking to understand the media and refine and prove the value of it's public relations.

title: Video Data Capture Operator (Flexible, 1 Day/Week)
description_text:
Who We Are
At CloudFactory, we are a mission-driven team passionate about unlocking the disruptive potential of AI for the world. By combining advanced technology with a global network of talented experts, we make unusable data usable and inference reliable and trustworthy, driving real-world business value at scale. 
More than just a workplace, we’re a global community founded on strong relationships and the belief that meaningful work transforms lives. Our commitment to earning, learning, and serving fuels everything we do, as we strive to connect one million people to meaningful work and build leaders worth following.
Our Culture
At CloudFactory, we believe in building a workplace where everyone feels empowered, valued, and inspired to bring their authentic selves to work. We are:
Mission-Driven: We focus on creating economic and social impact.
People-Centric: We care deeply about our team’s growth, well-being, and sense of belonging.
Innovative: We embrace change and find better ways to do things, together.
Globally Connected: We foster collaboration between diverse cultures and perspectives.
If you’re ready to earn, learn, serve, and be part of a vibrant global community, CloudFactory is your place!
About the Role
We are seeking a dedicated and motivated Data Capture Technician to operate reality capture equipment, such as 360-degree cameras and other surveying tools, in a variety of environments. The technician will be responsible for capturing comprehensive data of construction sites using different equipment and methodologies that align with algorithmic analysis.
We are looking for someone who is hardworking, responsible, and passionate about fieldwork, with the ability to effectively use technology to collect detailed site information. This is a part-time role, requiring one day of work per week.
What You'll Do
Operate 360° cameras and other surveying equipment to efficiently capture the construction site.
Document and communicate the progress of the work being done on-site.
Ensure personal safety and the safety of the site and equipment by strictly following all safety protocols and guidelines.
Collaborate with the Project Team to adapt to the needs and requirements of each project.
Work across multiple construction sites throughout London& Manchester as part of the role.
What We're Looking For
Availability for at least one day per week during daytime hours.
Willingness to work on construction sites with potentially challenging conditions.
Ability to walk extensively and perform some physical tasks as part of the job.
A positive attitude and strong team player qualities.
Flexibility and a problem-solving mindset.
Strong communication skills with the ability to follow detailed instructions and execute consistently.
Previous fieldwork experience and a technical orientation are a plus.
A background in Surveying, Photography, or Construction is highly preferred.
ai_core_responsibilities: The technician will operate reality capture equipment, such as 360-degree cameras and surveying tools, to capture comprehensive data of construction sites aligned with algorithmic analysis. Responsibilities also include documenting progress, ensuring site safety by following protocols, and collaborating with the project team.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must be available for at least one day per week during daytime hours and willing to work on construction sites, which may involve challenging conditions and physical tasks like extensive walking. A positive attitude, strong teamwork, flexibility, and good communication skills are essential.

Bridge the gap between your AI’s promise and its real-world performance. Our technology and talent help you develop, deploy, and operate reliable, trustworthy AI from idea to production faster. We ensure your data is ready for reliable AI models, improve performance with continuous feedback loops, and close the confidence gap by making your AI systems accurate and safe at scale.

We achieve this by combining machine and human intelligence. Our modular and flexible AI platform uses a human-in-the-loop approach to correct errors and edge cases that automation alone can’t handle, continuously improving model performance. With an inference-centric methodology, unique datasets, and our skilled professionals, we enable ML teams to build better AI solutions for real-world problems, ensuring seamless development and monitoring that speeds up production and drives real financial impact.

Founded in 2010, CloudFactory is on a mission to empower talented people around the world to become the skilled humans in the loop vital for unlocking AI's full potential. We’re on four continents, with offices in the UK, the US, Germany, Kenya, and Nepal. To learn more, visit www.cloudfactory.com.

title: Relationship Lead
description_text:
About Packt 
Packt is a leading publisher of technical learning content with the ability to publish books on new and emerging tech faster than any other publisher in the world. We believe that software has a deep impact on the world, and that software runs on knowledge. Our mission is to increase the shared value of deep tech knowledge. We are tech content engineers and we work with some of the most interesting technical minds and ground-breaking creators on the planet. For more details, see www.packtpub.com 

About the Vertical
The Software Engineering & Architecture (SEA) vertical is Packt’s home for serious engineers, deep tech enthusiasts, and system thinkers. Our portfolio is built around the belief that great engineers don’t just learn a tool; they master the paradigms, practices, and design principles that cut across languages, frameworks, and platforms. 
Our top titles reflect this breadth and depth: 
Core foundations & paradigms: 
50 Algorithms Every Programmer Should Know 
Art of Efficient Programming 
Python Object-Oriented Programming 
Language mastery & performance: 
C++ Memory Management 
C++ High Performance 
Mastering Go 
Software design & architecture
Software Architecture with C++ 
Clean Code in Python 
At the same time, we recognize that AI is reshaping every role in software engineering. From coding assistants in the IDE to rethinking system design for LLMs and multi-agent workflows. 
Our mission is to stay at the forefront of that change, ensuring our products prepare engineers not just to use AI tools, but to design systems that harness them effectively. This vertical is for engineers who want to go deeper, think sharper, and build systems that last. 

Role Overview 
The Relationship Lead (RL) plays a pivotal role in Packt’s tech publishing ecosystem by driving both the acquisition of high-caliber authors and the execution of post-publication marketing strategies. As a dynamic link between subject matter experts, developers, IT professionals, and practitioner communities, and Packt’s content goals, the RL is responsible for discovering influential voices in tech, nurturing long-term author relationships, and ensuring that each published title achieves visibility, engagement, and commercial success across all sales channels. 
This is a strategic, outward-facing role that requires a blend of people skills, product sensibility, DevRel marketing acumen, and technology community-building mindset. 
We value a track record in producing or guiding developer-focused learning resources for web and mobile. Curiosity about software engineering and emerging AI-powered practices is encouraged. You do not need to be a specialist, yet experience shaping effective learning resources and access to a strong expert network will set you up for success. This is NOT a sales role.

Key Responsibilities 
High-Status Author Acquisition & Engagement 
Proactively identify and pursue influential tech professionals, thought leaders, and practitioners as potential authors. 
Pitch publishing opportunities to experts with a compelling narrative that aligns with their personal brand and career goals. 
Negotiate author contracts and manage onboarding to ensure clarity, enthusiasm, and a strong collaborative foundation. 
Serve as the primary point of contact for authors, guiding them through the publication journey. 
Maintain long-term relationships to encourage repeat authorship and ambassador-level partnerships. 
Community Engagement and Outreach: 
Work closely with Growth Leads and Content Engineers to drive community participation and awareness of titles. 
Build and maintain vibrant communities in key topic areas to enhance Packt's brand value and the quality of content. 
Design and implement initiatives that encourage community members to actively contribute, share insights, and support each other. 
Build Advocate Networks: 
Develop advocate networks by identifying and engaging passionate community members who can amplify the reach and impact of titles. 
Empower advocates with resources and opportunities to share their knowledge and promote the content within their networks. 
Foster long-term relationships with advocates to ensure continued support and engagement. 
Cross-Industry Partnerships: 
Develop and nurture relationships with industry bodies, influencers, and thought leaders. 
Establish strategic partnerships that enhance the credibility and reach of your assigned topics, providing deeper engagement opportunities and boosting the overall content impact. 
Collaborate with partners to co-host events, contribute to industry discussions, and expand visibility across different channels. 
Product Expansion and Relationship Innovation: 
Identify opportunities to expand beyond traditional book formats, exploring new product formats such as expert panels, live events, or memberships. 
Cultivate partnerships that support these new initiatives, ensuring they align with community needs and vertical strategy. 
Experiment with innovative engagement models that bring value to both authors and the community, creating diversified content offerings. 
Thought Leadership and Influence: 
Establish alliances with influential figures and organizations within the industry. 
Position Packt as a thought leader by leveraging these relationships to produce high-value content, expert contributions, and influential collaborations. 
Why work at Packt? 
We recognize how important our people are and acknowledge and support the things that are important to them. We focus on the full team member's experience. We aim to create a positive working environment that supports personal and collective development – where our people can not only grow their skill sets, continuously challenge themselves, and develop their careers, but also work together as a team and with our customers. 
We try to achieve this by: 
Ensuring a positive working environment for all team members, supportive of flexible and remote work. 
Supporting individual development through growth opportunities and internal mobility. 
Encouraging social collaboration within teams and communities and knowledge-sharing. 
Fostering a culture that supports a healthy work-life balance. 
We seek to achieve this by: 
Providing a broad range of benefits and initiatives. 
Advocating a healthy lifestyle where wellbeing is seen as an essential responsibility. 
Celebrating success stories and encouraging peer-to-peer recognition. 
Fostering a culture of self-development. 
Providing a work environment where the best idea wins, and challenge is encouraged. 
Benefits 
You will also have access to a range of flexible benefits that are designed to help you make the most of your time with us. 
Bonus scheme 
25 days’ holiday (plus bank holidays) 
Flexible hours: choose how, when and where you work 
Monthly Gross Salary Range- 80K-120K per month (skills and/or experience dependent) 
Disclaimer: Packt does not authorize any third-party consultancies, influencers, or agencies to offer employment opportunities on our behalf. We are not involved in any financial transactions with these parties. Our hiring process is managed internally, and all applications should be made through the official procedures outlined in our job listings.

ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a track record in producing or guiding developer-focused learning resources and access to a strong expert network. Curiosity about software engineering and emerging AI practices is encouraged.

title: Payroll Specialist
locations_derived: Regional Unit of East Attica, Attica, Greece
description_text:
Η Eurocatering Α.Ε. δραστηριοποιείται στον τομέα των φρέσκων οπωροκηπευτικών και σαλατών και είναι ιδιοκτήτρια της μάρκας "Φρεσκούλης" γνωστής για τις σαλάτες, σαλάτες γεύματα & φρέσκα υγιεινά σνακ. Με πάνω από 25 χρόνια εμπειρίας, καλύπτουμε όλη την αγροδιατροφική αλυσίδα και υποστηρίζουμε δίκτυο πιστοποιημένης γεωργίας στην Ελλάδα. Το όραμά μας είναι να φέρνουμε υγεία στο τραπέζι με ποιοτικά προϊόντα και υπηρεσίες υψηλής αξίας. Στην Eurocatering κάθε μέρα συνεργαζόμαστε, συνδημιουργούμε και εξελισσόμαστε, με επίκεντρο πάντα τον σεβασμό προς τον κάθε άνθρωπο.
Οι αξίες μας:
Ποιότητα: Εγγύηση υψηλών προδιαγραφών.
Καινοτομία: Συνεχής βελτίωση και νέες ιδέες.
Σεβασμός: Σεβασμός για εμάς σημαίνει να καλλιεργείς και να διατηρείς ένα ευγενικό επαγγελματικό και αξιοπρεπές περιβάλλον, όπου κάθε άνθρωπος είναι ορατός, ακούγεται, ο ρόλος του αναγνωρίζεται και η συνεισφορά του στην κοινή προσπάθεια είναι σημαντική. Σεβασμός για εμάς σημαίνει η διαφορετικότητα και η συμπερίληψη, να αποτελούν δομικά στοιχεία της εταιρικής μας κουλτούρας.
Υπευθυνότητα: Βιώσιμες πρακτικές και κοινωνική συνεισφορά.
Ομαδικότητα: Ενίσχυση συνεργασίας και ομαδικού πνεύματος
Αναζητούμε Payroll Specialist στην έδρα μας στις Αχαρνές, για να ενισχύσει τη λειτουργία μισθοδοσίας, με έμφαση στην ακρίβεια, τη συμμόρφωση (εργατική/ασφαλιστική νομοθεσία) και την διασφάλιση της ορθής λειτουργίας της ψηφιακής κάρτας. Ο ρόλος έχει hands-on χαρακτήρα. 
Αρμοδιότητες:
Καταχώρηση και επεξεργασία δεδομένων στη μισθοδοσία, εξαγωγές αρχείων και έλεγχος ακρίβειας/πληρότητας 
Υποστήριξη και εκτέλεση της μηνιαίας μισθοδοσίας (προετοιμασία, έλεγχο, εκτέλεση).
Προετοιμασία Reporting μισθοδοσίας.
Διαχείριση χρόνου εργασίας και παρουσιών (working hours, υπερωρίες, άδειες, ασθένειες, λοιπές απουσίες).
Παρακολούθηση συστήματος ωρομέτρησης ψηφιακής κάρτας και επεξεργασία στοιχείων χρόνου εργασίας και παρουσιών.
Διαχείριση διαδικασιών προς δημόσιες αρχές και συστήματα: ΠΣ ΕΡΓΑΝΗ, Sepenet κ.λ.π.(προσλήψεις/αποχωρήσεις/μεταβολές/απολογιστικά προγράμματα).
Συγκέντρωση/έλεγχος δικαιολογητικών νεοπροσληφθέντων, τήρηση φακέλων εργαζόμενων, υποστήριξη τμήματος για διαχείριση καθημερινών θεμάτων προσωπικού.
Απαιτούμενα Προσόντα:
Πτυχίο ΑΕΙ/ΤΕΙ (ιδανικά: Λογιστική / Οικονομικά / Διοίκηση ή συναφές).
4+ χρόνια εμπειρίας σε τμήμα μισθοδοσίας.
Πολύ καλή γνώση εργατικής & ασφαλιστικής νομοθεσίας.
Πολύ καλή γνώση του ΠΣ ΕΡΓΑΝΗ και πρακτική εμπειρία σε δηλώσεις/μεταβολές.
Άριστη χρήση Excel (ιδανικά: pivots, lookup, data checks) και γενικά MS Office.
Καλή γνώση Αγγλικών.
Εμπειρία σε Pylon /Epsilonet.
Δεξιότητες που θα εκτιμήσουμε:
Μεθοδικότητα, οργάνωση και ικανότητα να τηρείς χρονοδιαγράμματα χωρίς εκπτώσεις στην ποιότητα.
Ικανότητα άμεσης επίλυσης καθημερινών θεμάτων και σωστή προτεραιοποίηση.
Εχεμύθεια/εμπιστευτικότητα.
Συνεργατικό πνεύμα και άνετη επικοινωνία με διαφορετικούς ρόλους.
Επαγγελματισμό, συνέπεια και μεθοδικότητα.
Η εταιρία προσφέρει: 
Ανταγωνιστικό πακέτο αποδοχών.
Προοπτικές εξέλιξης και ανάπτυξης στον ηγέτη του κλάδου.
Συνεχή εκπαίδευση και ανάπτυξη.
Σύγχρονο και φιλικό περιβάλλον εργασίας σε ένα περιβάλλον συμπεριληπτικό και οικείο.
Η Eurocatering Α.Ε. προσφέρει ίσες ευκαιρίες σε όλους, ανεξαρτήτως φύλου, ηλικίας, εθνικότητας ή άλλων χαρακτηριστικών.
Αν επιθυμείτε να σταδιοδρομήστε σε ένα περιβάλλον με ασφάλεια και δυνατότητες εξέλιξης, μπορείτε να μας στείλετε το βιογραφικό σας. Θα επικοινωνήσουμε με όλους του υποψηφίους οι οποίοι θα επιλεχθούν στην διαδικασίας αξιολόγησης. 
Οι πληροφορίες αυτές θεωρούνται εμπιστευτικές και δεν μεταβιβάζονται ή κοινοποιούνται σε τρίτους για κανένα λόγο, όπως ορίζουν οι διατάξεις του Γενικού Κανονισμού για την Προστασία Δεδομένων Προσωπικού Χαρακτήρα, όπως ισχύει σήμερα.

ai_core_responsibilities: The Payroll Specialist will be responsible for data entry and processing within the payroll system, ensuring accuracy and compliance with labor and insurance legislation. They will also manage work hours, attendance, and reporting related to payroll.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have a degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field, along with over four years of experience in payroll. A strong knowledge of labor and insurance legislation, as well as proficiency in payroll systems like ERGANI, is required.
linkedin_org_description:
Στην Eurocatering ΑΕ, από το 2000, φέρνουμε φρεσκάδα στο τραπέζι κάθε ελληνικού νοικοκυριού! 
Με εξειδίκευση στην καλλιέργεια, διαλογή, τυποποίηση και διάθεση ποιοτικών οπωροκηπευτικών, έχουμε ταυτιστεί με τις αγαπημένες σας ολόφρεσκες συσκευασμένες και έτοιμες για σερβίρισμα σαλάτες Φρεσκούλης. 
Το όραμά μας είναι να φέρνουμε υγεία στο τραπέζι του κόσμου, αποτελώντας την πρώτη και καλύτερη πηγή οπωροκηπευτικών ανώτερης ποιότητας, εφαρμόζοντας τις αξίες μας: φρεσκάδα, σεβασμό, πάθος και ευελιξία.
Η Eurocatering Α.Ε. απασχολεί περισσότερους από 460 εργαζομένους, συμβάλλοντας δυναμικά στην ελληνική αγορά εργασίας.

title: Waking Night Crisis Support Worker
description_text:
🌟 Be the Safe Space. Be the Support. Be the Change. 🌟
Children’s Support Worker – Paragon Social Care
Looking for work that means more?
At Paragon Social Care, you won’t just fill shifts — you’ll show up when it matters most for children and young people who need stability, care, and someone who truly believes in them.
We’re growing our team of dedicated Children’s Support Workers and are looking for people with heart, resilience, and the drive to make a difference. Experience is welcome — but the right attitude is everything.
💡 About Us
Our mission is clear: Excellence Through Understanding.
We deliver 24/7 wraparound support to children and young people in local authority care, particularly during times of transition or uncertainty. Our focus is always on safety, emotional wellbeing, and helping young people move forward with confidence.
Every interaction matters. Every moment counts. And you could be the person who changes the direction of a child’s life.
🧩 The Role
Each shift brings something new, but your impact is constant. You’ll be:
Providing safe, trauma-informed care 
Creating structure, routine, and a calm environment 
Supporting education, independence, and life skills 
Preparing meals and promoting healthy daily habits 
Ensuring young people feel heard, respected, and valued 
Attending appointments and community activities 
Transporting young people using your own vehicle when required 
Helping them transition positively into their next placement or future pathway 
🧠 What You’ll Need
✔ Experience supporting children or young people (voluntary or paid)
✔ A full UK driving licence and access to your own vehicle
✔ Emotional resilience, empathy, and patience
✔ Flexibility to work nights, weekends, and sleep-ins
✔ Enhanced DBS clearance (or willingness to apply)
A Level 3 qualification in Children’s Residential Care (or equivalent) is desirable but not essential.
💰 What We Offer
💷 Competitive hourly rates: £17.50 – £28 (depending on shift type)
🎓 Comprehensive free training, including:
21 online training modules 
Face-to-face training in safeguarding, trauma-informed practice, and positive behaviour support 
📈 Genuine progression opportunities — Senior Support Worker and beyond
✨ Benefits you’ll appreciate:
Flexible working patterns 
Casual dress code 
Company pension 
Referral bonus scheme 
❤️ Why Join Paragon?
Because children don’t just need care — they need consistency, compassion, and belief.
If you’re ready to step into a role where your presence matters and your work changes lives, we’re ready to support you every step of the way.
👉 Apply now and help shape brighter futures.
This role is subject to an enhanced DBS check. Safeguarding and promoting the welfare of children and young people is a priority, and all applicants are expected to share this commitment.
ai_core_responsibilities: The role involves providing safe, trauma-informed care to children and young people, creating a calm environment, and supporting their daily habits, education, and independence. Responsibilities also include attending appointments, transporting young people when necessary, and assisting with positive transitions to new placements.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must possess experience supporting children or young people, hold a full UK driving licence with access to their own vehicle, and demonstrate emotional resilience and patience. An Enhanced DBS clearance is required, and an A Level 3 qualification in Children’s Residential Care is desirable.
linkedin_org_slogan: Supporting vulnerable and often very challenging children and young people during times of crisis.
linkedin_org_specialties: Social Work and Qualified Social Work
linkedin_org_locations: 3 Claridge Court, Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire HP4 2AF, GB
linkedin_org_description:
At Paragon Social Care, our vision, Excellence Through Understanding, encapsulates our dedication to enhancing the lives of the young people we support. 
Our Mission is one of holistic nurturing and support, providing a safe haven for our young people. Our skilled and caring staff cater to each individual's needs, leveraging our Trauma Informed and Positive Behaviour Support frameworks. Our young people remain the heart of all we do, and their wellbeing and success are our primary focus.
We are steadfast in our belief that empathic, understanding relationships are crucial in catalysing change. Our specialist staff dedicate themselves to acknowledging and validating each young person’s life experiences, laying the foundations for a trust-filled relationship that can truly make a difference.
Our core endeavour is to instill within each young person the values necessary for a flourishing life: 
•	A culture of healthy choices. 
•	Self-confidence and self-worth.
•	Good physical and emotional health.
•	Healthy relationships in all spheres of life.
•	A safe environment to explore and reach their full potential.
Our supportive team offers a safe, nurturing environment that is warm, stimulating, and child centred. We aim to foster an atmosphere that is welcoming, encouraging, aspirational, and consistent, allowing our young people to feel at home and motivated towards their goals.
Our staff group embodies our vision of Excellence Through Understanding. They are the beacon of patience, love, adaptability, diversity, and a holistic approach, forming trusted relationships with the young people we support.
In essence, Paragon Social Care is more than just a support organisation – we are a community driven by a shared vision of understanding and excellence.

title: Game Host (Student / Flexi-job)
description_text:
Males & Females welcome
About the role
Calling all truly AWESOME people!
Stranger Soccer is looking for energetic, reliable and people-oriented Game Hosts to help us launch and grow our football games in Belgium, starting in Mechelen and Antwerp.
As a Game Host, you are the face of Stranger Soccer on the pitch. You ensure that every game runs smoothly and that players enjoy a fun, welcoming and well-organised experience from the moment they arrive until the final whistle.
About Stranger Soccer
Stranger Soccer is an international sports-tech platform that makes it easy for adults to play football — without fixed teams, long-term commitments or complicated organisation.
Through its platform and mobile app, players can:
browse available games
book a spot in seconds
show up and play
What started in Singapore has grown into a global concept, with Stranger Soccer becoming the leading way adults play football in several cities worldwide.
Following strong growth in Asia-Pacific and other international markets, Stranger Soccer is now expanding further into Europe via a local license partner model. Belgium is one of the next launch countries, with games starting in Mechelen and Antwerp.
Launch context (Belgium)
Games will launch from March
We will start with a limited number of weekly matches
The schedule will scale gradually as demand grows
Focus is on quality, consistency and great player experience from day one
This is a great opportunity to join Stranger Soccer from the start and grow together with the platform.
Working hours
Games will initially take place on weekday evenings
Additional evening or weekend slots may be added gradually as we scale
Shifts are planned weekly based on the game schedule
This role is ideal for:
students, and
flexi-jobbers looking for flexible work in a sports environment
Key responsibilities
Act as an ambassador of the Stranger Soccer brand at every game
Host and facilitate football matches in Mechelen or Antwerp
Welcome players and explain rules, fair play and safety guidelines
Ensure a smooth and enjoyable game experience from start to finish
Step in to play if needed (e.g. last-minute no-shows)
Report practical issues or feedback to the local operations team
Friendly, outgoing and reliable personality
Passion for football (playing experience is a plus)
Strong people and communication skills
Comfortable taking responsibility on the pitch
Customer service, sports or event experience is a plus
Contract & setup
Employment via student contract or flexi-job (Belgian legal framework)
Hourly paid role
Flexible scheduling based on availability and game planning
Interested?
Apply via:
👉 https://www.strangersoccer.com/official-host
ai_core_responsibilities: The Game Host acts as the brand ambassador, responsible for welcoming players, explaining rules, and ensuring every football match runs smoothly and enjoyably from start to finish. They must also step in to play if necessary and report any operational issues to the local team.
ai_requirements_summary: The ideal candidate is an energetic, reliable, and people-oriented individual who is passionate about football and comfortable taking responsibility on the pitch. Experience in customer service, sports, or events is considered a plus, and the role is specifically suited for students or flexi-jobbers.
linkedin_org_slogan: Playing Football ⚽️: As easy as going for a jog. Singapore’s #1. Now accepting applications for international licensees.
linkedin_org_locations: 7 Temasek Boulevard, Suntec Tower One, Singapore, 038987, SG
linkedin_org_description:
3.5 billion people in 200 countries love football. Why don't more of them play? 

Stranger Soccer’s acclaimed app-enabled platform makes playing football (soccer, futbol) as easy as going for a jog. 

Singapore born, now open in 10+ cities with 100,000+ games run. Accepting applications for license partners to own and operate Stranger Soccer in key cities around the world.

Interested in bringing Stranger Soccer to your city or country? We are now accepting applications for license partners to own and operate Stranger Soccer in their city. Learn more here: www.strangersoccer.com
