title: Finance & Insurance Advisor
description_text:
Ο Όμιλος Σφακιανάκη, κορυφαίος επιχειρηματικός όμιλος με ηγετική θέση στον κλάδο της αυτοκίνησης, αναζητά: 
Finance & Insurance Advisor
Αρμοδιότητες:
Υποδέχεται τους πελάτες στον εκθεσιακό χώρο, προσφέροντας επαγγελματική, ευχάριστη και άμεση εξυπηρέτηση.
Εντοπίζει και κατανοεί τις ανάγκες των πελατών αναφορικά με την ασφάλιση και τη χρηματοδότηση του οχήματος. 
Ενημερώνει τους πελάτες για τους όρους, τις παροχές και τις διαδικασίες, διευκολύνοντας τη λήψη απόφασης.
Καταχωρεί τα απαιτούμενα στοιχεία σε ηλεκτρονικά συστήματα για την έκδοση προσφορών, αιτήσεων και συμβολαίων.
Συνεργάζεται στενά με τον υπεύθυνο πωλήσεων της έκθεσης για τη διασφάλιση μιας ενιαίας και ολοκληρωμένης εμπειρίας εξυπηρέτησης.
Παρακολουθεί τις πωλήσεις ασφαλιστικών και χρηματοδοτικών προϊόντων, συντάσσοντας σχετικές αναφορές.
Συμμετέχει ενεργά σε προγράμματα εκπαίδευσης και ενημέρωσης για νέα προϊόντα και διαδικασίες, με στόχο τη συνεχή επαγγελματική εξέλιξη.
Προφίλ υποψηφίου:
Απόφοιτος-η Λυκείου, πτυχίο ΤΕΙ / ΑΕΙ Ασφαλιστικής επιστήμης / Διοίκησης επιχειρήσεων ή σε συναφές αντικείμενο, επιθυμητό.
2+ έτη εμπειρία, ιδανικά σε εξυπηρέτηση πελατών και προώθηση ασφαλιστικών προϊόντων / χρηματοδοτικών λύσεων κλάδου αυτοκινήτου.
Πιστοποιητικό ασφαλιστικής διαμεσολάβησης.
Άριστη γνώση Η/Υ και εφαρμογών MS Office.
Ανεπτυγμένες επικοινωνιακές δεξιότητες.
Προσήλωση στην επίτευξη στόχων.
Παροχές Εταιρίας:
Ανταγωνιστικό πακέτο αποδοχών & παροχών.
Συμμετοχή σε Ομαδικό Ασφαλιστήριο Συμβόλαιο.
Δυναμικό & σύγχρονο περιβάλλον εργασίας.
Συνεχής εκπαίδευση και ανάπτυξη.
Ευκαιρίες επαγγελματικής εξέλιξης.
ai_core_responsibilities: The Finance & Insurance Advisor welcomes customers and identifies their needs regarding vehicle insurance and financing. They also collaborate with the sales manager to ensure a seamless customer experience and monitor sales of insurance and financing products.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have a high school diploma, preferably a degree in Insurance Science or Business Administration, and at least 2 years of experience in customer service and promoting automotive insurance or financing solutions. A certificate in insurance mediation and excellent computer skills are also required.
linkedin_org_description: Sfakianakis Group, with a continuous presence in the car market since 1961, is today one of the largest, most dynamic and growing groups in the automotive industry in Greece, with various activities covering a wide range of automotive services.

title: Business Analyst - Finance
description_text:
Our client URGENTLY requires a Business Analyst - Finance for 4 months + Contract in Darwin.
The Business Analyst will involve in reviewing, investigating, and documenting requirements for system design, solution architecture, and change implementation. You will capture existing business processes and defining proposed changes for ongoing improvements within Banking Service practices and provisioning via the finance systems suite. 
Skills and Experience required includes:
Experience in banking service delivery and real-time payment systems (preferably NPP).

title: E-Commerce Manager, Αλυσίδα Καταστημάτων Δερμοκαλλυντικών, Αργυρούπολη
description_text:
Η MANDYNAMIC είναι η μεγαλύτερη εταιρεία ανθρώπινου δυναμικού στην Ελλάδα, που εξειδικεύεται στα πεδία της αναζήτησης και της διάθεσης προσωπικού. Στην πολυετή λειτουργία της, η εταιρεία έχει εξυπηρετήσει αποτελεσματικά περισσότερες από 3.700 επιχειρήσεις και έχει διαθέσει πάνω από 90.000 εργαζόμενους.
Η MANDYNAMIC αναζητά E-Commerce Manager εκ μέρους Αλυσίδα Καταστημάτων Δερμοκαλλυντικών, στη Αργυρούπολη.
Αρμοδιότητες:
Διαχείριση και βελτιστοποίηση του e-shop (προϊόντα, τιμές, προσφορές, εμπειρία χρήστη)
Ανάπτυξη στρατηγικών για την βέλτιστη εμπειρία του πελάτη και την αύξηση των πωλήσεων
Παρακολούθηση πωλήσεων, KPIs & conversion rates και ανάλυση των στατιστικών δεδομένων, εντοπίζοντας τάσεις και ευκαιρίες για βελτιστοποίηση των στρατηγικών ηλεκτρονικού εμπορίου.
Συνεργασία με εμπορικό, marketing, αποθήκη και τις εσωτερικές ομάδες για την υλοποίηση του εμπορικού ημερολογίου (launches, καμπάνιες, sales).
Διαχείριση περιεχομένου ιστοσελίδας.
Διαχείριση και οργάνωση της αποθήκης.
Επίβλεψη της διαχείρισης των online παραγγελιών και της αναπλήρωσης αποθεμάτων.
Διενέργεια φυσικών απογραφών.
Επικοινωνία και συντονισμός των εργασιών των εξωτερικών συνεργατών για την υλοποίηση των πλάνων.
Απαραίτητα προσόντα:
Προϋπηρεσία σε e-commerce ή digital retail.
Κατανόηση online πωλήσεων & εμπορικής στρατηγικής.
Πτυχίο στη Διοίκηση Επιχειρήσεων, Marketing, Πληροφορική ή συναφή κλάδο.
Πολύ καλή γνώση συστημάτων CMS (ιδανικά Magento).
Εξοικείωση με συστήματα ERP.
Πολύ καλή γνώση εφαρμογών Office Suite.
Ευχέρεια στην τηλεφωνική επικοινωνία και στον γραπτό λόγο.
Άριστη γνώση αγγλικών (γραπτός και προφορικός λόγος).
Πολύ καλή Χρήση Η/Υ σε περιβάλλον Windows.
Ηands-on νοοτροπία, οργανωτικά προσόντα και επαγγελματική συμπεριφορά και συνείδηση.
Επικοινωνιακές ικανότητες και ευχάριστος θετικός χαρακτήρας.
Ομαδικό πνεύμα και διάθεση συνεργασίας.
Παροχές:
Ανταγωνιστικός μισθός
Ασφάλιση και πλήρης απασχόληση
Δυνατότητες εξέλιξης σε ένα δυναμικό περιβάλλον μόδας
Συνεχής εκπαίδευση και πρόσβαση σε νέες τεχνολογίες
ai_benefits: Development opportunities in a dynamic fashion environment
ai_core_responsibilities: The role involves managing and optimizing the e-shop, including products, pricing, promotions, and user experience, while also developing strategies to enhance customer experience and increase sales. Responsibilities extend to monitoring sales KPIs, collaborating with internal departments for campaign execution, managing website content, overseeing warehouse operations, and supervising online order fulfillment and inventory.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have prior experience in e-commerce or digital retail, coupled with an understanding of online sales and commercial strategy, holding a degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Informatics, or a related field. Essential technical skills include strong proficiency in CMS systems (ideally Magento) and familiarity with ERP systems, alongside excellent English communication skills and a proactive, organized, and team-oriented professional attitude.

Στα 10 χρόνια λειτουργία της η εταιρεία έχει προσφέρει απασχόληση σε περισσότερους από 65.000 εργαζόμενους μέσω του διευρυμένου δικτύου της σε όλη την χώρα και έχει συνεργασθεί με πάνω από 3.200 επιχειρήσεις. Η MANDYNAMIC παρέχει ολοκληρωμένες λύσεις για την αναζήτηση και διάθεση προσωπικού, συμβουλευτική υποστήριξη και επαγγελματικό προσανατολισμό.

title: Data Scientist
description_text:
· Design and develop generative AI infrastructure, including LLM deployment pipelines, vector databases, APIs, and agent orchestration frameworks
· Build LLM-powered applications such as chatbots, document processing systems, content generation tools, and intelligent assistants
· Design, implement, and maintain retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines, knowledge bases, and data ingestion workflows
· Apply prompt engineering, fine-tuning, and model selection techniques to optimize performance, cost, and latency
· Deploy, monitor, and evaluate production-grade GenAI solutions using LLMOps best practices (evaluation, prompt versioning, guardrails)
· Ensure security, scalability, reliability, and responsible AI compliance across all AI deployments
· Design and implement AI agents and multi-agent systems for workflow automation and decision support
· Collaborate with business, product, and engineering teams across subsidiaries to identify and deliver AI use cases
· Translate technical AI capabilities into actionable insights for stakeholders and leadership
· Track advancements in generative AI and integrate relevant innovations into business solutions
· Contribute to AI transformation initiatives and internal knowledge-sharing activities
· 2–5 years of experience in data science, machine learning, or applied AI, with strong Python skills and hands-on experience in large language models, prompt engineering, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)
· Experience with GenAI frameworks, API development, vector databases, and cloud AI platforms is required
· Familiarity with structured and unstructured data, text and document processing, embeddings, AI agents, and standard development tools such as Git/GitHub and Jupyter Notebooks is expected
· Fluency in Azerbaijani and English is required
ai_core_responsibilities: The Data Scientist will design and develop generative AI infrastructure and build LLM-powered applications. They will also collaborate with various teams to identify and deliver AI use cases while ensuring compliance and performance optimization.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have 2-5 years of experience in data science or related fields, with strong Python skills and hands-on experience with large language models. Familiarity with GenAI frameworks and cloud AI platforms is also required.

The Holding does not limit its private equity investment activities to any particular set of industries, but is primarily interested in the non-oil sector.

title: Business Development Executive
description_text:
Laundryheap is a leading on-demand laundry and dry-cleaning service, delivering fast, reliable laundry solutions to both businesses and end consumers. We work with hotels, serviced apartments, sports facilities, global brands, and other partners to offer seamless laundry experiences to their customers, while also engaging directly with individual clients. 
Role Purpose
We are seeking a high-performing Business Development Executive with B2B sales experience to aggressively drive new revenue through direct B2B opportunities. This role is focused on prospecting, pitching, and closing new business, building a strong pipeline of high-value partners, and converting opportunities into long-term revenue. You will play a key role in accelerating Laundryheap’s growth by winning new clients and opening new channels. This is a remote-first role, with occasional travel to meet prospects and attend industry events.
Key Responsibilities
Proactively identify, prospect, and close new B2B partnerships, including hotels, serviced apartments, gyms, salons, and other consumer-facing businesses.
Own the full new-business sales cycle, from outbound prospecting and lead generation through pitching, negotiation, and closing.
Consistently meet or exceed outbound activity targets, including daily/weekly KPIs for calls, emails, outreach, and meetings booked.
Build, manage, and maintain a robust sales pipeline that supports quarterly and annual revenue targets.
Deliver against defined revenue, deal volume, and conversion KPIs, including meetings booked, opportunities created, close rate, and average deal value.
Develop and execute sales strategies to drive rapid partner activation and strong end-customer adoption of Laundryheap services.
Leverage your existing network and industry contacts to accelerate pipeline growth and shorten sales cycles.
Maintain accurate and up-to-date records of all leads, opportunities, and sales activity within the CRM to support forecasting and performance reporting.
Collaborate closely with operations, customer success, and marketing teams to ensure smooth handover post-sale and a high-quality partner launch.
Represent Laundryheap at partner meetings, onboarding sessions, and occasional industry events or promotional activities.
Revenue & Targets
Own an individual new-business revenue target (monthly and quarterly).
Expected to maintain pipeline coverage of 3–5x quota.
Responsible for consistent net-new partner acquisition.
What we are looking for
3–6 years of sales or business development experience, with a proven track record in B2B or hybrid B2B/B2C roles.
Strong communication, negotiation, and relationship-building skills.
Self-motivated, organised, and comfortable working remotely.
Comfortable with moderate travel across London or assigned territories.
Proficient in CRM tools and pipeline management.
What You’ll Get
Remote-first flexibility with autonomy in managing your schedule.

title: (Fluent English) Gaming Support Consultant, RPG (remotely)

Who we are?
SupportYourApp is a global Support-as-a-Service leader, collaborating with top-tier tech companies like Mastercard, Calm, and MacPaw since 2010. We operate in 30+ countries and from 90+ countries, and support customers in 60 languages, helping SaaS, software, and hardware brands deliver secure, world-class customer and technical support.
Right now, we’re expanding our talent bench — a pool of skilled Customer Support Consultants who want to grow with us and be the first in line when new projects open.
If you’re ready to join a multicultural, multilingual community and grow professionally while working from home, this could be your next step.
What you will do:
Deliver outstanding customer support via chats and emails
Build strong and lasting customer relationships
Keep up with evolving tools and technology
Handle sensitive customer data with care and security
Apply the latest and greatest customer happiness practices
Maintain deep understanding of client solutions and meet KPI
Communicate with developers and cross-functional specialists

Excellent English communication skills (at C1 level or higher)
6+ months of experience in a gaming support role
Strong knowledge and passion for role-playing games (RPGs), mobile games, and streaming platforms is a must
Experience providing support via chats and emails in English is a must
CRM systems expertise

Positive, proactive and responsible attitude
Personal computer (at least 8Gb of RAM) with a stable internet connection (minimum 50 Mbps–download and 40 Mbps–upload)

Provide services during flexible hours
Opportunity to cooperate fully remotely
Inclusive international environment
Compensation in USD
Rewards for referring friends
Balance between project workload and personal time, but also – internal health policy
Responsive leadership interested in your development and long-lasting cooperation
Greenhouse conditions for self-development
A culture built on trust, with no time-tracking requirements

title: Head of Data Intelligence
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Head of Data Intelligence in Mexico.
This is a senior leadership role with the opportunity to significantly impact an organization’s data strategy and analytics capabilities. You will lead a team of analysts, build a data-driven culture, and ensure teams across the business have the insights they need to make informed decisions. This role spans strategic planning, operational execution, and the development of analytical frameworks that drive customer engagement, retention, and growth. You will partner cross-functionally with Engineering, Growth, and Go-to-Market teams to implement best practices, scale data infrastructure, and unlock actionable insights. Ideal candidates thrive in a fast-moving environment, enjoy solving complex problems with data, and can translate analysis into clear, business-oriented recommendations.
\n

Accountabilities:
Build, develop, and lead a high-performing data intelligence team to deliver insights on user behavior, platform usage, and business outcomes.
Own the end-to-end data strategy, ensuring analytics scale effectively across all business functions.
Partner with Engineering, Growth, and Go-to-Market leaders to develop analytical frameworks, dashboards, and tools for data-driven decision-making.
Operationalize key metrics for every business area, creating dashboards and reporting frameworks to measure performance and inform strategy.
Champion data literacy across the organization, embedding best practices for analysis, experimentation, and insight-driven decision-making.
Turn loosely defined business problems into structured analyses and actionable recommendations.
Identify opportunities to optimize customer conversion, retention, engagement, and lifetime value using both quantitative and qualitative data.
Ensure the integrity, accuracy, and reliability of all analytical outputs through best-in-class frameworks and testing structures.
Requirements:
8+ years of experience in analytical roles within SaaS, developer tools, or infrastructure companies.
3+ years of leadership experience managing and developing analytical teams.
Strong proficiency in SQL and deep familiarity with modern data warehouse and analytics tools (BigQuery, dbt, Hex, Tableau, PostHog).
Experience scaling a data-driven team, from data instrumentation and dashboards to experimentation and insight discovery.
Exceptional ability to translate complex data into actionable insights for diverse stakeholders.
Strategic problem-solving skills, capable of structuring ambiguous challenges into practical analyses.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
Self-starter with strong prioritization skills, bias for action, and ownership over results.
Comfortable working in a fully remote, asynchronous environment with global teams.
Benefits:
Fully remote work from anywhere, with support for co-working or WeWork memberships.
ESOP (equity ownership) to share in the company’s growth.
Tech allowance to create your ideal work setup (laptop, monitor, headphones, etc.).
Comprehensive health insurance coverage for employees and dependents.
Annual off-sites for team connection, collaboration, and fun.
Flexible, asynchronous work schedule with autonomy to manage your own time.
Annual professional development allowance for courses, books, conferences, and other learning opportunities.

\n
Why Apply Through Jobgether?
We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
Why Apply Through Jobgether? 

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.


#LI-CL1
ai_core_responsibilities: Lead a high-performing data intelligence team to deliver insights on user behavior and business outcomes. Own the end-to-end data strategy and partner with various teams to implement analytical frameworks and tools.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have 8+ years of experience in analytical roles and 3+ years of leadership experience. Strong proficiency in SQL and familiarity with modern analytics tools is required.

title: Senior Data Research Analyst - REMOTE
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Research Data Analyst - REMOTE. This role plays a critical part in leveraging diverse data sources to enhance research outcomes within the field of anesthesiology and perioperative medicine. The selected candidate will engage in qualitative and quantitative data analysis, database development, and management, as well as pipeline development that supports ongoing scientific inquiry. There is a strong emphasis on utilizing advanced neuroscience methods and technologies to drive evidence-based improvements in patient care. This position offers flexibility and autonomy while contributing to multidisciplinary research initiatives aimed at advancing human health.
\n

Accountabilities
Develop and manage data analysis pipelines for research projects
Create and oversee comprehensive databases for multimodal imaging and behavior data
Participate in collaborative meetings and set project goals with lab members
Implement data processing techniques for motion correction and region segmentation
Contribute to the design and execution of research experiments

Requirements
PhD in a relevant field, or equivalent experience
Master’s degree plus 4 years of relevant experience, or Bachelor's degree plus 6 years of experience
Strong programming and computational skills
Ability to work autonomously and in a team environment
Curiosity about neurobiological research and willingness to participate in lab meetings
Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

Benefits
Flexible work schedule with potential for remote work
Collaborative and inclusive work environment
Opportunity to work on innovative research projects
Professional development opportunities
Supportive team culture emphasizing mentorship and growth

title: Head of OPM
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Head of OPM in Portugal.
This leadership role offers the opportunity to act as the strategic and operational driver for a high-impact blockchain network, overseeing growth, performance, and ecosystem development. You will operate as the CEO of the network, influencing product, business development, partnerships, and marketing to transform it into a leading platform for DeFi, stablecoins, and next-generation on-chain applications. The role combines P&L ownership, strategic vision, and cross-functional influence, requiring a balance of data-driven decision making, stakeholder management, and hands-on execution. You will define key metrics, scale ecosystem initiatives, and ensure the network serves as both a proving ground and a neutral launchpad for enterprises. Success in this position demands strong analytical, technical, and strategic skills, along with credibility in the crypto ecosystem and the ability to navigate a fast-moving, highly collaborative environment.
\n

Accountabilities:
Define and execute the long-term vision, north-star metrics, and strategic positioning of the blockchain network.
Own overall P&L and growth trajectory, balancing performance, stability, and ecosystem alignment.
Lead quarterly planning and cross-functional alignment across Product, BD, Marketing, and Partnerships.
Drive ecosystem expansion, securing top-tier protocol integrations and partnerships to increase TVL, user adoption, and activity.
Collaborate with Product and Engineering teams to prioritize network-specific roadmap features, upgrades, and technical feedback loops.
Partner with Marketing to craft the network’s narrative, oversee launch readiness, and act as a public-facing spokesperson where appropriate.
Establish clear reporting structures for metrics, governance, and stakeholder communication.
Requirements:
6–10+ years of experience in crypto-native or blockchain ecosystems, including DeFi, L1/L2, or protocol leadership.
Proven track record as a strategic generalist capable of driving both technical and growth initiatives.
Experience building and scaling ecosystems from inception to maturity, with data-driven decision-making expertise.
Strong cross-functional collaboration skills, able to influence teams and stakeholders without direct authority.
Credible voice with developers, partners, and governance participants, capable of representing the network publicly.
Analytical, operational, and strategic thinker with experience in P&L management and ecosystem growth initiatives.
Exceptional communication and leadership skills to manage complex projects and align multiple orgs.
Benefits:
Competitive compensation package with fully paid medical, dental, and vision coverage.
401K plan with 4% employer match.
Fully remote work with flexibility to operate from anywhere.
Inclusive, diverse, and collaborative work environment with global teammates.
Opportunities for professional growth and impact within a leading blockchain network.
Supportive culture focused on long-term development and meaningful contributions.

title: Head of OPM
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Head of OPM in Italy.
This leadership role offers the opportunity to act as the strategic and operational driver for a high-impact blockchain network, overseeing growth, performance, and ecosystem development. You will operate as the CEO of the network, influencing product, business development, partnerships, and marketing to transform it into a leading platform for DeFi, stablecoins, and next-generation on-chain applications. The role combines P&L ownership, strategic vision, and cross-functional influence, requiring a balance of data-driven decision making, stakeholder management, and hands-on execution. You will define key metrics, scale ecosystem initiatives, and ensure the network serves as both a proving ground and a neutral launchpad for enterprises. Success in this position demands strong analytical, technical, and strategic skills, along with credibility in the crypto ecosystem and the ability to navigate a fast-moving, highly collaborative environment.
\n

Accountabilities:
Define and execute the long-term vision, north-star metrics, and strategic positioning of the blockchain network.
Own overall P&L and growth trajectory, balancing performance, stability, and ecosystem alignment.
Lead quarterly planning and cross-functional alignment across Product, BD, Marketing, and Partnerships.
Drive ecosystem expansion, securing top-tier protocol integrations and partnerships to increase TVL, user adoption, and activity.
Collaborate with Product and Engineering teams to prioritize network-specific roadmap features, upgrades, and technical feedback loops.
Partner with Marketing to craft the network’s narrative, oversee launch readiness, and act as a public-facing spokesperson where appropriate.
Establish clear reporting structures for metrics, governance, and stakeholder communication.
Requirements:
6–10+ years of experience in crypto-native or blockchain ecosystems, including DeFi, L1/L2, or protocol leadership.
Proven track record as a strategic generalist capable of driving both technical and growth initiatives.
Experience building and scaling ecosystems from inception to maturity, with data-driven decision-making expertise.
Strong cross-functional collaboration skills, able to influence teams and stakeholders without direct authority.
Credible voice with developers, partners, and governance participants, capable of representing the network publicly.
Analytical, operational, and strategic thinker with experience in P&L management and ecosystem growth initiatives.
Exceptional communication and leadership skills to manage complex projects and align multiple orgs.
Benefits:
Competitive compensation package with fully paid medical, dental, and vision coverage.
401K plan with 4% employer match.
Fully remote work with flexibility to operate from anywhere.
Inclusive, diverse, and collaborative work environment with global teammates.
Opportunities for professional growth and impact within a leading blockchain network.
Supportive culture focused on long-term development and meaningful contributions.

\n

We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. title: Lead Software Manager - Remote
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Software Engineering Manager - REMOTE. In this role, you will lead a talented team of engineers to develop new features and ensure the scalability of solutions. You will work closely with product managers and the engineering team, driving project execution while fostering a culture of high performance and collaboration. Your leadership will empower team members to achieve their full potential and deliver meaningful value to our users. Join us in transforming the legal sector through innovative technology.
\n

Accountabilities
Grow & coach a high-performing team – hire, mentor, and develop engineers for their best work.
Drive outcomes, not just output – clarify goals with Product and unblock teams to deliver value.
Own sustainable delivery – maintain project schedules through proactive planning and communication.
Shape team dynamics – gather feedback and champion modern engineering practices.

Requirements
5+ years of professional software engineering experience, including team leadership.
Proven ability to build engaged and autonomous teams that achieve ambitious goals.
Strong technical background in modern web application development (C#, Node.js, TypeScript, AWS, etc.).
Passion for continuous learning and clear communication in a hybrid environment.

Benefits
Dynamic and rapidly growing environment focused on organizational success.
Medical, Dental, & Vision Insurance for full-time employees.
Competitive and fair compensation package.
Maternity & paternity leave for full-time employees.
Short & long-term disability benefits.
Opportunity to learn from a dedicated leadership team.
Access to top-of-the-line company swag.

title: Head of Data Intelligence
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Head of Data Intelligence in India.
This is a senior leadership role with the opportunity to significantly impact an organization’s data strategy and analytics capabilities. You will lead a team of analysts, build a data-driven culture, and ensure teams across the business have the insights they need to make informed decisions. This role spans strategic planning, operational execution, and the development of analytical frameworks that drive customer engagement, retention, and growth. You will partner cross-functionally with Engineering, Growth, and Go-to-Market teams to implement best practices, scale data infrastructure, and unlock actionable insights. Ideal candidates thrive in a fast-moving environment, enjoy solving complex problems with data, and can translate analysis into clear, business-oriented recommendations.
\n

Accountabilities:
Build, develop, and lead a high-performing data intelligence team to deliver insights on user behavior, platform usage, and business outcomes.
Own the end-to-end data strategy, ensuring analytics scale effectively across all business functions.
Partner with Engineering, Growth, and Go-to-Market leaders to develop analytical frameworks, dashboards, and tools for data-driven decision-making.
Operationalize key metrics for every business area, creating dashboards and reporting frameworks to measure performance and inform strategy.
Champion data literacy across the organization, embedding best practices for analysis, experimentation, and insight-driven decision-making.
Turn loosely defined business problems into structured analyses and actionable recommendations.
Identify opportunities to optimize customer conversion, retention, engagement, and lifetime value using both quantitative and qualitative data.

title: Head of OPM
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Head of OPM in Ireland.
This leadership role offers the opportunity to act as the strategic and operational driver for a high-impact blockchain network, overseeing growth, performance, and ecosystem development. You will operate as the CEO of the network, influencing product, business development, partnerships, and marketing to transform it into a leading platform for DeFi, stablecoins, and next-generation on-chain applications. The role combines P&L ownership, strategic vision, and cross-functional influence, requiring a balance of data-driven decision making, stakeholder management, and hands-on execution. You will define key metrics, scale ecosystem initiatives, and ensure the network serves as both a proving ground and a neutral launchpad for enterprises. Success in this position demands strong analytical, technical, and strategic skills, along with credibility in the crypto ecosystem and the ability to navigate a fast-moving, highly collaborative environment.
\n

Accountabilities:
Define and execute the long-term vision, north-star metrics, and strategic positioning of the blockchain network.
Own overall P&L and growth trajectory, balancing performance, stability, and ecosystem alignment.
Lead quarterly planning and cross-functional alignment across Product, BD, Marketing, and Partnerships.
Drive ecosystem expansion, securing top-tier protocol integrations and partnerships to increase TVL, user adoption, and activity.
Collaborate with Product and Engineering teams to prioritize network-specific roadmap features, upgrades, and technical feedback loops.
Partner with Marketing to craft the network’s narrative, oversee launch readiness, and act as a public-facing spokesperson where appropriate.
Establish clear reporting structures for metrics, governance, and stakeholder communication.
Requirements:
6–10+ years of experience in crypto-native or blockchain ecosystems, including DeFi, L1/L2, or protocol leadership.
Proven track record as a strategic generalist capable of driving both technical and growth initiatives.
Experience building and scaling ecosystems from inception to maturity, with data-driven decision-making expertise.
Strong cross-functional collaboration skills, able to influence teams and stakeholders without direct authority.
Credible voice with developers, partners, and governance participants, capable of representing the network publicly.
Analytical, operational, and strategic thinker with experience in P&L management and ecosystem growth initiatives.
Exceptional communication and leadership skills to manage complex projects and align multiple orgs.
Benefits:
Competitive compensation package with fully paid medical, dental, and vision coverage.
401K plan with 4% employer match.
Fully remote work with flexibility to operate from anywhere.
Inclusive, diverse, and collaborative work environment with global teammates.
Opportunities for professional growth and impact within a leading blockchain network.
Supportive culture focused on long-term development and meaningful contributions.

\n
Why Apply Through Jobgether?
We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
Why Apply Through Jobgether? 

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

Strong analytical, operational, and communication skills are essential for managing complex projects and aligning multiple organizations.

title: Head of OPM
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Head of OPM in Austria.
This leadership role offers the opportunity to act as the strategic and operational driver for a high-impact blockchain network, overseeing growth, performance, and ecosystem development. You will operate as the CEO of the network, influencing product, business development, partnerships, and marketing to transform it into a leading platform for DeFi, stablecoins, and next-generation on-chain applications. The role combines P&L ownership, strategic vision, and cross-functional influence, requiring a balance of data-driven decision making, stakeholder management, and hands-on execution. You will define key metrics, scale ecosystem initiatives, and ensure the network serves as both a proving ground and a neutral launchpad for enterprises. Success in this position demands strong analytical, technical, and strategic skills, along with credibility in the crypto ecosystem and the ability to navigate a fast-moving, highly collaborative environment.
\n

Accountabilities:
Define and execute the long-term vision, north-star metrics, and strategic positioning of the blockchain network.
Own overall P&L and growth trajectory, balancing performance, stability, and ecosystem alignment.
Lead quarterly planning and cross-functional alignment across Product, BD, Marketing, and Partnerships.
Drive ecosystem expansion, securing top-tier protocol integrations and partnerships to increase TVL, user adoption, and activity.
Collaborate with Product and Engineering teams to prioritize network-specific roadmap features, upgrades, and technical feedback loops.
Partner with Marketing to craft the network’s narrative, oversee launch readiness, and act as a public-facing spokesperson where appropriate.
Establish clear reporting structures for metrics, governance, and stakeholder communication.
Requirements:
6–10+ years of experience in crypto-native or blockchain ecosystems, including DeFi, L1/L2, or protocol leadership.
Proven track record as a strategic generalist capable of driving both technical and growth initiatives.
Experience building and scaling ecosystems from inception to maturity, with data-driven decision-making expertise.
Strong cross-functional collaboration skills, able to influence teams and stakeholders without direct authority.
Credible voice with developers, partners, and governance participants, capable of representing the network publicly.
Analytical, operational, and strategic thinker with experience in P&L management and ecosystem growth initiatives.
Exceptional communication and leadership skills to manage complex projects and align multiple orgs.
Benefits:
Competitive compensation package with fully paid medical, dental, and vision coverage.
401K plan with 4% employer match.
Fully remote work with flexibility to operate from anywhere.
Inclusive, diverse, and collaborative work environment with global teammates.
Opportunities for professional growth and impact within a leading blockchain network.
Supportive culture focused on long-term development and meaningful contributions.

\n
Why Apply Through Jobgether?
We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
Why Apply Through Jobgether? 

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

Strong analytical, operational, and communication skills are essential for managing complex projects and aligning multiple organizations.

title: Head of Data Intelligence
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Head of Data Intelligence in South Africa.
This is a senior leadership role with the opportunity to significantly impact an organization’s data strategy and analytics capabilities. You will lead a team of analysts, build a data-driven culture, and ensure teams across the business have the insights they need to make informed decisions. This role spans strategic planning, operational execution, and the development of analytical frameworks that drive customer engagement, retention, and growth. You will partner cross-functionally with Engineering, Growth, and Go-to-Market teams to implement best practices, scale data infrastructure, and unlock actionable insights. Ideal candidates thrive in a fast-moving environment, enjoy solving complex problems with data, and can translate analysis into clear, business-oriented recommendations.
\n

Accountabilities:
Build, develop, and lead a high-performing data intelligence team to deliver insights on user behavior, platform usage, and business outcomes.
Own the end-to-end data strategy, ensuring analytics scale effectively across all business functions.
Partner with Engineering, Growth, and Go-to-Market leaders to develop analytical frameworks, dashboards, and tools for data-driven decision-making.
Operationalize key metrics for every business area, creating dashboards and reporting frameworks to measure performance and inform strategy.
Champion data literacy across the organization, embedding best practices for analysis, experimentation, and insight-driven decision-making.
Turn loosely defined business problems into structured analyses and actionable recommendations.
Identify opportunities to optimize customer conversion, retention, engagement, and lifetime value using both quantitative and qualitative data.
Ensure the integrity, accuracy, and reliability of all analytical outputs through best-in-class frameworks and testing structures.
Requirements:
8+ years of experience in analytical roles within SaaS, developer tools, or infrastructure companies.
3+ years of leadership experience managing and developing analytical teams.
Strong proficiency in SQL and deep familiarity with modern data warehouse and analytics tools (BigQuery, dbt, Hex, Tableau, PostHog).
Experience scaling a data-driven team, from data instrumentation and dashboards to experimentation and insight discovery.
Exceptional ability to translate complex data into actionable insights for diverse stakeholders.
Strategic problem-solving skills, capable of structuring ambiguous challenges into practical analyses.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
Self-starter with strong prioritization skills, bias for action, and ownership over results.
Comfortable working in a fully remote, asynchronous environment with global teams.
Benefits:
Fully remote work from anywhere, with support for co-working or WeWork memberships.
ESOP (equity ownership) to share in the company’s growth.
Tech allowance to create your ideal work setup (laptop, monitor, headphones, etc.).
Comprehensive health insurance coverage for employees and dependents.
Annual off-sites for team connection, collaboration, and fun.
Flexible, asynchronous work schedule with autonomy to manage your own time.
Annual professional development allowance for courses, books, conferences, and other learning opportunities.

\n
Why Apply Through Jobgether?
We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
Why Apply Through Jobgether? 

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have 8+ years of experience in analytical roles and 3+ years in leadership positions. Strong proficiency in SQL and familiarity with modern data tools is essential.

title: Head of OPM
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Head of OPM in Belgium.
This leadership role offers the opportunity to act as the strategic and operational driver for a high-impact blockchain network, overseeing growth, performance, and ecosystem development. You will operate as the CEO of the network, influencing product, business development, partnerships, and marketing to transform it into a leading platform for DeFi, stablecoins, and next-generation on-chain applications. The role combines P&L ownership, strategic vision, and cross-functional influence, requiring a balance of data-driven decision making, stakeholder management, and hands-on execution. You will define key metrics, scale ecosystem initiatives, and ensure the network serves as both a proving ground and a neutral launchpad for enterprises. Success in this position demands strong analytical, technical, and strategic skills, along with credibility in the crypto ecosystem and the ability to navigate a fast-moving, highly collaborative environment.
\n

Accountabilities:
Define and execute the long-term vision, north-star metrics, and strategic positioning of the blockchain network.
Own overall P&L and growth trajectory, balancing performance, stability, and ecosystem alignment.
Lead quarterly planning and cross-functional alignment across Product, BD, Marketing, and Partnerships.
Drive ecosystem expansion, securing top-tier protocol integrations and partnerships to increase TVL, user adoption, and activity.
Collaborate with Product and Engineering teams to prioritize network-specific roadmap features, upgrades, and technical feedback loops.
Partner with Marketing to craft the network’s narrative, oversee launch readiness, and act as a public-facing spokesperson where appropriate.
Establish clear reporting structures for metrics, governance, and stakeholder communication.
Requirements:
6–10+ years of experience in crypto-native or blockchain ecosystems, including DeFi, L1/L2, or protocol leadership.
Proven track record as a strategic generalist capable of driving both technical and growth initiatives.
Experience building and scaling ecosystems from inception to maturity, with data-driven decision-making expertise.
Strong cross-functional collaboration skills, able to influence teams and stakeholders without direct authority.
Credible voice with developers, partners, and governance participants, capable of representing the network publicly.
Analytical, operational, and strategic thinker with experience in P&L management and ecosystem growth initiatives.
Exceptional communication and leadership skills to manage complex projects and align multiple orgs.
Benefits:
Competitive compensation package with fully paid medical, dental, and vision coverage.
401K plan with 4% employer match.
Fully remote work with flexibility to operate from anywhere.
Inclusive, diverse, and collaborative work environment with global teammates.
Opportunities for professional growth and impact within a leading blockchain network.
Supportive culture focused on long-term development and meaningful contributions.

\n
Why Apply Through Jobgether?
We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
Why Apply Through Jobgether?

This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

title: Head of Data Intelligence
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Head of Data Intelligence in Portugal.
This is a senior leadership role with the opportunity to significantly impact an organization’s data strategy and analytics capabilities. You will lead a team of analysts, build a data-driven culture, and ensure teams across the business have the insights they need to make informed decisions. This role spans strategic planning, operational execution, and the development of analytical frameworks that drive customer engagement, retention, and growth. You will partner cross-functionally with Engineering, Growth, and Go-to-Market teams to implement best practices, scale data infrastructure, and unlock actionable insights. Ideal candidates thrive in a fast-moving environment, enjoy solving complex problems with data, and can translate analysis into clear, business-oriented recommendations.
\n

Accountabilities:
Build, develop, and lead a high-performing data intelligence team to deliver insights on user behavior, platform usage, and business outcomes.
Own the end-to-end data strategy, ensuring analytics scale effectively across all business functions.
Partner with Engineering, Growth, and Go-to-Market leaders to develop analytical frameworks, dashboards, and tools for data-driven decision-making.
Operationalize key metrics for every business area, creating dashboards and reporting frameworks to measure performance and inform strategy.
Champion data literacy across the organization, embedding best practices for analysis, experimentation, and insight-driven decision-making.
Turn loosely defined business problems into structured analyses and actionable recommendations.
Identify opportunities to optimize customer conversion, retention, engagement, and lifetime value using both quantitative and qualitative data.
Ensure the integrity, accuracy, and reliability of all analytical outputs through best-in-class frameworks and testing structures.
Requirements:
8+ years of experience in analytical roles within SaaS, developer tools, or infrastructure companies.
3+ years of leadership experience managing and developing analytical teams.
Strong proficiency in SQL and deep familiarity with modern data warehouse and analytics tools (BigQuery, dbt, Hex, Tableau, PostHog).
Experience scaling a data-driven team, from data instrumentation and dashboards to experimentation and insight discovery.
Exceptional ability to translate complex data into actionable insights for diverse stakeholders.
Strategic problem-solving skills, capable of structuring ambiguous challenges into practical analyses.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
Self-starter with strong prioritization skills, bias for action, and ownership over results.
Comfortable working in a fully remote, asynchronous environment with global teams.
Benefits:
Fully remote work from anywhere, with support for co-working or WeWork memberships.
ESOP (equity ownership) to share in the company’s growth.
Tech allowance to create your ideal work setup (laptop, monitor, headphones, etc.).
Comprehensive health insurance coverage for employees and dependents.
Annual off-sites for team connection, collaboration, and fun.
Flexible, asynchronous work schedule with autonomy to manage your own time.
Annual professional development allowance for courses, books, conferences, and other learning opportunities.

\n
Why Apply Through Jobgether?
We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
Why Apply Through Jobgether?

This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

title: Head of Data Intelligence
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Head of Data Intelligence in Ireland.
This is a senior leadership role with the opportunity to significantly impact an organization’s data strategy and analytics capabilities. You will lead a team of analysts, build a data-driven culture, and ensure teams across the business have the insights they need to make informed decisions. This role spans strategic planning, operational execution, and the development of analytical frameworks that drive customer engagement, retention, and growth. You will partner cross-functionally with Engineering, Growth, and Go-to-Market teams to implement best practices, scale data infrastructure, and unlock actionable insights. Ideal candidates thrive in a fast-moving environment, enjoy solving complex problems with data, and can translate analysis into clear, business-oriented recommendations.
\n

Accountabilities:
Build, develop, and lead a high-performing data intelligence team to deliver insights on user behavior, platform usage, and business outcomes.
Own the end-to-end data strategy, ensuring analytics scale effectively across all business functions.
Partner with Engineering, Growth, and Go-to-Market leaders to develop analytical frameworks, dashboards, and tools for data-driven decision-making.
Operationalize key metrics for every business area, creating dashboards and reporting frameworks to measure performance and inform strategy.
Champion data literacy across the organization, embedding best practices for analysis, experimentation, and insight-driven decision-making.
Turn loosely defined business problems into structured analyses and actionable recommendations.
Identify opportunities to optimize customer conversion, retention, engagement, and lifetime value using both quantitative and qualitative data.
Ensure the integrity, accuracy, and reliability of all analytical outputs through best-in-class frameworks and testing structures.
Requirements:
8+ years of experience in analytical roles within SaaS, developer tools, or infrastructure companies.
3+ years of leadership experience managing and developing analytical teams.
Strong proficiency in SQL and deep familiarity with modern data warehouse and analytics tools (BigQuery, dbt, Hex, Tableau, PostHog).
Experience scaling a data-driven team, from data instrumentation and dashboards to experimentation and insight discovery.
Exceptional ability to translate complex data into actionable insights for diverse stakeholders.
Strategic problem-solving skills, capable of structuring ambiguous challenges into practical analyses.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
Self-starter with strong prioritization skills, bias for action, and ownership over results.
Comfortable working in a fully remote, asynchronous environment with global teams.
Benefits:
Fully remote work from anywhere, with support for co-working or WeWork memberships.

Tech allowance to create your ideal work setup (laptop, monitor, headphones, etc.).

title: Head of Data Intelligence
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Head of Data Intelligence in Finland.
This is a senior leadership role with the opportunity to significantly impact an organization’s data strategy and analytics capabilities. You will lead a team of analysts, build a data-driven culture, and ensure teams across the business have the insights they need to make informed decisions. This role spans strategic planning, operational execution, and the development of analytical frameworks that drive customer engagement, retention, and growth. You will partner cross-functionally with Engineering, Growth, and Go-to-Market teams to implement best practices, scale data infrastructure, and unlock actionable insights. Ideal candidates thrive in a fast-moving environment, enjoy solving complex problems with data, and can translate analysis into clear, business-oriented recommendations.
\n

Accountabilities:
Build, develop, and lead a high-performing data intelligence team to deliver insights on user behavior, platform usage, and business outcomes.
Own the end-to-end data strategy, ensuring analytics scale effectively across all business functions.
Partner with Engineering, Growth, and Go-to-Market leaders to develop analytical frameworks, dashboards, and tools for data-driven decision-making.
Operationalize key metrics for every business area, creating dashboards and reporting frameworks to measure performance and inform strategy.
Champion data literacy across the organization, embedding best practices for analysis, experimentation, and insight-driven decision-making.
Turn loosely defined business problems into structured analyses and actionable recommendations.
Identify opportunities to optimize customer conversion, retention, engagement, and lifetime value using both quantitative and qualitative data.
Ensure the integrity, accuracy, and reliability of all analytical outputs through best-in-class frameworks and testing structures.
Requirements:
8+ years of experience in analytical roles within SaaS, developer tools, or infrastructure companies.
3+ years of leadership experience managing and developing analytical teams.
Strong proficiency in SQL and deep familiarity with modern data warehouse and analytics tools (BigQuery, dbt, Hex, Tableau, PostHog).
Experience scaling a data-driven team, from data instrumentation and dashboards to experimentation and insight discovery.
Exceptional ability to translate complex data into actionable insights for diverse stakeholders.
Strategic problem-solving skills, capable of structuring ambiguous challenges into practical analyses.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
Self-starter with strong prioritization skills, bias for action, and ownership over results.

title: Senior Research Data Analyst - REMOTE
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Research Data Analyst - REMOTE. This role plays a critical part in leveraging diverse data sources to enhance research outcomes within the field of anesthesiology and perioperative medicine. The selected candidate will engage in qualitative and quantitative data analysis, database development, and management, as well as pipeline development that supports ongoing scientific inquiry. There is a strong emphasis on utilizing advanced neuroscience methods and technologies to drive evidence-based improvements in patient care. This position offers flexibility and autonomy while contributing to multidisciplinary research initiatives aimed at advancing human health.
\n

Accountabilities
Develop and manage data analysis pipelines for research projects
Create and oversee comprehensive databases for multimodal imaging and behavior data
Participate in collaborative meetings and set project goals with lab members
Implement data processing techniques for motion correction and region segmentation
Contribute to the design and execution of research experiments

Requirements
PhD in a relevant field, or equivalent experience
Master’s degree plus 4 years of relevant experience, or Bachelor's degree plus 6 years of experience
Strong programming and computational skills
Ability to work autonomously and in a team environment
Curiosity about neurobiological research and willingness to participate in lab meetings

title: Field Marketing Manager (Remote from Hungary)
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Field Marketing Manager in Hungary.
This role offers the chance to lead and execute high-impact marketing events that enhance brand visibility, strengthen community engagement, and drive business growth. You will manage a diverse portfolio of events, from sponsored trade shows to developer community programs and flagship conferences, ensuring seamless execution and measurable results. As a key contributor to the marketing team, you will collaborate cross-functionally with Sales, Partnerships, DevRel, and other teams to align goals and deliver exceptional attendee experiences. The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced, remote environment, is highly organized, and brings creativity, strategic thinking, and operational excellence to every event. Travel of up to 50% is expected, and the role demands strong project management, stakeholder coordination, and analytical insights to continually improve program effectiveness.
\n

Accountabilities:
Own planning, execution, and follow-up for a portfolio of events including sponsored, hosted, and community programs.
Evaluate event opportunities and provide recommendations on time, effort, and budget allocation.
Manage event budgets, vendors, contracts, production logistics, and on-site operations to ensure smooth execution.
Partner with cross-functional teams (Marketing, Sales, Partnerships, DevRel, Design, Ops, Finance, Legal) to align objectives and deliver high-quality experiences.
Oversee attendee experience, including booth setup, demos, staffing prep, and branding details.
Support event promotion, registration, attendee communication, and post-event follow-up in collaboration with Operations.
Track and analyze event performance, contributing to reporting, process improvements, and the development of repeatable playbooks.
Requirements:
4–7+ years of experience in event marketing or field marketing, preferably within B2B SaaS.
Proven ability to manage end-to-end event execution with strong attention to detail.
Excellent project management skills, capable of juggling multiple deadlines and stakeholders.
Comfortable managing budgets, vendor relationships, and contracts.
Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to build relationships across teams.
Experience thriving in fast-paced, lean, remote, and asynchronous work environments.
Highly organized, execution-focused, and analytical, using metrics to inform decision-making and improve outcomes.
Ability to travel up to 50% as required.
Benefits:
Fully remote work with flexibility to manage your own schedule and location.
ESOP (equity ownership) to share in the company’s growth.
Tech allowance to set up an ideal remote workspace (laptop, monitor, headphones, etc.).
Health insurance coverage for employees and dependents.

title: Remote Senior Data Engineer
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Research Data Analyst - REMOTE. This role plays a critical part in leveraging diverse data sources to enhance research outcomes within the field of anesthesiology and perioperative medicine. The selected candidate will engage in qualitative and quantitative data analysis, database development, and management, as well as pipeline development that supports ongoing scientific inquiry. There is a strong emphasis on utilizing advanced neuroscience methods and technologies to drive evidence-based improvements in patient care. This position offers flexibility and autonomy while contributing to multidisciplinary research initiatives aimed at advancing human health.
\n

Develop and manage data analysis pipelines for research projects

Ability to work autonomously and in a team environment

title: Lead Research Data Analyst (Remote)
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Research Data Analyst - REMOTE. This role plays a critical part in leveraging diverse data sources to enhance research outcomes within the field of anesthesiology and perioperative medicine. The selected candidate will engage in qualitative and quantitative data analysis, database development, and management, as well as pipeline development that supports ongoing scientific inquiry. There is a strong emphasis on utilizing advanced neuroscience methods and technologies to drive evidence-based improvements in patient care. This position offers flexibility and autonomy while contributing to multidisciplinary research initiatives aimed at advancing human health.
\n

Accountabilities
Develop and manage data analysis pipelines for research projects
Create and oversee comprehensive databases for multimodal imaging and behavior data
Participate in collaborative meetings and set project goals with lab members
Implement data processing techniques for motion correction and region segmentation
Contribute to the design and execution of research experiments

Requirements
PhD in a relevant field, or equivalent experience
Master’s degree plus 4 years of relevant experience, or Bachelor's degree plus 6 years of experience
Strong programming and computational skills
Ability to work autonomously and in a team environment
Curiosity about neurobiological research and willingness to participate in lab meetings
Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

Benefits
Flexible work schedule with potential for remote work
Collaborative and inclusive work environment
Opportunity to work on innovative research projects
Professional development opportunities
Supportive team culture emphasizing mentorship and growth

\n
Why Apply Through Jobgether?
We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

title: Head of Data Intelligence
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Head of Data Intelligence in Australia.
This is a senior leadership role with the opportunity to significantly impact an organization’s data strategy and analytics capabilities. Champion data literacy across the organization, embedding best practices for analysis, experimentation, and insight-driven decision-making.
Turn loosely defined business problems into structured analyses and actionable recommendations.
Identify opportunities to optimize customer conversion, retention, engagement, and lifetime value using both quantitative and qualitative data.
Ensure the integrity, accuracy, and reliability of all analytical outputs through best-in-class frameworks and testing structures.

Strategic problem-solving skills, capable of structuring ambiguous challenges into practical analyses.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
Self-starter with strong prioritization skills, bias for action, and ownership over results.

title: Remote Lead Project Manager
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Remote Implementation Project Manager. In this role, you will serve as the primary contact for client engagements, ensuring their satisfaction through effective leadership and communication. You will collaborate with various teams to manage tasks, risks, and timelines, guaranteeing that projects are delivered successfully and on schedule. You will also help clients optimize their investments in technology by delivering valuable solutions.

Monitor and manage project risks while proactively addressing potential issues.
Act as the main point of contact for clients, ensuring clear communication.
Build strong relationships with stakeholders at all organization levels.
Ensure projects adhere to budgets, providing timely updates to clients.

5+ years of project management experience, preferably in legal software.
Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience.
Proficient with collaboration and project tracking tools.
Strong communication, problem-solving, and negotiation skills.
Project Management Professional (PMP) certification is a plus.
Experience with Marketing Technology preferred but not required.

Flexible remote work options.

title: Field Marketing Manager (Remote from South Korea)
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Field Marketing Manager in South Korea.
This role offers the chance to lead and execute high-impact marketing events that enhance brand visibility, strengthen community engagement, and drive business growth. You will manage a diverse portfolio of events, from sponsored trade shows to developer community programs and flagship conferences, ensuring seamless execution and measurable results. As a key contributor to the marketing team, you will collaborate cross-functionally with Sales, Partnerships, DevRel, and other teams to align goals and deliver exceptional attendee experiences. The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced, remote environment, is highly organized, and brings creativity, strategic thinking, and operational excellence to every event. Travel of up to 50% is expected, and the role demands strong project management, stakeholder coordination, and analytical insights to continually improve program effectiveness.
\n

Accountabilities:
Own planning, execution, and follow-up for a portfolio of events including sponsored, hosted, and community programs.
Evaluate event opportunities and provide recommendations on time, effort, and budget allocation.
Manage event budgets, vendors, contracts, production logistics, and on-site operations to ensure smooth execution.
Partner with cross-functional teams (Marketing, Sales, Partnerships, DevRel, Design, Ops, Finance, Legal) to align objectives and deliver high-quality experiences.
Oversee attendee experience, including booth setup, demos, staffing prep, and branding details.
Support event promotion, registration, attendee communication, and post-event follow-up in collaboration with Operations.
Track and analyze event performance, contributing to reporting, process improvements, and the development of repeatable playbooks.
Requirements:
4–7+ years of experience in event marketing or field marketing, preferably within B2B SaaS.
Proven ability to manage end-to-end event execution with strong attention to detail.
Excellent project management skills, capable of juggling multiple deadlines and stakeholders.
Comfortable managing budgets, vendor relationships, and contracts.
Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to build relationships across teams.
Experience thriving in fast-paced, lean, remote, and asynchronous work environments.
Highly organized, execution-focused, and analytical, using metrics to inform decision-making and improve outcomes.
Ability to travel up to 50% as required.
Benefits:
Fully remote work with flexibility to manage your own schedule and location.
ESOP (equity ownership) to share in the company’s growth.
Tech allowance to set up an ideal remote workspace (laptop, monitor, headphones, etc.).
Health insurance coverage for employees and dependents.
Annual company off-sites to foster team connection, collaboration, and learning.
Annual professional development allowance for courses, books, conferences, and other growth opportunities.
Collaborative and supportive remote-first team culture.

\n
Why Apply Through Jobgether?
We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
Why Apply Through Jobgether?

title: Sr. Project Manager - Remote
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Remote Implementation Project Manager. In this role, you will serve as the primary contact for client engagements, ensuring their satisfaction through effective leadership and communication. You will collaborate with various teams to manage tasks, risks, and timelines, guaranteeing that projects are delivered successfully and on schedule. This position requires a strong ability to engage with stakeholders and make informed decisions, all while working in a dynamic and client-focused environment. You will also help clients optimize their investments in technology by delivering valuable solutions.
\n

Accountabilities
Lead and manage cross-functional project teams to ensure successful project delivery.
Collaborate with clients to define project scope, objectives, and deliverables.
Develop and maintain detailed project plans, timelines, and budgets.
Monitor and manage project risks while proactively addressing potential issues.
Act as the main point of contact for clients, ensuring clear communication.
Build strong relationships with stakeholders at all organization levels.
Ensure projects adhere to budgets, providing timely updates to clients.

Requirements
5+ years of project management experience, preferably in legal software.
Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience.
Proficient with collaboration and project tracking tools.
Strong communication, problem-solving, and negotiation skills.
Project Management Professional (PMP) certification is a plus.
Experience with Marketing Technology preferred but not required.

Benefits
Flexible remote work options.
Opportunity to work with a diverse team of experts.
Professional development and support.
Access to cutting-edge project management tools.
Collaborative and inclusive work culture.

\n

title: Field Marketing Manager (Remote from Norway)
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Field Marketing Manager in Norway.
This role offers the chance to lead and execute high-impact marketing events that enhance brand visibility, strengthen community engagement, and drive business growth. You will manage a diverse portfolio of events, from sponsored trade shows to developer community programs and flagship conferences, ensuring seamless execution and measurable results. As a key contributor to the marketing team, you will collaborate cross-functionally with Sales, Partnerships, DevRel, and other teams to align goals and deliver exceptional attendee experiences. The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced, remote environment, is highly organized, and brings creativity, strategic thinking, and operational excellence to every event. Travel of up to 50% is expected, and the role demands strong project management, stakeholder coordination, and analytical insights to continually improve program effectiveness.
\n

Accountabilities:
Own planning, execution, and follow-up for a portfolio of events including sponsored, hosted, and community programs.
Evaluate event opportunities and provide recommendations on time, effort, and budget allocation.
Manage event budgets, vendors, contracts, production logistics, and on-site operations to ensure smooth execution.
Partner with cross-functional teams (Marketing, Sales, Partnerships, DevRel, Design, Ops, Finance, Legal) to align objectives and deliver high-quality experiences.
Oversee attendee experience, including booth setup, demos, staffing prep, and branding details.
Support event promotion, registration, attendee communication, and post-event follow-up in collaboration with Operations.
Track and analyze event performance, contributing to reporting, process improvements, and the development of repeatable playbooks.
Requirements:
4–7+ years of experience in event marketing or field marketing, preferably within B2B SaaS.
Proven ability to manage end-to-end event execution with strong attention to detail.
Excellent project management skills, capable of juggling multiple deadlines and stakeholders.
Comfortable managing budgets, vendor relationships, and contracts.
Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to build relationships across teams.
Experience thriving in fast-paced, lean, remote, and asynchronous work environments.
Highly organized, execution-focused, and analytical, using metrics to inform decision-making and improve outcomes.
Ability to travel up to 50% as required.
Benefits:
Fully remote work with flexibility to manage your own schedule and location.
ESOP (equity ownership) to share in the company’s growth.
Tech allowance to set up an ideal remote workspace (laptop, monitor, headphones, etc.).
Health insurance coverage for employees and dependents.
Annual company off-sites to foster team connection, collaboration, and learning.
Annual professional development allowance for courses, books, conferences, and other growth opportunities.
Collaborative and supportive remote-first team culture.

\n
Why Apply Through Jobgether?
We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
Why Apply Through Jobgether? 

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.
