title: Field Marketing Manager (Remote from Portugal)
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Field Marketing Manager in Portugal.
This role offers the chance to lead and execute high-impact marketing events that enhance brand visibility, strengthen community engagement, and drive business growth. You will manage a diverse portfolio of events, from sponsored trade shows to developer community programs and flagship conferences, ensuring seamless execution and measurable results. As a key contributor to the marketing team, you will collaborate cross-functionally with Sales, Partnerships, DevRel, and other teams to align goals and deliver exceptional attendee experiences. The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced, remote environment, is highly organized, and brings creativity, strategic thinking, and operational excellence to every event. Travel of up to 50% is expected, and the role demands strong project management, stakeholder coordination, and analytical insights to continually improve program effectiveness.
\n

Accountabilities:
Own planning, execution, and follow-up for a portfolio of events including sponsored, hosted, and community programs.
Evaluate event opportunities and provide recommendations on time, effort, and budget allocation.
Manage event budgets, vendors, contracts, production logistics, and on-site operations to ensure smooth execution.
Partner with cross-functional teams (Marketing, Sales, Partnerships, DevRel, Design, Ops, Finance, Legal) to align objectives and deliver high-quality experiences.
Oversee attendee experience, including booth setup, demos, staffing prep, and branding details.
Support event promotion, registration, attendee communication, and post-event follow-up in collaboration with Operations.
Track and analyze event performance, contributing to reporting, process improvements, and the development of repeatable playbooks.
Requirements:
4–7+ years of experience in event marketing or field marketing, preferably within B2B SaaS.
Proven ability to manage end-to-end event execution with strong attention to detail.
Excellent project management skills, capable of juggling multiple deadlines and stakeholders.
Comfortable managing budgets, vendor relationships, and contracts.
Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to build relationships across teams.
Experience thriving in fast-paced, lean, remote, and asynchronous work environments.
Highly organized, execution-focused, and analytical, using metrics to inform decision-making and improve outcomes.
Ability to travel up to 50% as required.
Benefits:
Fully remote work with flexibility to manage your own schedule and location.
ESOP (equity ownership) to share in the company’s growth.
Tech allowance to set up an ideal remote workspace (laptop, monitor, headphones, etc.).
Health insurance coverage for employees and dependents.
Annual company off-sites to foster team connection, collaboration, and learning.
Annual professional development allowance for courses, books, conferences, and other growth opportunities.
Collaborative and supportive remote-first team culture.

\n
Why Apply Through Jobgether?
We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
Why Apply Through Jobgether? 

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

title: Software Team Leader - REMOTE
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Software Engineering Manager - REMOTE. In this role, you will lead a talented team of engineers to develop new features and ensure the scalability of solutions. You will work closely with product managers and the engineering team, driving project execution while fostering a culture of high performance and collaboration. Your leadership will empower team members to achieve their full potential and deliver meaningful value to our users. Join us in transforming the legal sector through innovative technology.
\n

Accountabilities
Grow & coach a high-performing team – hire, mentor, and develop engineers for their best work.
Drive outcomes, not just output – clarify goals with Product and unblock teams to deliver value.
Own sustainable delivery – maintain project schedules through proactive planning and communication.
Shape team dynamics – gather feedback and champion modern engineering practices.

Requirements
5+ years of professional software engineering experience, including team leadership.
Proven ability to build engaged and autonomous teams that achieve ambitious goals.
Strong technical background in modern web application development (C#, Node.js, TypeScript, AWS, etc.).
Passion for continuous learning and clear communication in a hybrid environment.

Benefits
Dynamic and rapidly growing environment focused on organizational success.
Medical, Dental, & Vision Insurance for full-time employees.
Competitive and fair compensation package.
Maternity & paternity leave for full-time employees.
Short & long-term disability benefits.
Opportunity to learn from a dedicated leadership team.
Access to top-of-the-line company swag.

\n
Why Apply Through Jobgether?
We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. title: Sr. Head of Marketing (Remote)
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Head of Marketing - REMOTE. In this role, you will own the entire marketing strategy, shaping the brand narrative and integrating various marketing channels into a cohesive strategy. You will be responsible for overseeing the economics of the eCommerce P&L, making critical decisions to balance growth with operational risks. Your expertise in data and AI will be crucial in driving performance across multiple platforms while maintaining brand integrity.
\n

Accountabilities
Define and oversee the growth roadmap and annual revenue targets.
Manage trade-offs between growth metrics, CAC, LTV, and inventory risk.
Lead integrated marketing strategies that unify all channels.
Supervise hero campaigns, product launches, and seasonal marketing initiatives.
Establish and prioritize marketing goals in collaboration with the leadership team.
Ensure all marketing strategies align with brand and economic objectives.

Requirements
7–12+ years of experience in digital marketing with a focus on DTC or eCommerce.
Proven success in scaling brands from $8M to over $20M in annual revenue.
Deep understanding of eCommerce unit economics including CAC, LTV, and ROAS.
Hands-on experience with at least two core growth channels.
Strong analytical skills, familiar with GA4 and eCommerce platforms.
Ability to leverage AI and automation in marketing processes.
Exceptional storytelling and copywriting skills backed by data.

Benefits
Flexible remote work environment.
Competitive salary and performance bonuses.

Health and wellness benefits.

title: Sr. Data Specialist - Remote
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Research Data Analyst - REMOTE. This role plays a critical part in leveraging diverse data sources to enhance research outcomes within the field of anesthesiology and perioperative medicine. The selected candidate will engage in qualitative and quantitative data analysis, database development, and management, as well as pipeline development that supports ongoing scientific inquiry. There is a strong emphasis on utilizing advanced neuroscience methods and technologies to drive evidence-based improvements in patient care. This position offers flexibility and autonomy while contributing to multidisciplinary research initiatives aimed at advancing human health.
\n

Accountabilities
Develop and manage data analysis pipelines for research projects
Create and oversee comprehensive databases for multimodal imaging and behavior data
Participate in collaborative meetings and set project goals with lab members
Implement data processing techniques for motion correction and region segmentation
Contribute to the design and execution of research experiments

Requirements
PhD in a relevant field, or equivalent experience
Master’s degree plus 4 years of relevant experience, or Bachelor's degree plus 6 years of experience
Strong programming and computational skills
Ability to work autonomously and in a team environment
Curiosity about neurobiological research and willingness to participate in lab meetings
Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

Benefits
Flexible work schedule with potential for remote work
Collaborative and inclusive work environment
Opportunity to work on innovative research projects
Professional development opportunities
Supportive team culture emphasizing mentorship and growth

\n

title: Field Marketing Manager (Remote from Chile)
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Field Marketing Manager in Chile.
This role offers the chance to lead and execute high-impact marketing events that enhance brand visibility, strengthen community engagement, and drive business growth. You will manage a diverse portfolio of events, from sponsored trade shows to developer community programs and flagship conferences, ensuring seamless execution and measurable results. As a key contributor to the marketing team, you will collaborate cross-functionally with Sales, Partnerships, DevRel, and other teams to align goals and deliver exceptional attendee experiences. The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced, remote environment, is highly organized, and brings creativity, strategic thinking, and operational excellence to every event. Travel of up to 50% is expected, and the role demands strong project management, stakeholder coordination, and analytical insights to continually improve program effectiveness.
\n

Accountabilities:
Own planning, execution, and follow-up for a portfolio of events including sponsored, hosted, and community programs.
Evaluate event opportunities and provide recommendations on time, effort, and budget allocation.
Manage event budgets, vendors, contracts, production logistics, and on-site operations to ensure smooth execution.
Partner with cross-functional teams (Marketing, Sales, Partnerships, DevRel, Design, Ops, Finance, Legal) to align objectives and deliver high-quality experiences.
Oversee attendee experience, including booth setup, demos, staffing prep, and branding details.
Support event promotion, registration, attendee communication, and post-event follow-up in collaboration with Operations.
Track and analyze event performance, contributing to reporting, process improvements, and the development of repeatable playbooks.
Requirements:
4–7+ years of experience in event marketing or field marketing, preferably within B2B SaaS.
Proven ability to manage end-to-end event execution with strong attention to detail.
Excellent project management skills, capable of juggling multiple deadlines and stakeholders.
Comfortable managing budgets, vendor relationships, and contracts.
Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to build relationships across teams.
Experience thriving in fast-paced, lean, remote, and asynchronous work environments.
Highly organized, execution-focused, and analytical, using metrics to inform decision-making and improve outcomes.
Ability to travel up to 50% as required.
Benefits:
Fully remote work with flexibility to manage your own schedule and location.
ESOP (equity ownership) to share in the company’s growth.
Tech allowance to set up an ideal remote workspace (laptop, monitor, headphones, etc.).
Health insurance coverage for employees and dependents.
Annual company off-sites to foster team connection, collaboration, and learning.
Annual professional development allowance for courses, books, conferences, and other growth opportunities.
Collaborative and supportive remote-first team culture.

\n
Why Apply Through Jobgether?
We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
Why Apply Through Jobgether? 

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

title: Sr. Research Data Engineer - REMOTE
locations_derived: Washington, District of Columbia, United States
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Research Data Analyst - REMOTE. This role plays a critical part in leveraging diverse data sources to enhance research outcomes within the field of anesthesiology and perioperative medicine. The selected candidate will engage in qualitative and quantitative data analysis, database development, and management, as well as pipeline development that supports ongoing scientific inquiry. There is a strong emphasis on utilizing advanced neuroscience methods and technologies to drive evidence-based improvements in patient care. This position offers flexibility and autonomy while contributing to multidisciplinary research initiatives aimed at advancing human health.
\n

Accountabilities
Develop and manage data analysis pipelines for research projects
Create and oversee comprehensive databases for multimodal imaging and behavior data
Participate in collaborative meetings and set project goals with lab members
Implement data processing techniques for motion correction and region segmentation
Contribute to the design and execution of research experiments

Requirements
PhD in a relevant field, or equivalent experience
Master’s degree plus 4 years of relevant experience, or Bachelor's degree plus 6 years of experience
Strong programming and computational skills
Ability to work autonomously and in a team environment
Curiosity about neurobiological research and willingness to participate in lab meetings
Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

Benefits
Flexible work schedule with potential for remote work
Collaborative and inclusive work environment
Opportunity to work on innovative research projects
Professional development opportunities
Supportive team culture emphasizing mentorship and growth

\n
Why Apply Through Jobgether?

title: Sr. Software Development Manager (Remote)
locations_derived: New York, New York, United States
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Software Engineering Manager - REMOTE. In this role, you will lead a talented team of engineers to develop new features and ensure the scalability of solutions. You will work closely with product managers and the engineering team, driving project execution while fostering a culture of high performance and collaboration. Your leadership will empower team members to achieve their full potential and deliver meaningful value to our users. Join us in transforming the legal sector through innovative technology.
\n

Accountabilities
Grow & coach a high-performing team – hire, mentor, and develop engineers for their best work.
Drive outcomes, not just output – clarify goals with Product and unblock teams to deliver value.
Own sustainable delivery – maintain project schedules through proactive planning and communication.
Shape team dynamics – gather feedback and champion modern engineering practices.

Requirements
5+ years of professional software engineering experience, including team leadership.
Proven ability to build engaged and autonomous teams that achieve ambitious goals.
Strong technical background in modern web application development (C#, Node.js, TypeScript, AWS, etc.).
Passion for continuous learning and clear communication in a hybrid environment.

Benefits
Dynamic and rapidly growing environment focused on organizational success.
Medical, Dental, & Vision Insurance for full-time employees.
Competitive and fair compensation package.
Maternity & paternity leave for full-time employees.
Short & long-term disability benefits.
Opportunity to learn from a dedicated leadership team.
Access to top-of-the-line company swag.

title: Remote Sr. Project Manager
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Remote Implementation Project Manager. In this role, you will serve as the primary contact for client engagements, ensuring their satisfaction through effective leadership and communication. You will collaborate with various teams to manage tasks, risks, and timelines, guaranteeing that projects are delivered successfully and on schedule. This position requires a strong ability to engage with stakeholders and make informed decisions, all while working in a dynamic and client-focused environment. You will also help clients optimize their investments in technology by delivering valuable solutions.
\n

Accountabilities
Lead and manage cross-functional project teams to ensure successful project delivery.
Collaborate with clients to define project scope, objectives, and deliverables.
Develop and maintain detailed project plans, timelines, and budgets.
Monitor and manage project risks while proactively addressing potential issues.
Act as the main point of contact for clients, ensuring clear communication.
Build strong relationships with stakeholders at all organization levels.
Ensure projects adhere to budgets, providing timely updates to clients.

Requirements
5+ years of project management experience, preferably in legal software.
Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience.
Proficient with collaboration and project tracking tools.
Strong communication, problem-solving, and negotiation skills.
Project Management Professional (PMP) certification is a plus.
Experience with Marketing Technology preferred but not required.

Benefits
Flexible remote work options.
Opportunity to work with a diverse team of experts.
Professional development and support.
Access to cutting-edge project management tools.
Collaborative and inclusive work culture.

\n
Why Apply Through Jobgether?
We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

title: Research Data Analyst (Remote)
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Research Data Analyst - REMOTE. This role plays a critical part in leveraging diverse data sources to enhance research outcomes within the field of anesthesiology and perioperative medicine. The selected candidate will engage in qualitative and quantitative data analysis, database development, and management, as well as pipeline development that supports ongoing scientific inquiry. There is a strong emphasis on utilizing advanced neuroscience methods and technologies to drive evidence-based improvements in patient care. This position offers flexibility and autonomy while contributing to multidisciplinary research initiatives aimed at advancing human health.
\n

Accountabilities
Develop and manage data analysis pipelines for research projects
Create and oversee comprehensive databases for multimodal imaging and behavior data
Participate in collaborative meetings and set project goals with lab members
Implement data processing techniques for motion correction and region segmentation
Contribute to the design and execution of research experiments

Requirements
PhD in a relevant field, or equivalent experience
Master’s degree plus 4 years of relevant experience, or Bachelor's degree plus 6 years of experience
Strong programming and computational skills
Ability to work autonomously and in a team environment
Curiosity about neurobiological research and willingness to participate in lab meetings
Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

Benefits
Flexible work schedule with potential for remote work
Collaborative and inclusive work environment
Opportunity to work on innovative research projects
Professional development opportunities
Supportive team culture emphasizing mentorship and growth

\n
Why Apply Through Jobgether?
We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.
#LI-CL1

ai_requirements_summary: Candidates must have a PhD in a relevant field or equivalent experience, or a Master's degree with 4 years of relevant experience, or a Bachelor's degree with 6 years of experience. title: Remote Marketing Coordinator
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Head of Marketing - REMOTE. In this role, you will own the entire marketing strategy, shaping the brand narrative and integrating various marketing channels into a cohesive strategy. You will be responsible for overseeing the economics of the eCommerce P&L, making critical decisions to balance growth with operational risks. Your expertise in data and AI will be crucial in driving performance across multiple platforms while maintaining brand integrity.
\n

Accountabilities
Define and oversee the growth roadmap and annual revenue targets.
Manage trade-offs between growth metrics, CAC, LTV, and inventory risk.
Lead integrated marketing strategies that unify all channels.
Supervise hero campaigns, product launches, and seasonal marketing initiatives.
Establish and prioritize marketing goals in collaboration with the leadership team.
Ensure all marketing strategies align with brand and economic objectives.

Requirements
7–12+ years of experience in digital marketing with a focus on DTC or eCommerce.
Proven success in scaling brands from $8M to over $20M in annual revenue.
Deep understanding of eCommerce unit economics including CAC, LTV, and ROAS.
Hands-on experience with at least two core growth channels.
Strong analytical skills, familiar with GA4 and eCommerce platforms.
Ability to leverage AI and automation in marketing processes.
Exceptional storytelling and copywriting skills backed by data.

Benefits
Flexible remote work environment.
Competitive salary and performance bonuses.
Professional development opportunities.
Collaborative and innovative team culture.
Access to cutting-edge marketing tools and technologies.
Health and wellness benefits.

\n
Why Apply Through Jobgether?

title: Remote Lead Data Analyst
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Research Data Analyst - REMOTE. This role plays a critical part in leveraging diverse data sources to enhance research outcomes within the field of anesthesiology and perioperative medicine. The selected candidate will engage in qualitative and quantitative data analysis, database development, and management, as well as pipeline development that supports ongoing scientific inquiry. There is a strong emphasis on utilizing advanced neuroscience methods and technologies to drive evidence-based improvements in patient care. This position offers flexibility and autonomy while contributing to multidisciplinary research initiatives aimed at advancing human health.
\n

Accountabilities
Develop and manage data analysis pipelines for research projects
Create and oversee comprehensive databases for multimodal imaging and behavior data
Participate in collaborative meetings and set project goals with lab members
Implement data processing techniques for motion correction and region segmentation
Contribute to the design and execution of research experiments

Requirements
PhD in a relevant field, or equivalent experience
Master’s degree plus 4 years of relevant experience, or Bachelor's degree plus 6 years of experience
Strong programming and computational skills
Ability to work autonomously and in a team environment
Curiosity about neurobiological research and willingness to participate in lab meetings
Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

Benefits
Flexible work schedule with potential for remote work
Collaborative and inclusive work environment
Opportunity to work on innovative research projects
Professional development opportunities
Supportive team culture emphasizing mentorship and growth

\n

title: Remote Data Research Analyst
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Research Data Analyst - REMOTE. This role plays a critical part in leveraging diverse data sources to enhance research outcomes within the field of anesthesiology and perioperative medicine. The selected candidate will engage in qualitative and quantitative data analysis, database development, and management, as well as pipeline development that supports ongoing scientific inquiry. There is a strong emphasis on utilizing advanced neuroscience methods and technologies to drive evidence-based improvements in patient care. This position offers flexibility and autonomy while contributing to multidisciplinary research initiatives aimed at advancing human health.
\n

Accountabilities
Develop and manage data analysis pipelines for research projects
Create and oversee comprehensive databases for multimodal imaging and behavior data
Participate in collaborative meetings and set project goals with lab members
Implement data processing techniques for motion correction and region segmentation
Contribute to the design and execution of research experiments

Requirements
PhD in a relevant field, or equivalent experience
Master’s degree plus 4 years of relevant experience, or Bachelor's degree plus 6 years of experience
Strong programming and computational skills
Ability to work autonomously and in a team environment
Curiosity about neurobiological research and willingness to participate in lab meetings
Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

Benefits
Flexible work schedule with potential for remote work
Collaborative and inclusive work environment
Opportunity to work on innovative research projects
Professional development opportunities
Supportive team culture emphasizing mentorship and growth

title: Remote Marketing Team Leader
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Head of Marketing - REMOTE. In this role, you will own the entire marketing strategy, shaping the brand narrative and integrating various marketing channels into a cohesive strategy. You will be responsible for overseeing the economics of the eCommerce P&L, making critical decisions to balance growth with operational risks. Your expertise in data and AI will be crucial in driving performance across multiple platforms while maintaining brand integrity.
\n

Accountabilities
Define and oversee the growth roadmap and annual revenue targets.
Manage trade-offs between growth metrics, CAC, LTV, and inventory risk.
Lead integrated marketing strategies that unify all channels.
Supervise hero campaigns, product launches, and seasonal marketing initiatives.
Establish and prioritize marketing goals in collaboration with the leadership team.
Ensure all marketing strategies align with brand and economic objectives.

Requirements
7–12+ years of experience in digital marketing with a focus on DTC or eCommerce.
Proven success in scaling brands from $8M to over $20M in annual revenue.
Deep understanding of eCommerce unit economics including CAC, LTV, and ROAS.
Hands-on experience with at least two core growth channels.
Strong analytical skills, familiar with GA4 and eCommerce platforms.
Ability to leverage AI and automation in marketing processes.
Exceptional storytelling and copywriting skills backed by data.

Benefits
Flexible remote work environment.
Competitive salary and performance bonuses.
Professional development opportunities.

title: Remote Marketing Chief
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Head of Marketing - REMOTE. In this role, you will own the entire marketing strategy, shaping the brand narrative and integrating various marketing channels into a cohesive strategy. You will be responsible for overseeing the economics of the eCommerce P&L, making critical decisions to balance growth with operational risks. Your expertise in data and AI will be crucial in driving performance across multiple platforms while maintaining brand integrity.
\n

Accountabilities
Define and oversee the growth roadmap and annual revenue targets.
Manage trade-offs between growth metrics, CAC, LTV, and inventory risk.
Lead integrated marketing strategies that unify all channels.
Supervise hero campaigns, product launches, and seasonal marketing initiatives.
Establish and prioritize marketing goals in collaboration with the leadership team.
Ensure all marketing strategies align with brand and economic objectives.

Requirements
7–12+ years of experience in digital marketing with a focus on DTC or eCommerce.
Proven success in scaling brands from $8M to over $20M in annual revenue.
Deep understanding of eCommerce unit economics including CAC, LTV, and ROAS.
Hands-on experience with at least two core growth channels.
Strong analytical skills, familiar with GA4 and eCommerce platforms.
Ability to leverage AI and automation in marketing processes.
Exceptional storytelling and copywriting skills backed by data.

Benefits
Flexible remote work environment.
Competitive salary and performance bonuses.
Professional development opportunities.

Health and wellness benefits.

title: Remote Research Data Analyst
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Research Data Analyst - REMOTE. This role plays a critical part in leveraging diverse data sources to enhance research outcomes within the field of anesthesiology and perioperative medicine. The selected candidate will engage in qualitative and quantitative data analysis, database development, and management, as well as pipeline development that supports ongoing scientific inquiry. There is a strong emphasis on utilizing advanced neuroscience methods and technologies to drive evidence-based improvements in patient care. This position offers flexibility and autonomy while contributing to multidisciplinary research initiatives aimed at advancing human health.
\n

Accountabilities
Develop and manage data analysis pipelines for research projects
Create and oversee comprehensive databases for multimodal imaging and behavior data
Participate in collaborative meetings and set project goals with lab members
Implement data processing techniques for motion correction and region segmentation
Contribute to the design and execution of research experiments

Requirements
PhD in a relevant field, or equivalent experience
Master’s degree plus 4 years of relevant experience, or Bachelor's degree plus 6 years of experience
Strong programming and computational skills
Ability to work autonomously and in a team environment
Curiosity about neurobiological research and willingness to participate in lab meetings
Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

Benefits
Flexible work schedule with potential for remote work
Collaborative and inclusive work environment
Opportunity to work on innovative research projects
Professional development opportunities
Supportive team culture emphasizing mentorship and growth

\n
Why Apply Through Jobgether?
We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

title: Remote Research Data Analyst III
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Research Data Analyst - REMOTE. This role plays a critical part in leveraging diverse data sources to enhance research outcomes within the field of anesthesiology and perioperative medicine. The selected candidate will engage in qualitative and quantitative data analysis, database development, and management, as well as pipeline development that supports ongoing scientific inquiry. There is a strong emphasis on utilizing advanced neuroscience methods and technologies to drive evidence-based improvements in patient care. This position offers flexibility and autonomy while contributing to multidisciplinary research initiatives aimed at advancing human health.
\n

Accountabilities
Develop and manage data analysis pipelines for research projects
Create and oversee comprehensive databases for multimodal imaging and behavior data
Participate in collaborative meetings and set project goals with lab members
Implement data processing techniques for motion correction and region segmentation
Contribute to the design and execution of research experiments

Requirements
PhD in a relevant field, or equivalent experience
Master’s degree plus 4 years of relevant experience, or Bachelor's degree plus 6 years of experience
Strong programming and computational skills
Ability to work autonomously and in a team environment
Curiosity about neurobiological research and willingness to participate in lab meetings
Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

Benefits
Flexible work schedule with potential for remote work
Collaborative and inclusive work environment
Opportunity to work on innovative research projects
Professional development opportunities
Supportive team culture emphasizing mentorship and growth

title: Remote Engineering Leader
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Software Engineering Manager - REMOTE. In this role, you will lead a talented team of engineers to develop new features and ensure the scalability of solutions. You will work closely with product managers and the engineering team, driving project execution while fostering a culture of high performance and collaboration. Your leadership will empower team members to achieve their full potential and deliver meaningful value to our users. Join us in transforming the legal sector through innovative technology.
\n

Accountabilities
Grow & coach a high-performing team – hire, mentor, and develop engineers for their best work.
Drive outcomes, not just output – clarify goals with Product and unblock teams to deliver value.
Own sustainable delivery – maintain project schedules through proactive planning and communication.
Shape team dynamics – gather feedback and champion modern engineering practices.

Requirements
5+ years of professional software engineering experience, including team leadership.
Proven ability to build engaged and autonomous teams that achieve ambitious goals.
Strong technical background in modern web application development (C#, Node.js, TypeScript, AWS, etc.).
Passion for continuous learning and clear communication in a hybrid environment.

Benefits
Dynamic and rapidly growing environment focused on organizational success.
Medical, Dental, & Vision Insurance for full-time employees.
Competitive and fair compensation package.
Maternity & paternity leave for full-time employees.
Short & long-term disability benefits.
Opportunity to learn from a dedicated leadership team.
Access to top-of-the-line company swag.

title: Remote Head of Marketing
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Head of Marketing - REMOTE. In this role, you will own the entire marketing strategy, shaping the brand narrative and integrating various marketing channels into a cohesive strategy. You will be responsible for overseeing the economics of the eCommerce P&L, making critical decisions to balance growth with operational risks. Your expertise in data and AI will be crucial in driving performance across multiple platforms while maintaining brand integrity.
\n

Accountabilities
Define and oversee the growth roadmap and annual revenue targets.
Manage trade-offs between growth metrics, CAC, LTV, and inventory risk.
Lead integrated marketing strategies that unify all channels.
Supervise hero campaigns, product launches, and seasonal marketing initiatives.
Establish and prioritize marketing goals in collaboration with the leadership team.
Ensure all marketing strategies align with brand and economic objectives.

Requirements
7–12+ years of experience in digital marketing with a focus on DTC or eCommerce.
Proven success in scaling brands from $8M to over $20M in annual revenue.
Deep understanding of eCommerce unit economics including CAC, LTV, and ROAS.
Hands-on experience with at least two core growth channels.
Strong analytical skills, familiar with GA4 and eCommerce platforms.
Ability to leverage AI and automation in marketing processes.
Exceptional storytelling and copywriting skills backed by data.

Benefits
Flexible remote work environment.
Competitive salary and performance bonuses.
Professional development opportunities.
Collaborative and innovative team culture.
Access to cutting-edge marketing tools and technologies.
Health and wellness benefits.

\n
Why Apply Through Jobgether?
We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

title: Remote Data Analyst Sr.
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Research Data Analyst - REMOTE. This role plays a critical part in leveraging diverse data sources to enhance research outcomes within the field of anesthesiology and perioperative medicine. The selected candidate will engage in qualitative and quantitative data analysis, database development, and management, as well as pipeline development that supports ongoing scientific inquiry. There is a strong emphasis on utilizing advanced neuroscience methods and technologies to drive evidence-based improvements in patient care. This position offers flexibility and autonomy while contributing to multidisciplinary research initiatives aimed at advancing human health.
\n

Accountabilities
Develop and manage data analysis pipelines for research projects
Create and oversee comprehensive databases for multimodal imaging and behavior data
Participate in collaborative meetings and set project goals with lab members
Implement data processing techniques for motion correction and region segmentation
Contribute to the design and execution of research experiments

Requirements
PhD in a relevant field, or equivalent experience
Master’s degree plus 4 years of relevant experience, or Bachelor's degree plus 6 years of experience
Strong programming and computational skills
Ability to work autonomously and in a team environment
Curiosity about neurobiological research and willingness to participate in lab meetings
Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

Benefits
Flexible work schedule with potential for remote work
Collaborative and inclusive work environment
Opportunity to work on innovative research projects
Professional development opportunities
Supportive team culture emphasizing mentorship and growth

title: Remote Brand Marketing Lead
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Head of Marketing - REMOTE. In this role, you will own the entire marketing strategy, shaping the brand narrative and integrating various marketing channels into a cohesive strategy. You will be responsible for overseeing the economics of the eCommerce P&L, making critical decisions to balance growth with operational risks. Your expertise in data and AI will be crucial in driving performance across multiple platforms while maintaining brand integrity.
\n

Accountabilities
Define and oversee the growth roadmap and annual revenue targets.
Manage trade-offs between growth metrics, CAC, LTV, and inventory risk.
Lead integrated marketing strategies that unify all channels.
Supervise hero campaigns, product launches, and seasonal marketing initiatives.
Establish and prioritize marketing goals in collaboration with the leadership team.
Ensure all marketing strategies align with brand and economic objectives.

Requirements
7–12+ years of experience in digital marketing with a focus on DTC or eCommerce.
Proven success in scaling brands from $8M to over $20M in annual revenue.
Deep understanding of eCommerce unit economics including CAC, LTV, and ROAS.
Hands-on experience with at least two core growth channels.
Strong analytical skills, familiar with GA4 and eCommerce platforms.
Ability to leverage AI and automation in marketing processes.
Exceptional storytelling and copywriting skills backed by data.

Benefits
Flexible remote work environment.
Competitive salary and performance bonuses.
Professional development opportunities.
Collaborative and innovative team culture.
Access to cutting-edge marketing tools and technologies.
Health and wellness benefits.

title: Project Manager - Marketing Technology (Remote)
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Remote Implementation Project Manager. In this role, you will serve as the primary contact for client engagements, ensuring their satisfaction through effective leadership and communication. You will collaborate with various teams to manage tasks, risks, and timelines, guaranteeing that projects are delivered successfully and on schedule. This position requires a strong ability to engage with stakeholders and make informed decisions, all while working in a dynamic and client-focused environment. You will also help clients optimize their investments in technology by delivering valuable solutions.
\n

Accountabilities
Lead and manage cross-functional project teams to ensure successful project delivery.
Collaborate with clients to define project scope, objectives, and deliverables.
Develop and maintain detailed project plans, timelines, and budgets.
Monitor and manage project risks while proactively addressing potential issues.
Act as the main point of contact for clients, ensuring clear communication.
Build strong relationships with stakeholders at all organization levels.
Ensure projects adhere to budgets, providing timely updates to clients.

Requirements
5+ years of project management experience, preferably in legal software.
Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience.
Proficient with collaboration and project tracking tools.
Strong communication, problem-solving, and negotiation skills.
Project Management Professional (PMP) certification is a plus.
Experience with Marketing Technology preferred but not required.

Benefits
Flexible remote work options.
Opportunity to work with a diverse team of experts.
Professional development and support.

title: Lead Research Analyst (remote)
locations_derived: New York, New York, United States
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Research Data Analyst - REMOTE. This role plays a critical part in leveraging diverse data sources to enhance research outcomes within the field of anesthesiology and perioperative medicine. The selected candidate will engage in qualitative and quantitative data analysis, database development, and management, as well as pipeline development that supports ongoing scientific inquiry. There is a strong emphasis on utilizing advanced neuroscience methods and technologies to drive evidence-based improvements in patient care. This position offers flexibility and autonomy while contributing to multidisciplinary research initiatives aimed at advancing human health.
\n

Accountabilities
Develop and manage data analysis pipelines for research projects
Create and oversee comprehensive databases for multimodal imaging and behavior data
Participate in collaborative meetings and set project goals with lab members
Implement data processing techniques for motion correction and region segmentation
Contribute to the design and execution of research experiments

Requirements
PhD in a relevant field, or equivalent experience
Master’s degree plus 4 years of relevant experience, or Bachelor's degree plus 6 years of experience
Strong programming and computational skills
Ability to work autonomously and in a team environment
Curiosity about neurobiological research and willingness to participate in lab meetings
Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

Benefits
Flexible work schedule with potential for remote work
Collaborative and inclusive work environment
Opportunity to work on innovative research projects
Professional development opportunities
Supportive team culture emphasizing mentorship and growth

title: Marketing Director (Remote)
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Head of Marketing - REMOTE. In this role, you will own the entire marketing strategy, shaping the brand narrative and integrating various marketing channels into a cohesive strategy. You will be responsible for overseeing the economics of the eCommerce P&L, making critical decisions to balance growth with operational risks. Your expertise in data and AI will be crucial in driving performance across multiple platforms while maintaining brand integrity.
\n

Accountabilities
Define and oversee the growth roadmap and annual revenue targets.
Manage trade-offs between growth metrics, CAC, LTV, and inventory risk.
Lead integrated marketing strategies that unify all channels.
Supervise hero campaigns, product launches, and seasonal marketing initiatives.
Establish and prioritize marketing goals in collaboration with the leadership team.
Ensure all marketing strategies align with brand and economic objectives.

7–12+ years of experience in digital marketing with a focus on DTC or eCommerce.

Hands-on experience with at least two core growth channels.

Exceptional storytelling and copywriting skills backed by data.

title: DCSI Electrical Engineer - REMOTE
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a DCSI Electrical Engineer - REMOTE. In this role, you will be integral to developing customized HVAC solutions tailored to Data Center and commercial clients. You will collaborate with a skilled team in various design disciplines, gaining invaluable experience while supporting new product developments and existing systems. Your expertise will contribute to continuous improvement efforts and enhance system reliability in the HVAC sector. Training and mentorship will be provided to ensure your growth in this technical field.
\n

Accountabilities
Assist with design & testing of completed systems
Research new controls solutions such as sensors, actuators, VFDs, and networks
Develop custom air handler solutions by selecting components, generating schematic drawings, and preparing parts lists
Support new product development with conceptual designs and layouts
Develop controls programs for complex air handlers and heat transfer systems
Participate in Kaizen and other cross-functional teams to improve designs
Provide RFE Support with updating existing systems
Support continuous improvement and cost reduction activities through improved product design / design for manufacturing (DFM)
Offer technical support of products post-shipping
Willingness to travel up to 25%

Requirements
Application of control loops to provide machine control
Programming for controllers (DDC/PLC)
AutoCAD Electrical experience
Effective communication skills, both written and oral
Demonstrated problem solver & team player
Ability to successfully plan work to meet deadlines
Understanding of HVAC Systems

title: Data Analyst (Remote)
description_text:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Research Data Analyst - REMOTE. This role plays a critical part in leveraging diverse data sources to enhance research outcomes within the field of anesthesiology and perioperative medicine. The selected candidate will engage in qualitative and quantitative data analysis, database development, and management, as well as pipeline development that supports ongoing scientific inquiry. There is a strong emphasis on utilizing advanced neuroscience methods and technologies to drive evidence-based improvements in patient care. This position offers flexibility and autonomy while contributing to multidisciplinary research initiatives aimed at advancing human health.
\n

Accountabilities
Develop and manage data analysis pipelines for research projects
Create and oversee comprehensive databases for multimodal imaging and behavior data
Participate in collaborative meetings and set project goals with lab members
Implement data processing techniques for motion correction and region segmentation
Contribute to the design and execution of research experiments

Requirements
PhD in a relevant field, or equivalent experience
Master’s degree plus 4 years of relevant experience, or Bachelor's degree plus 6 years of experience
Strong programming and computational skills
Ability to work autonomously and in a team environment
Curiosity about neurobiological research and willingness to participate in lab meetings
Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

Benefits
Flexible work schedule with potential for remote work
Collaborative and inclusive work environment

title: Product Lead – Loyalty & Consumer Engagement
description_text:
This role is for one of our clients

Seniority level: Mid-Senior level

Min Experience: 5 years
Location: Gurugram
JobType: full-time
\n

\n
₹30,00,000 - ₹40,00,000 a year
We are hiring a Product Lead – Loyalty & Consumer Engagement to own and evolve high-impact, consumer-facing platforms centered around rewards, incentives, and habit-forming experiences. This role sits at the intersection of product strategy, behavioral design, and ecosystem thinking—ideal for someone who understands how incentives drive sustained user engagement and long-term value.
You will be responsible for shaping scalable loyalty and rewards products that work across multiple brands, partners, and use cases, while balancing user delight with strong product economics.

What You’ll Own
Loyalty & Rewards Product Strategy
Define and drive the product vision for loyalty, rewards, and incentive-led experiences.
Design end-to-end reward journeys including earning, redemption, tiering, and gamification mechanics.
Build systems that encourage repeat usage, higher lifetime value, and long-term customer stickiness.
Consumer Engagement & Behavior Design
Apply consumer psychology and behavioral economics to create compelling engagement loops.
Design incentive structures that influence desired user actions without eroding margins.
Continuously test and refine reward mechanics to improve participation and redemption rates.
Platform & Ecosystem Development
Build scalable loyalty platforms that support multi-brand catalogs, partners, and merchants.
Enable flexible reward types such as points, vouchers, cashback, experiences, or digital goods.
Define APIs, workflows, and configurations that allow easy onboarding of new partners.
Product Discovery & Delivery
Lead discovery through user research, data analysis, and experimentation.
Translate insights into clear PRDs, user flows, and prioritised roadmaps.
Work closely with engineering and design to deliver high-quality, consumer-grade experiences.
Analytics, Economics & Optimization
Own key metrics such as engagement, redemption rates, repeat usage, and contribution margin.
Balance user value with sustainable unit economics and partner incentives.
Use data to make trade-offs between growth, cost, and experience quality.

What We’re Looking For
5–8 years of experience in product management, ideally within consumer internet, e-commerce, fintech, or marketplaces.
Hands-on experience building or scaling loyalty programs, rewards platforms, or incentive-driven products.
Strong understanding of engagement mechanics, funnels, and lifecycle-driven product design.
Experience working with partner ecosystems, catalogs, or multi-stakeholder platforms.
High user empathy with strong UX judgment and attention to detail.
Comfort working cross-functionally with engineering, design, data, marketing, and business teams.
Structured thinker with strong communication and stakeholder alignment skills.

Why This Role?
Opportunity to own a core consumer engagement and loyalty platform.
High impact on user retention, brand affinity, and ecosystem growth.
Exposure to complex product economics and multi-partner systems.
Strong ownership with room to shape long-term product strategy.

Core Capabilities
Loyalty & Rewards Platforms · Incentive Design · Consumer Product Strategy · Engagement Loops · Behavioral Design · Product Economics · Ecosystem Products
\n
ai_core_responsibilities: The Product Lead will define and drive the product vision for loyalty and rewards, designing end-to-end reward journeys and building systems that encourage repeat usage. They will also lead discovery through user research and data analysis to deliver high-quality consumer experiences.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have 5-8 years of experience in product management, ideally in consumer internet or e-commerce, with hands-on experience in loyalty programs. A strong understanding of engagement mechanics and the ability to work cross-functionally with various teams is essential.

title: Head of Platform Product Strategy
description_text:
This role is for one of our clients

Seniority level: Mid-Senior level

Min Experience: 8 years
Location; Bengaluru
JobType: full-time
\n

\n
We are looking for a seasoned product leader to define and drive the vision, strategy, and execution of a large-scale, data-first platform built for institutional and enterprise users. This role sits at the intersection of technology, data, and real-world operations, with a mandate to transform fragmented, complex workflows into scalable, AI-powered product solutions.
As the Head of Platform Product Strategy, you will own the evolution of a core platform that serves multiple industry verticals. You will partner closely with engineering, business leaders, and domain specialists to deliver measurable impact across adoption, efficiency, and decision-making outcomes.

What You’ll Do
Product Vision & Strategic Leadership
Own and communicate a clear long-term product vision (12–24 months) aligned with business and platform goals.
Define the core platform narrative—solving systemic inefficiencies caused by siloed data and manual operational processes.
Shape a unified platform strategy that supports multiple verticals such as agriculture, mining, power, and infrastructure.
Drive strategic decisions around platform capabilities including data ingestion, structuring, integration, analytics, monitoring, and decision intelligence.
Guide AI and ML investments, ensuring capabilities are practical, scalable, and deliver real operational value.
Roadmap & Execution Ownership
Lead quarterly and annual roadmap planning with a balance of customer needs, revenue priorities, and platform robustness.
Partner with leadership and vertical owners to align delivery responsibilities and timelines.
Make thoughtful trade-offs between innovation, scalability, and technical debt.
Define success metrics and track product performance, adoption, and platform health across verticals.
Cross-Functional Collaboration
Serve as the single point of alignment between business, engineering, domain experts, and customer-facing teams.
Translate complex institutional and operational requirements into clear, actionable product direction.
Participate in deal reviews and solution scoping to ensure product feasibility and long-term scalability.
Work closely with operations and customer success teams to monitor outcomes, usage, and customer impact.
Engage with external advisors and industry experts to inform vertical-specific product innovation.
Customer-Centric Product Development
Build deep relationships with institutional and enterprise customers through direct engagement and field interactions when required.
Develop a strong understanding of customer workflows, constraints, and decision-making structures.
Drive continuous improvements in customer satisfaction, retention, and NPS through product enhancements.
Establish structured feedback mechanisms to ensure customer insights consistently influence product direction.

What We’re Looking For
Experience & Background
8+ years of experience in product management, with at least 3 years in a senior or leadership role.
Strong experience building and scaling B2B SaaS, enterprise platforms, or institution-focused technology products.
Proven ability to take products from early-stage concepts to mature, scaled platforms.
Experience working with large organizations, regulated industries, or government-style procurement environments.
Core Capabilities
Strong systems thinking with the ability to understand end-to-end data flows and operational ecosystems.
Solid intuition around data platforms and AI—what’s feasible, valuable, and scalable in real-world deployments.
High technical fluency with comfort reviewing architectures, trade-offs, and engineering plans.
Outcome-oriented mindset with clear ownership of business impact, adoption, and customer success.
Mindset & Culture
High ownership and comfort making decisions amid ambiguity and incomplete information.
Intellectual curiosity and willingness to dive deep into complex institutional and operational challenges.
Mission-driven approach focused on creating meaningful, long-term impact.
Disciplined, lean approach to prioritization and execution.
Ability to operate effectively in fast-evolving, multi-stakeholder environments.

Key Skills
Platform Product Strategy
Enterprise & Institutional Products
Product Leadership & Stakeholder Management
Data & AI-Driven Product Development
Roadmap Planning & Prioritization

This role involves transforming complex workflows into scalable, AI-powered product solutions while collaborating with various stakeholders.

title: Immobilienberater/in (m/w/d) – in Anstellung (Vollzeit)
description_text:
Engel & Völkers ist ein international tätiges Beratungs- und Vermittlungsunternehmen für Immobilien. Seit 1977 am Markt tätig, mit über 16.000 Mitarbeitenden weltweit und von drei Kernwerten geprägt: Kompetenz, Exklusivität und Leidenschaft.

Engel & Völkers ist auf die Anforderungen von Wohnimmobilien spezialisiert. Deutschlandweit blicken wir auf eine über 40-jährige Erfolgsgeschichte zurück. Durch die konsequente Ausrichtung unserer Dienstleistung auf die einzelnen Assetklassen verfügen wir über eine einzigartige Marktkompetenz. Für Bremen suchen wir zum nächstmöglichen Zeitpunkt Immobilienberatende mit dem Schwerpunkt Akquise und Vermarktung von Gewerbeimmobilien.
\n

Ihre Aufgaben
Kundenservice: Begleitung der Kundschaft vom Erstkontakt bis zum Geschäftsabschluss, Durchführung von Beratungsterminen und Besichtigungen
Immobilienanalyse: Analysieren Sie Immobilien hinsichtlich Lage, Größe und technischer Ausstattung, Anwendung fundierter Kenntnisse der Assetklassen
Aufbereitung von Unterlagen: Erstellung und Aufbereitung von Objektunterlagen, Verfassen umfangreicher Exposés, Erstellung von Reportings über durchgeführte Aktivitäten
Bearbeitung von Kauf- und Mietsuchen: Erfassung des Bedarfs der Suchkundschaft, Herstellung einer reibungslosen Vermittlung
Kommunikation und Akquise: Zielstrebige Kommunikation mit Menschen, Erwerb neuer Geschäftskundschaft, Betreuung bestehender Geschäftskundschaft

Ihr Profil
Ausbildung und Qualifikation: Abgeschlossene Lehre oder abgeschlossenes Studium, ein Netzwerk in der regionalen Immobilienbranche ist von Vorteilen
Kommunikationsstärke: Sicher im persönlichen Gespräch, Kompetent im schriftlichen Austausch
Dienstleistungsmentalität: Verhandlungssicher im Einsatz für die Kundschaft, Durchsetzungsstark in Diskussionen
Interesse und Affinität: Hohe Affinität für Immobilien und Vertrieb
Engagement und Motivation: Engagiert und motiviert, sich stetig weiterzuentwickeln, Fähigkeit, selbstständig zu arbeiten, Schnelle Auffassungsgabe für neues Wissen
Unternehmerisches Denken und Zielstrebigkeit: Unternehmerisches Denken und Handeln als Stärke, Klare Zielsetzung und konsequente Zielverfolgung

\n
Wir bieten Ihnen die Möglichkeit, Ihre Karriere in einer stark wachsenden Branche aufzubauen und Teil unseres ambitionierten Teams zu werden. Darüber hinaus nehmen wir unsere Verantwortung als arbeitsgebende Person ernst und wollen, dass Sie sich in unserem Unternehmen wohlfühlen. Deine abwechslungsreichen Tätigkeiten kannst du in angenehmer Arbeitsatmosphäre, unter modernen Bedingungen und mit einer flexiblen Gestaltung deines Arbeitstages ausführen. Ihr Arbeitsplatz befindet sich in einem modernen Büro direkt in der Bremer City. Sie können unsere Firmenfahrzeuge für Ihre Termine nutzen und Corporate Benefits (Mitarbeiterangebote) erhalten. Zur Einarbeitung steht Ihr Team fest an Ihrer Seite und fördert Ihre Entwicklung. Wir zahlen nicht nur ein festes Gehalt, Top-Leistungen belohnen wir mit einer Extra-Provision. Mit Weiterbildungsmöglichkeiten wie z.B. in unserer hauseigenen Engel & Völkers Akademie können Sie bei uns schnell vorankommen. Werden Sie Teil unseres Teams und bewerben Sie sich jetzt!

title: Italian Localization Project Manager
description_text:
As a trusted global transformation partner, Welocalize accelerates the global business journey by enabling brands and companies to reach, engage, and grow international audiences. Welocalize delivers multilingual content transformation services in translation, localization, and adaptation for over 250 languages with a growing network of over 400,000 in-country linguistic resources. Driving innovation in language services, Welocalize delivers high-quality training data transformation solutions for NLP-enabled machine learning by blending technology and human intelligence to collect, annotate, and evaluate all content types. Our team works across locations in North America, Europe, and Asia serving our global clients in the markets that matter to them. www.welocalize.com

To perform this job successfully, an individual must be able to perform each essential duty satisfactorily. The requirements listed below are representative of the knowledge, skill, and/or ability required. Reasonable accommodations may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform the essential functions.

MAIN PURPOSE

The Project Manager is responsible for ensuring the successful planning, execution, tracking, delivery and closure of client projects. The Project Manager works with the client to understand requirements and engages the global team in the fulfillment of these requirements, crafting client solutions based on the Welocalize Four Pillars of Customer Service, Quality, Innovation and Global Teamwork. 

The ideal candidate is a driven but steady individual, capable of building relationships across the entire project team, with the flexibility and energy to thrive in a dynamic environment. Experience in the localization industry is required. 
\n

Main Duties
The following is a non-exhaustive list of responsibilities and areas of ownership of the Project Manager:
Experience with Machine Translation and NLP work processes are recommended.
Technical Skills: JIRA, Confluence, Zendesk, and PowerBi. 
Project planning, scoping, requirements gathering and validation with client.
Quoting, estimates, working with budgets are part of the regular daily tasks. 
Identifying and working with the relevant client and internal stakeholders to plan and resource projects appropriately in terms of quality, cost, and schedule requirements.
Risk analysis and contingency planning (plan-do-check-act cycle).
Leading the internal and external team to successful execution and delivery of client projects.
Creating schedule and monitoring timeliness of delivery.
Managing the budget and controlling project costs.
Establishing and nurturing relationships with the customer, internal teams and external suppliers.
Overseeing project activities and ensuring resolution to any problems that may arise (corrective and preventive action).
Actively seeking ways to optimize delivery, client satisfaction, quality and profitability.
Reporting, both in written and verbal form, to internal and external stakeholders regarding Project scope, financials, progress and status, formally and on an ad-hoc basis as required.
Ensuring finance systems are kept up to date and accurate.
Process documentation and knowledge management.
Ensuring profit of project is maintained through the management of margin.

Measures of Success
Delivery of services in line with core KPIs for project management, which include but are not limited to:
client satisfaction;
on-time delivery;
cost control and profitability;
revenue throughput;
client growth.

Experience
Proven project management experience in a fast-paced, client-centric environment, ideally in the translation or localization industry.
Knowledge of the translation industry and a keen interest in its technology, process, competitive landscape and emerging trends.
Demonstrated success at managing large accounts and/or projects.
Curiosity and creativity to question existing processes and approaches and innovate new ones.
Proven experience in development of processes and ideas. 
Experience in financial management and budget to actual management.
Customer relationship management and business development skills to drive organic growth.
Must be available to travel for work related commitments.

Other Relevant Skills
Native-level proficiency or advanced knowledge of Italian (minimum B2 level or higher)
Energy and a positive attitude with excellent interpersonal skills.
The ability to lead large, diverse, virtual teams.
Excellent Written and verbal communication skills. 
Strong organizational and problem-solving skills.
Effective presentation skills.
Ability to build and maintain strong client relationships.
Ability to manage multiple priorities in a time-sensitive and deadline-driven work environment.
Ability to cope with high pressure caused by one or more project management elements such as quality, turnaround time, resource or budget constraint.
Attention to details.
Ability to learn and master quickly the technology, tools and processes required by the account.
The ability to train a Project Coordinator on projects/processes.

Education Level
Bachelor’s degree (B.A.) from a college or university in related filed or relevant working experience. 

\n
ai_core_responsibilities: The Project Manager is responsible for the planning, execution, tracking, delivery, and closure of client projects. They work with clients to understand requirements and engage the global team to fulfill these requirements.
ai_requirements_summary: Candidates should have proven project management experience in a client-centric environment, ideally in the localization industry. They must also possess native-level proficiency in Italian and strong interpersonal skills.

linkedin_org_description:
For over 25 years, Welocalize has helped some of the world's largest organizations improve customer engagement through the power of localized content. Since our founding in 1997, we've been a leader in applying innovative technology and adopting AI to deliver the highest quality translations quickly, efficiently, and at scale. Our proven track record showcases tangible business outcomes, including higher marketing conversion rates, regulatory compliance, increased customer satisfaction and retention, intellectual property protection, higher adoption rates, and improved data with enhanced models.

At the heart of our innovation is OPAL, our advanced Service Delivery Platform, ensuring every translation is fast, effortless, and impeccably accurate. This technology, combined with our extensive network of over 250,000 linguistic experts in more than 250 languages, allows us to deliver multilingual content transformation services that are unmatched in quality and relevance.

Our global team of industry specialists is dedicated to enabling your teams to achieve global business outcomes. From translation and localization to NLP-enabled machine learning training data, and data annotation, we blend cutting-edge technology with human insight across every project.

title: Technical Support Engineer
description_text:
WalkMe, an SAP company, pioneered the Digital Adoption Platform (DAP) to enable business leaders to fully harness technology in today's complex digital landscape. By leveraging WalkMe's features—guidance, engagement, insights, and automation—employees boost efficiency, executives gain greater visibility into digital usage, and organizations maximize their digital assets, driving successful digital transformation.

Together, SAP and WalkMe form a powerful partnership that revolutionizes the digital transformation journey. This collaboration allows businesses to unlock the full potential of SAP's robust ERP solutions while seamlessly enhancing user experience and productivity with WalkMe's intuitive digital adoption platform.

As a Technical Support Engineer, you will report to the Support Manager. You will be the trusted point of contact for WalkMe's portfolio of customers, beginning from the point of sale and extending through onboarding, project success, and renewals. As a Technical Support Engineer, you will play a crucial role in delivering prompt and effective solutions to our customers, ensuring we meet our Service Level Agreements (SLAs) and achieve high customer satisfaction. Additionally, you will actively contribute to our knowledge base and customer community, enhancing the overall customer experience.
\n

What You'll Own
Communicate with customers via email, live chat, and screen shares.
Act as a trusted advisor to our customers, promoting product knowledge and self-sufficiency.
Develop in-depth knowledge of our products and their features.
Engage with customers to understand and fulfil their goals with our solutions.
Apply and share best practices for optimal use of our products.
Innovate and propose ideas for enhancing the overall customer experience.

What You'll Need to Succeed
1.5+ year experience in software support or customer service.
Fluent in English (verbal and written). 
Problem-solving skills with a customer-first approach.
Knowledge of HTML, jQuery, CSS (please specify your level).
Experience in various communication formats (written, live chat, conference calls, in-person).
Ability to grasp and articulate new technologies quickly.
Proficient in using application logs, browser dev tools, and other diagnostic tools.
Independent and teamwork capabilities.
Poise and articulation in challenging customer interactions.
Availability to work onsite at the Bangalore SAP office 3 times a week

What Sets Us Apart
At WalkMe, we are dedicated to building a workforce that reflects the diversity of our global community and clients we serve through inclusive programs and initiatives including equal pay, employee resource groups, holistic benefits and more. We are committed to fostering an inclusive culture which celebrates the unique experiences and perspectives each Team Member brings to the workplace.
Hybrid Work Arrangement: We offer a hybrid work schedule to perfectly combine the benefits of remote work and the essential connections and collaborations of onsite work.
Supportive Culture: We focus on the whole person, celebrating what makes us unique, and create space for community.
Professional Development: We encourage continuous learning and offer opportunities for career development through our career compass offering.
Stay healthy and happy with Wellness@WalkMe! Enjoy quarterly wellness reimbursements, daily BrightBreaks to recharge, and WalkMe’s annual Wellness Month every July—because your well-being matters all year long.
WalkMe provides health coverage options, where applicable, to ensure employees have access to essential medical benefits. Our offerings are designed to support the well-being and diverse needs of our global workforce.
WalkMe offers a generous annual leave policy tailored to meet regional standards, ensuring all employees enjoy sufficient time off to rest and recharge.
WalkMe offers RefreshMe Days throughout the year to further strengthen our commitment to work/life balance.
Robust Retirement Contributions: Ask HR about the specific offerings for your region!
SAP's acquisition of WalkMe highlights a commitment to enhancing user experience and streamlining software interactions, offering opportunities to work with cutting-edge technology that drives efficiency and innovation in the workplace.

\n
€0 - €0 a year
\n
At WalkMe, we approach Diversity, Equity and Inclusion (DEI) with the same level of collaboration, innovation and accountability that we bring to the rest of our business. We believe in the value of diversity and are committed to ensuring an equitable and inclusive workplace where every employee has an equal opportunity to achieve success.

WalkMe does not discriminate. If a candidate requires a reasonable accommodation to complete a job application, pre-employment testing, or a job interview or to otherwise participate in the hiring process, please contact your Talent Acquisition partner immediately.

TO ALL RECRUITMENT AGENCIES: WalkMe does not accept agency resumes. Please do not forward resumes to WalkMe employees or any other company location. WalkMe is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes and will not pay fees to any third-party agency or company that does not have a signed agreement with the Company for this specific role.

You will also contribute to the knowledge base and customer community to enhance the overall customer experience.
